Do you remember all this, Fellow Conservative? **Last fall, following the horrifying, barbaric terrorist attack on Israel by Hamas, we exposed the truth about Colin Allred 's anti-Israel extremism and seeming support for terroristic hate.**
* We highlighted how he has met in the past with Students for Justice in Palestine, a group of _hate-fueled radicals_ who organized an anti-Israel rally on October 12th.

* We let voters know how he voted "NO" on the package passed in the House to help Israel fight back against the Hamas terrorists, and how in the past he's voted against a measure to condemn the anti-Israel (BDS) movement.

* And we didn't let him off the hook when he lashed out at a citizen report who asked him pointed questions regarding his support for Hamas - __this guy even threatened to CALL THE CAPITOL POLICE in a cowardly attempt to dodge accountability__ _!_

It's the New Year, and Colin Allred STILL refuses to retract his support for Hamas.

It is disturbing and absolutely inexplicable. This guy is wrong for the Lone Star State, period.

name: Schiff HQ
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
Derek — did you
see Adam’s message?

The January 6 insurrection at the United States Capitol demonstrated how
close we came to losing our democracy, and the threat that Donald Trump
and the MAGA movement pose.

Every day since that violent assault, Adam has worked tirelessly to defend
our democracy from the conspiratorial, dangerous movement that has
attempted to overthrow our elections, call for the imprisonment of
political rivals, and turn us against one another.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=jan2024_abs_em.zPsl9O&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240106_PM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=3&t=1003&akid=4993%2E5257348%2EFj9U0p ]Read Adam’s reflection on the anniversary of January 6 below, and then
chip in
$3 to
help win this race and stop the MAGA movement once and for all.

Thank you,

Team Schiff

---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Adam Schiff
Date: January 6, 2024
Subject: A day I won't forget

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=jan2024_abs_em.zPsl9O&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240106_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1004&akid=4993%2E5257348%2EFj9U0p ]Adam Schiff for Senate

Derek —

Few days in our country’s history have made as big of an impact on me, and
on our democracy as January 6, 2021.

I remember the January 6th attack on the Capitol like it was yesterday.

The sounds of yelling. Of insurrectionists storming the Capitol building
and breaking doors and windows to get in. Of the whispers between members
of Congress deciding how to protect ourselves.

The sight of Capitol police officers running toward danger. Of my
colleagues crouched on the floor, clutching masks to protect themselves
from tear gas. Of thousands of protestors assaulting Capitol Police and
desecrating the hallowed halls of Congress.

You could sense the fear and the urgency. And the anger over what this mob
was doing to overturn a free and fair election. And then, finally, once
the fighting was over and we had fulfilled our duty to certify the
election, the recognition that our democracy had survived, but barely.

Derek, I
will remember that day for a long time. But I will also remember what my
GOP colleagues in Congress did.

After the rioting and the mayhem, a majority of Republican members still
voted to overturn the election. Still. 147 members of Congress — many of
whom are still in office today.

Insurrectionists, too. Albeit in suits and ties.

Since that day, we have seen nothing but continued threats to our
Constitution and our democracy — by way of election deniers running for
office, and members of Congress continuing to support Donald Trump, vowing
to pardon him and try to erase history.

Our democracy was battered and bruised on January 6, 2021, and it has not
yet recovered. The number of Republicans who believe the election was
stolen has been increasing since January 6, and that has only emboldened
Trump and his MAGA followers even more.

It’s going to take hard work by everyone to move this country forward and
finally relegate Trump to the dustbin of history. But we will. We must be
a country that can have political disagreements without resorting to
violence and insurrection.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=jan2024_abs_em.zPsl9O&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240106_PM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=3&t=1005&akid=4993%2E5257348%2EFj9U0p ]If you agree that we must take action now to preserve and protect our
democracy for future generations, then I am respectfully asking you to add
a contribution of
$3 to my
U.S. Senate campaign today to help me continue this important work.

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2142?c0=jan2024_abs_em.eamPKe&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240106_PM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=3&t=1006&akid=4993%2E5257348%2EFj9U0p ]EXPRESS DONATE
$3

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2142?c0=jan2024_abs_em.eamPKe&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240106_PM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=10&t=1007&akid=4993%2E5257348%2EFj9U0p ]EXPRESS DONATE
$10

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2142?c0=jan2024_abs_em.eamPKe&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240106_PM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=25&t=1008&akid=4993%2E5257348%2EFj9U0p ]EXPRESS DONATE
$25

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2142?c0=jan2024_abs_em.eamPKe&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240106_PM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=50&t=1009&akid=4993%2E5257348%2EFj9U0p ]EXPRESS DONATE
$50

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2142?c0=jan2024_abs_em.eamPKe&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240106_PM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=100&t=1010&akid=4993%2E5257348%2EFj9U0p ]EXPRESS DONATE
$100

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=jan2024_abs_em.zPsl9O&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240106_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1011&akid=4993%2E5257348%2EFj9U0p ]ANOTHER AMOUNT

We will get through this difficult time in our history. America is a
deeply resilient country filled with patriotic citizens who love our
democracy, and those who do, vastly outnumber those trying to tear it
down.

Please take care of yourselves, and thank you for all your support during
this pivotal time in our history.

— Adam

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=jan2024_abs_em.zPsl9O&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240106_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1012&akid=4993%2E5257348%2EFj9U0p ]Adam Schiff for Senate Banner

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1032?c0=jan2024_abs_em.PW8mTI&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240106_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1013&akid=4993%2E5257348%2EFj9U0p ]DONATE MONTHLY

150 E. Olive Ave., Suite 208 Burbank CA, 91502

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/60?t=1001&akid=4993%2E5257348%2EFj9U0p ]www.adamschiff.com | [ mailto:contact@adamschiff.com ]contact@adamschiff.com | [ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/64?t=1002&akid=4993%2E5257348%2EFj9U0p ]Privacy Policy

name: Isaac
subject: There will be another Jan 6th…
body:
Myself and many experts far more knowledgeable than I fear this will be our last election. | | [ ](https://url1005.email.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953w89kKB5u2yVtf13KRofeKJBQrPWVaPDGdrWmHkg1i9UECE7RAT4nlU9b0FbcHi2qE7DWdajqOILvDohS02z6UWql1GYtVoUvXacr_eRjYtTGVVn7aO3SLpYzyiO0q-He8NKsIf6LP9czWKLBcpbJcH1RFBkbkODx1cByQ4BcXD1597prutmIUZLRxqbVhX_r6g3xFHz0zFjvzmJz3NAdwhJLh-uONHtyYP2O8UxGRs5UOWiYyOjZzrCMHgS9CYb6_ZvC0Uw17yv75jObg3fDh781LGp-d6QSyKtEt9D3Pt4Gnd08cE5d0Vvy-tiGrtuOg/42s/uxXOz2UxQy6fJ3f26V4D9w/h0/t1WjTo-HMzObao_J_qvMgwePC5KpBwYR26G7OFRGLJY)
---
Friend, Today marks three years since the attack on our Capitol on January 6th, 2021. A dark day, but an important reminder of the fragility of our democracy. I remember what I was doing on that day three years ago. I was doing work on finishing my basement and hadn’t even been checking my phone. When I took a break and turned on the news my _heart sank_. Watching the videos playing I could tell that many of the rioters storming and infiltrating the capitol were using tactics eerily reminiscent of those that I had learned in the military. **What I was watching was not just a riot, but a carefully planned operation executed by operators with advanced training.**
---
| [ ](https://url1005.email.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953w89kKB5u2yVtf13KRofeKJBQrPWVaPDGdrWmHkg1i9UNkMJgiB4ZXZyz0jvQ_2VgEn_5nJ4l8PCU9EBaAASiD8mb1_71ezaHvcY-vZzYhiYgv-6zmzxA4ActjUQGTcpZQuPzH8FK3cDEsQKTtYvE8L3rMCpRM11hLOUIYDJCJCfBMcHr7_dmisLaOP8TNa7hEKebc8ibKYotm5Oq6l7s8p5VfZAWzwSEIf75BQT5SHTVbBiX32riCdAl_Csxd3e_xYN-NK5R5xy0LAa-z4pV6bJqPOiUqnMwlGjmuXuYfsbcNacW1fLLLE4w-wEKFimac/42s/uxXOz2UxQy6fJ3f26V4D9w/h1/6mQggaGqTcwo3tpgjic-Y-RCK1SwPXj_bKGaF-8uXV0)
---
_Don’t let the Q-Anon shaman’s from that day fool you. Many of the individuals on the ground that day were organized, armed, well trained, and extremely dangerous._
---
I was sick to my stomach with a feeling that our democracy might be falling apart before my very eyes. On the day after 9/11, I volunteered to return to active duty in the US Marines. _On January 6th and the days following I remember a similar feeling in my heart that I had to do something._
The previous year I had just finished up my first Congressional Campaign. It was a long race in which **my family and I received death threats and my home was vandalized by partisan extremists similar to those that stormed the capitol**. When we finished after election day I was ready to take a long and much needed break from campaign life. Yet, when I saw the videos of the police officer being killed, of masked men kitted out in military gear climbing up the Capitol terraces, and brave capitol police holding the line, I knew that now was not the time to stand idly by. I relaunched my 2022 campaign that same week and have been going at it non-stop to flip this seat ever since. The force driving me was not what I witnessed that day but the constant reminder that **there will be another January 6th unless we take decisive action to stop it.** My opponent Lauren Boebert was one of the _key planners and instigators of the January 6th attack_. She went so far as to give reconnaissance tours of the Capitol to the men and women who would storm it days later, helping them to identify weak points in the building's security. Preventing the next January 6th means removing its instigators and planners at every level. It will be a national effort from the presidency down to local and state governments and helping me remove Lauren Boebert is a key component of this effort. **If Boebert remains in office come January, 2025, I assure you that she has vengeance on her mind and will work to ensure Trump’s return to power irregardless of who wins the election.****

**[ Can you support my campaign with a donation of $25, $50, $100, or whatever you can spare to help us remove Lauren Boebert and the next January 6th? If we can’t defeat MAGA this election, myself, and many experts far more knowledgeable than I fear it will be our last.](https://url1005.email.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953w89kKB5u2yVtf13KRofeKJBQrPWVaPDGdrWmHkg1i9ULRxHjzAvpDMck3HpUH9UkUn6UZQUUwD51v1q86vABv-_rxQU9ZnBGnykBMe8beusLw4OEnNGhOFr88GpNPS6SEd_5DVdZqxeNrRK51JnBv7uGdVijpM1OE65JaRO-uVim2sOZ7zeYsDIdwb6leDa0_0p4DtK630JQntG7EWwX9Y6gaPH9xOKvqvqRpN5GsG-e1QjSCNKvv1HvlzLS7DV8liu2c1C4onsWGocpSQZAkfS1OZDLORszYJbZo5z7qlKVkSAx-IhChAcdAOBI3y2-U/42s/uxXOz2UxQy6fJ3f26V4D9w/h2/7ToMXEvb3_26fa2BtjSFDoxa2cltl9LBo4Khx0BSdzM)

clean_body: Myself and many experts far more knowledgeable than I fear this will be our last election. | | Friend, Today marks three years since the attack on our Capitol on January 6th, 2021. A dark day, but an important reminder of the fragility of our democracy. I remember what I was doing on that day three years ago. I was doing work on finishing my basement and hadn’t even been checking my phone. When I took a break and turned on the news my heart sank. Watching the videos playing I could tell that many of the rioters storming and infiltrating the capitol were using tactics eerily reminiscent of those that I had learned in the military. What I was watching was not just a riot, but a carefully planned operation executed by operators with advanced training. | Don’t let the Q-Anon shaman’s from that day fool you. Many of the individuals on the ground that day were organized, armed, well trained, and extremely dangerous. I was sick to my stomach with a feeling that our democracy might be falling apart before my very eyes. On the day after 9/11, I volunteered to return to active duty in the US Marines. On January 6th and the days following I remember a similar feeling in my heart that I had to do something. The previous year I had just finished up my first Congressional Campaign. It was a long race in which my family and I received death threats and my home was vandalized by partisan extremists similar to those that stormed the capitol. When we finished after election day I was ready to take a long and much needed break from campaign life. Yet, when I saw the videos of the police officer being killed, of masked men kitted out in military gear climbing up the Capitol terraces, and brave capitol police holding the line, I knew that now was not the time to stand idly by. I relaunched my 2022 campaign that same week and have been going at it non-stop to flip this seat ever since. The force driving me was not what I witnessed that day but the constant reminder that there will be another January 6th unless we take decisive action to stop it. My opponent Lauren Boebert was one of the key planners and instigators of the January 6th attack. She went so far as to give reconnaissance tours of the Capitol to the men and women who would storm it days later, helping them to identify weak points in the building's security. Preventing the next January 6th means removing its instigators and planners at every level. It will be a national effort from the presidency down to local and state governments and helping me remove Lauren Boebert is a key component of this effort. If Boebert remains in office come January, 2025, I assure you that she has vengeance on her mind and will work to ensure Trump’s return to power irregardless of who wins the election. I look forward to working alongside you in this last-ditch effort to save our democracy. Yours in the fight, Isaac "Ike" McCorkle US Marine Corps, Retired Democrat for CO-04 | | Our mailing address is: Ike McCorkle for Congress , | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Ike for Congress, please .

Peter, can I be honest with you?
I hate sending emails like this. That's why I won't beg you to donate ahead of tonight's crucial midnight deadline, but I will lay out the facts:
**My potential GOP opponent – Mitch McConnell's handpicked candidate – outraised me in the first week of his campaign launch. And shortly after, a shady billionaire poured $2 million into the race to help flip this seat red.**
McConnell and his allies flooded Nevada's last Senate race with over a staggering $55 million (only to come up less than a percentage point short of winning). And with TIME reporting that Nevada could deliver everything from the Senate to the White House to Republicans in 2024, we need all the support we can get if we're going to fend off their attacks.
But our midnight fundraising deadline is just hours away, and we're on track to fall short of our $20,000 goal. So please, without much time left, I have to ask:

clean_body: = Peter, can I be honest with you? I hate sending emails like this. That's why I won't beg you to donate ahead of tonight's crucial midnight deadline, but I will lay out the facts: My potential GOP opponent – Mitch McConnell's handpicked candidate – outraised me in the first week of his campaign launch. And shortly after, a shady billionaire poured $2 million into the race to help flip this seat red. McConnell and his allies flooded Nevada's last Senate race with over a staggering $55 million (only to come up less than a percentage point short of winning). And with TIME reporting that Nevada could deliver everything from the Senate to the White House to Republicans in 2024, we need all the support we can get if we're going to fend off their attacks. But our midnight fundraising deadline is just hours away, and we're on track to fall short of our $20,000 goal. So please, without much time left, I have to ask: = If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: = = = = = = Thank you for coming through at such a crucial moment. Jacky Rosen | | Paid for by Upset The Setup PAC (www.upsetsetup.org) Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 600 Pennsylvania Ave. SE #15180, Washington, DC 20003 Upset The Setup is working everyday to elect young, diverse, progressive Democrats to critical local offices so we can build up our communities, increase opportunity, and eliminate poverty. subject: To: President Biden

body:
show your thanks!
| [ ](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/59404?t=6&akid=12375%2E878179%2EdySIcy) We can’t believe how much Biden has done for our country, so we’re sending him a HUGE card to thank him for his hard work!

[**So you’ve been personally selected to sign our letter thanking President Biden for fighting for the American people! Please, we need 10,000 signatures by midnight to demonstrate massive support! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/59404?t=7&akid=12375%2E878179%2EdySIcy) | [Donate $3 to sign the letter now »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/59404?t=8&akid=12375%2E878179%2EdySIcy)
---
TO: President Biden
FROM: A grateful Democrat
Subject: I’m so grateful.

**Dear President Biden,

I’m so thankful for everything you’ve done as President!

**Despite MAGA turmoil, over the last two and a half years, you’ve fought TIRELESSLY for the American people — defending abortion rights, confirming an incredible Supreme Court Justice, saving Social Security from GOP cuts, and creating millions of jobs for the people.**

I know standing up to MAGA Republican attacks isn’t easy, but it is always the right thing to do.

So as the 2024 race kicks into high gear, I wanted to show my support and thank you for being such an amazing leader for our country!

[**I hope you know that there are MILLIONS of us across the nation who stand with you. That’s why I’m signing this letter and chipping in $3 to the Voter Protection Project to thank you and to keep electing incredible Democrats up and down the ballot »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/59456?t=9&akid=12375%2E878179%2EdySIcy)** | [SPACE RUNNING OUT: Donate $3 to sign now »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/59456?t=10&akid=12375%2E878179%2EdySIcy)
---
**_X A THANKFUL AMERICAN_**
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=12375%2E878179%2EdySIcy). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=12375%2E878179%2EdySIcy).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=12375%2E878179%2EdySIcy) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=11&akid=12375%2E878179%2EdySIcy). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=12375%2E878179%2EdySIcy)

name: Lucas Kunce HQ
subject: What happened to Josh Hawley after January 6, 2021
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
His support base is crumbling. His approvals are plummeting. Now, he’s the most vulnerable GOP Senator running for re-election this year.
#
Peter,
Josh Hawley’s entire support base started crumbling after his actions on January 6th. **Here’s what happened:**
**[DEFEAT HAWLEY: CHIP IN NOW →](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/42343?refcode=em20240106-4552&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=4552%2E614464%2EbyDxBv)**
**FIRST —** Three years ago today, Josh Hawley pumped his fist in support of rioters outside the U.S. Capitol. Then, just hours later, he skittered out the back door when those same rioters stormed the building.
**Hawley proved to everyone that day that he’s nothing but a fraud and a coward.**
**THEN —** A handful of Hawley’s former mentors and mega-donors announced they’re refusing to support his 2024 re-election campaign. **Missouri’s three-term GOP U.S. Senator Jack Danforth even said mentoring Hawley was “the worst decision I’ve ever made in my life.”**
**NOW —** Hawley is deeply unpopular with Missouri voters. The latest reporting from _Morning Consult_ found that Josh Hawley has the lowest approval rating of any GOP U.S. Senator running for re-election this year.

**In his words:** History is watching. The world is watching. Our children and grandchildren will hold us responsible.
**That’s why we are working our tails off on the ground in California’s most competitive tossup seats earlier than ever.** There are enough vulnerable red seats in our state ALONE to flip the U.S. House Majority from red to blue.
_With a Republican House Majority, Republicans could vote to overturn lawful election results.**If we flip the House, we ensure that never happens.**_

clean_body: President Joe Biden is calling on us to step up [!!] | = | Three years ago, California and the country watched as Donald Trump encouraged a violent mob to storm the United States Capitol and attack law enforcement in a desperate attempt to remain in power. Today, on the three-year anniversary of this insurrection, President Joe Biden is calling on us to step up to maintain our democracy. = = = = = = = We strongly believe that Joe Biden has said it best: | | = In his words: History is watching. The world is watching. Our children and grandchildren will hold us responsible. That’s why we are working our tails off on the ground in California’s most competitive tossup seats earlier than ever. There are enough vulnerable red seats in our state ALONE to flip the U.S. House Majority from red to blue. With a Republican House Majority, Republicans could vote to overturn lawful election results.If we flip the House, we ensure that never happens. Donald Trump’s continuous assaults on the foundations of our country drove our democracy to the brink of ruin on January 6, 2021, and he’s threatening to throw our nation into chaos once again. But we know the value of our democracy and freedoms and California will be on theFRONT LINE of ensuring election results are respected, not overturned. = = Thank you, \- CADEM | | = Our Democratic leaders are working hard to make California a better place to live. name: Team AOC
subject: January 6th
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
#
3 years ago, on January 6, Alexandria and her colleagues sheltered in place for hours as rioters breached the Capitol to try and overturn the 2020 election results.
GOP leadership have since worked overtime to downplay the scale and violence of the insurrection, spreading lies about who was responsible for the attack.
**It’s our responsibility to set the record straight.** The global rise of fascism hinges on disinformation and the erosion of trust in our democratic processes.
[Our movement is fighting to directly combat right-wing, extremist lies because accountability isn’t about revenge, it’s about creating safety. Alexandria is not afraid to take on fascists — and she will never let their lies go unanswered. Will you make a $5 contribution today to power our fight? ](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20240106.sSuJXF&refcode=em20240106-5593-P_FND_EGR_MIS&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=5593%2E2526796%2EpG5Vo9)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20240106.sSuJXF&refcode=em20240106-5593-P_FND_EGR_MIS&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=5593%2E2526796%2EpG5Vo9)**
Trump and other top Republicans are trafficking in outrageous conspiracy theories to avoid accountability for January 6. Because of their lies 25% of Americans, and 34% of Republicans, now believe that the January 6th riot was an FBI set-up.1
But Alexandria will not stop fighting for accountability for those who incited the riot because **we are not safe from fascism when people who hold positions of power are willing to endanger the lives of others to score political points.**
If you’re able to chip in to help us go toe-to-toe with right-wing Republicans who are still trying to spread lies about what happened, [you can do so here.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20240106.sSuJXF&refcode=em20240106-5593-P_FND_EGR_MIS&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=5593%2E2526796%2EpG5Vo9)
In solidarity,
Team AOC
1 - [**Washington Post** : A quarter of Americans believe FBI instigated Jan. 6, Post-UMD poll finds](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/22111?t=22&akid=5593%2E2526796%2EpG5Vo9)

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20240106?refcode=em20240106-5593-P_FND_EGR_MIS&t=23&refcode2=5593_2526796_pG5Vo9&akid=5593%2E2526796%2EpG5Vo9)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20240106-5593-P_FND_EGR_MIS&t=24&akid=5593%2E2526796%2EpG5Vo9)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=25&akid=5593%2E2526796%2EpG5Vo9) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=26&akid=5593%2E2526796%2EpG5Vo9) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=27&akid=5593%2E2526796%2EpG5Vo9)
---|---|---
Email us: [speak@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: speak@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.

Patriot : I am back on board Trump Force One after spending two days in Iowa, working to win the FIRST Caucus only 9 DAYS AWAY.

---
While in Iowa, I learned that a new **SABOTAGE** plot against us is brewing at the final hour...
---
..._And it comes from the_** _Obama Machine._**
---
Last summer, it was leaked that Obama told Crooked Joe in a closed door meeting that he would LOSE to me.
---
That led Obama to go on a fundraising rampage, raising MILLIONS of dollars for Biden to try and defeat us.
---
_But now, I got word of something FAR more sinister._
---
**Obama’s former campaign manager is trying to****INTERVENE****in the Republican primary to SABOTAGE us and install a weak GOP nominee that the Democrats could easily beat.**
---
_He’s urging Democrats to register as Republicans so that they can cast a vote for a RINO candidate who would get eaten alive by the Democrat Deep State._
---
What else should we expect from someone who _**SPIED**_ on my campaign?
---
_With JUST 9 DAYS LEFT until the FIRST VOTE is cast, I’m asking YOU to make a contribution to counter this last-minute sabotage plot._
---
While I won’t be able to check our account for the remaining duration of my flight back to Mar-a-Lago, I will be promptly briefed on our fundraising numbers for the FIRST WEEK of 2024 as soon as we touch down and I’m back in the car.
---
**[Please make a contribution before Trump Force One lands in Florida so that we can wrap up the primary ASAP and focus 100% of our attention on the _REAL_ mission: winning back the White House and saving America! ](https://link.donaldjtrump.com/u/click?_t=c26d591425684a3289b90149d613a03c&_m=0a97668903fd48ff98915917a28f0d92&_e=CJmr5OQV_ipWw2b22dliQkoGOPi-GJfEu9ayzx0QzoarH5uirIX5pLSvO_FzuRECsggIR-onk0R7AmKYOaZZDizonvwnnPO957oWXgiSNP1IzcJ-71cAxbPKIzqpXb2WXXdnNsCMMaMWF8j2G7kBxVuoUkju-tGQ-HEVbN-BjJoc5BsowblhepoNmdJMlPZ6P6QKFS4RnN6--KWzMmMdeVsrftKLziSWIMW-GRv6hZpp46dJ08Y84WdFy6vcyiYnmi2eHNfl-xSlezULuRRfSJdG4kcq9Op90Uf2ifA4oD_ug5mTWGnF7DQcBWbdu3zMGk4eVCHPsi4rb81CJjrQm5lL-UilqBOQpRiDfAz2JBOKxvxIyA__DMBQ00xtgudJgb5SxxFccR-QAX8ON4qlVxeqFfkbpe_Z-niOkrXxqyWzFBwzUgZ7Sv_y7Bd0b0Fx93nTbcZ1G_XPb8PzcPvyyygPQSbHyjaHydceySkqsWr_PClXcx8NzM-F6jSbqg_z)**

body:
Demand Is Surging – 107,000 Americans Have Already Claimed Theirs...

# **FOX & Friends Features Breakthrough Solar Generator**
_**Demand Is Surging - 107,000 Americans Have Already Claimed Theirs...**_ [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zu6fsc2icic930omai8bjob54bck7k9jealc11qo_rp22sh2s8i6eo31cdh68or0sth2bs) FOX & Friends featured a breakthrough solar generator right before a "polar vortex" sent thousands of Americans into total darkness. Skip Bedell recommended it as the perfect gift to prepare for winter storms. **_And then BOOM!_** _**Demand surged and 4Patriots sold out.**_ Days later, a massive ice storm hit the nation. The folks who were fortunate enough to claim their silent, fume-free solar generator were thanking their lucky stars. Because despite power outages, rolling blackouts and bone-chilling temperatures... Those who acted fast and got their [**4Patriots solar generator**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z45a9om994ks5eao036fndgh4sdk0gtkjiarsrp0_rp22sh2s8i6eo31cdh68or0sth2bs) had peace of mind and could power critical devices like lights, space heaters, communications, critical medical devices and even fridges and freezers. Sadly, those who didn't prepare were left to hope and pray the lights came back on soon. **But that's not why this generator is going viral...** **National Security Experts Fear Imminent Threat to Our Power Grid** Freak ice storms, hurricanes and raging wildfires aren't the only threat to our nation's crumbling power grid... Shockingly, in 2022 alone there were over 70 physical attacks on our nation's power grid! And even worse, attacks on just 9 of the nation's 55,000 electrical substations could trigger... **A nationwide blackout that could last up to 18 months!** Former CIA Director, James Woolsey, warned that an attack on America's infrastructure would, _"Blackout the national electric grid and other life-sustaining critical infrastructures for over a year. Killing 9 out of 10 Americans by starvation and societal collapse."_ Despite this clear and present danger... **Our Government is Woefully Unprepared** They ignore dire warnings from national security experts about our vulnerable power grid. Warnings of physical, electro-magnetic pulse (EMP) and cyberattacks... And who suffers because of their neglect? YOU and your family. **Imagine a blackout lasting not days, but weeks or months.** Your life would be frozen in time right at the moment your power fails. An entire country plunged into darkness. Without a generator, your fridge, electric range and microwave would be dead. All the food in your fridge and freezer - spoiled. Your well couldn't pump fresh water into your house. And even if you don't have a well, a total grid failure means no fresh water to drink, cook or clean with. This is not some crazy doomsday theory. It's a real threat. **That's why many Americans are taking matters into their own hands and are securing their own solar powered generator.** Solar generators are a smart choice because they produce an endless supply of life-saving electricity when you need it most - and **without gas, fumes or noise**. Our top recommendation in portable solar generators is the [**Patriot Power Generator**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zpbbks77pvemk9njror4ej3qmafbiukcse30spq8_rp22sh2s8i6eo31cdh68or0sth2bs). **THIS breakthrough solar generator is safe enough to use inside. And never needs gas, ever.** And you'll have peace of mind knowing that you and your family have a safe, reliable and easy-to-use source of backup power. To survive a blackout, storm, grid-down event... or worse. It's why the Patriot Power Generator was recently featured on **Fox & Friends**... **And why over 107,000 Americans already have it in their homes right now.** **Demand is surging...** _"It has a battery inside. You can charge it with electricity or - what's really cool - with a solar panel that comes with it for FREE."_ [**Click Here To See This Breakthrough Solar Generation In Action**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zj7p84cnqq637o5gutvtdcfhvbj568f1ofomvvcg_rp22sh2s8i6eo31cdh68or0sth2bs)

name: Your America
subject: Survey on the Department of Justice
body:
The survey will only take a few moments of your time

This sponsored message from Your America News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c38856%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=HigtrRhrMNKavYYNBPjihw&sysid=1) Dear Friend, Before you move on to your next email--I would appreciate it if you would take a few moments to participate in Hillsdale College’s **National Survey on the Department of Justice.** The survey will only take a few moments of your time, and its subject affects your liberty and the very survival of the rule of law in America. **The current administration’s weaponization of the Department of Justice is unprecedented in American history.** Instead of protecting your God-given constitutional rights, the administration uses the Department of Justice to attack its political opponents... ...as well as Christians, parents, and anyone who dares to stand up for our constitutional liberties. At the same time, with the help of the media it...
* Covers up a two-tiered justice system that violates your constitutional rights

* Hides the corruption of the ruling class

* Attacks those with traditional viewpoints

**That’s why I’m asking you to take the Hillsdale College National Survey on the Department of Justice.** By completing this survey, you will help us more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans like you on this critical issue. Your responses will help Hillsdale strengthen its nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--including the importance of the rule of law and checks and balances, which the American Founders saw as essential safeguards against corruption. Friend, you can complete the National Survey on the Department of Justice by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c38857%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=mtXHYl9ECSrimRe1AxgPvQ&sysid=1)** The **Declaration of Independence** argues that **the purpose of just government is to secure our natural rights** and that **just government is founded on the consent of the governed.** Yet today’s ruling class regularly disregards the will of the American people, and our rights--to the freedoms of speech, assembly, and religion, to due process, to gun ownership, and more--are under constant attack. **You and I know that liberty in America is under serious threat. But as I travel around the country, I tell the audiences I speak to how we are engaging in the fight against this threat.** A vital part of our efforts in this fight--in which Hillsdale College is a leader--is **reaching** and **teaching** millions of citizens, with the TRUTH about America’s great heritage of liberty. We are heavily invested in our educational outreach efforts through our **Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions.** These efforts include:
* **Teaching bright and principled students** --on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.--who receive a rigorous, **classical liberal arts education, including** a required course on the Constitution

* **Distributing _Imprimis_** , America’s leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.4 million homes and businesses ten times per year; previous issues include “The Politicization of the Department of Justice” by Harmeet K. Dhillon

* **Producing and promoting free online courses** for any citizen who wishes to learn, on topics such as the Constitution, American history, and free market economics

* **Providing a classical K-12 curriculum** with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide

After everything we’ve seen over the past few years, the need for Hillsdale’s educational outreach efforts is undeniable. So please share your views by completing our **National Survey on the Department of Justice** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. Your completed survey will help us form the most effective strategy to **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. As you might know, Hillsdale College is almost unique in American higher education in its refusal to accept EVEN ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. **This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. But it also means that our work depends entirely on the generous support of private citizens, like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.** If you agree that we are now seeing an unprecedented assault on the American way of life, I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the attached **National Survey on the Department of Justice** , which you can access at this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c38857%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=mtXHYl9ECSrimRe1AxgPvQ&sysid=1)** Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to receiving your completed survey, and I sincerely appreciate your support of Hillsdale’s educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 |
---

Your America News
---
_Your America News • 625 First Street #183 • Alexandria, VA 22314_

name: Your America
subject: FOX & Friends Features Breakthrough Solar Generator
body:
Demand Is Surging - 107,000 Americans Have Already Claimed Theirs...

# **FOX & Friends Features Breakthrough Solar Generator**
_**Demand Is Surging - 107,000 Americans Have Already Claimed Theirs...**_ [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c38854%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=5FWS7LyBUvZ3s88JGQ1I6Q&sysid=1) FOX & Friends featured a breakthrough solar generator right before a "polar vortex" sent thousands of Americans into total darkness. Skip Bedell recommended it as the perfect gift to prepare for winter storms. **_And then BOOM!_** _**Demand surged and 4Patriots sold out.**_ Days later, a massive ice storm hit the nation. The folks who were fortunate enough to claim their silent, fume-free solar generator were thanking their lucky stars. Because despite power outages, rolling blackouts and bone-chilling temperatures... Those who acted fast and got their [**4Patriots solar generator**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c38865%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=KxzLTFrF3ZZTcFML11SglA&sysid=1) had peace of mind and could power critical devices like lights, space heaters, communications, critical medical devices and even fridges and freezers. Sadly, those who didn't prepare were left to hope and pray the lights came back on soon. **But that's not why this generator is going viral...** **National Security Experts Fear Imminent Threat to Our Power Grid** Freak ice storms, hurricanes and raging wildfires aren't the only threat to our nation's crumbling power grid... Shockingly, in 2022 alone there were over 70 physical attacks on our nation's power grid! And even worse, attacks on just 9 of the nation's 55,000 electrical substations could trigger... **A nationwide blackout that could last up to 18 months!** Former CIA Director, James Woolsey, warned that an attack on America's infrastructure would, _"Blackout the national electric grid and other life-sustaining critical infrastructures for over a year. Killing 9 out of 10 Americans by starvation and societal collapse."_ Despite this clear and present danger... **Our Government is Woefully Unprepared** They ignore dire warnings from national security experts about our vulnerable power grid. Warnings of physical, electro-magnetic pulse (EMP) and cyberattacks... And who suffers because of their neglect? YOU and your family. **Imagine a blackout lasting not days, but weeks or months.** Your life would be frozen in time right at the moment your power fails. An entire country plunged into darkness. Without a generator, your fridge, electric range and microwave would be dead. All the food in your fridge and freezer - spoiled. Your well couldn't pump fresh water into your house. And even if you don't have a well, a total grid failure means no fresh water to drink, cook or clean with. This is not some crazy doomsday theory. It's a real threat. **That's why many Americans are taking matters into their own hands and are securing their own solar powered generator.** Solar generators are a smart choice because they produce an endless supply of life-saving electricity when you need it most - and **without gas, fumes or noise**. Our top recommendation in portable solar generators is the [**Patriot Power Generator**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c38866%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=RPI3UfUkKh17si0mjpCQBA&sysid=1). **THIS breakthrough solar generator is safe enough to use inside. And never needs gas, ever.** And you'll have peace of mind knowing that you and your family have a safe, reliable and easy-to-use source of backup power. To survive a blackout, storm, grid-down event... or worse. It's why the Patriot Power Generator was recently featured on **Fox & Friends**... **And why over 107,000 Americans already have it in their homes right now.** **Demand is surging...** _"It has a battery inside. You can charge it with electricity or - what's really cool - with a solar panel that comes with it for FREE."_ [**Click Here To See This Breakthrough Solar Generation In Action**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c38867%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=DQhGtPuXSu%2bN%2bjSA7ixLhg&sysid=1)
---

Fellow American **_Christianity has a PR problem. _** Which is why I want to give you _Christianity’s PR Problem & What To Do About It_. [**If you partner with 1517 today with a gift of any amount -- even just five dollars! -- to help cover the cost, I will send you _Christianity’s PR Problem & What To Do About It_ as a token of our thanks for your gift.**](http://trk.faithandlibertymail.) I'm thrilled to offer you this resource to understand and disarm false assumptions about Christianity held by your unbelieving friends and family members. **If you're anything like me, you have many people in your life who have assumptions about your Christian faith** — which makes it hard to share your faith. That's why I want to give you _Christianity's PR Problem_.
[**In Dr. Mark Mattes’ book,****_Christianity’s PR Problem & What To Do About It_****, Dr. Mattes addresses these concerns head on. He details how to share your faith with loved ones and those who buy into secular assumptions about our faith. Claim your book today with your gift of any amount to 1517.**](http://trk.faithandlibertymail.)
---
[](http://trk.faithandlibertymail.)
---
[**Claim your copy of _Christianity's PR Problem_**](http://trk.faithandlibertymail.)
---
In _Christianity’s PR Problem,_ Dr. Mattes accepts the challenges presented by secularism to help faithful Christians, like you, who want to defend thier faith to their friends and family. With your copy of _Christianity’s PR Problem_ , you can better understand unbelievers' complaints and respond with gracious confidence, boldly proclaiming the Good News in Christ Jesus. [**Every day, 1517 produces and distributes resources anchored in the central message of the Bible — that YOU are forgiven and free on account of Christ alone. Your generous gift of $25, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000, or any other amount will allow us to share the Gospel through our Podcast Network... our free online courses... and other published resources.**](http://trk.faithandlibertymail.)
---
[**Claim your copy of _Christianity's PR Problem_**](http://trk.faithandlibertymail.)
---
Now is the time to hold fast to the truth of the Gospel, that Jesus Christ has overcome the world. Christ sees the wickedness of this world and it does not go unpunished, but Christ sees sinners and suffers... has compassion on us... and moves towards us. **With your copy of _Christianity’s PR Problem_ , you’ll be equipped to move towards your friends and family — defending the Gospel against any secular argument and share the compassion of our Lord with fellow sinners.** At 1517, we believe it is vital to produce and share Christ-centered books, podcasts, daily articles and videos, and more to proclaim the Gospel message and continue reaching thousands of people worldwide.
[**No matter how much you can afford to donate, a copy of**** _Christianity’s PR Problem_****will be yours with your gift to support our efforts to reach millions of Americans with the Gospel and truth of Christianity.**](http://trk.faithandlibertymail._Zn-mSFQM6cMu7Q)

name: 1600 Daily
subject: Justice, weaponized
body:
The survey will only take a few moments of your time

This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zinr5fogn4aig52f1tn3hbe000j3i5l64t07lr0g_rp22sh2s8i6eo31cdh6apj6c1h2bs) Dear Friend, Before you move on to your next email--I would appreciate it if you would take a few moments to participate in Hillsdale College's **National Survey on the Department of Justice.** The survey will only take a few moments of your time, and its subject affects your liberty and the very survival of the rule of law in America. **The current administration 's weaponization of the Department of Justice is unprecedented in American history.** Instead of protecting your God-given constitutional rights, the administration uses the Department of Justice to attack its political opponents... ...as well as Christians, parents, and anyone who dares to stand up for our constitutional liberties. At the same time, with the help of the media it...
* Covers up a two-tiered justice system that violates your constitutional rights

* Hides the corruption of the ruling class

* Attacks those with traditional viewpoints

**That 's why I'm asking you to take the Hillsdale College National Survey on the Department of Justice.** By completing this survey, you will help us more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans like you on this critical issue. Your responses will help Hillsdale strengthen its nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--including the importance of the rule of law and checks and balances, which the American Founders saw as essential safeguards against corruption. Friend, you can complete the National Survey on the Department of Justice by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zn1t1plkqatlskt3ns8jv8u9fks4grr52848id30_rp22sh2s8i6eo31cdh6apj6c1h2bs)** The **Declaration of Independence** argues that **the purpose of just government is to secure our natural rights** and that **just government is founded on the consent of the governed.** Yet today's ruling class regularly disregards the will of the American people, and our rights--to the freedoms of speech, assembly, and religion, to due process, to gun ownership, and more--are under constant attack. **You and I know that liberty in America is under serious threat. But as I travel around the country, I tell the audiences I speak to how we are engaging in the fight against this threat.** A vital part of our efforts in this fight--in which Hillsdale College is a leader--is **reaching** and **teaching** millions of citizens, with the TRUTH about America's great heritage of liberty. We are heavily invested in our educational outreach efforts through our **Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions.** These efforts include:
* **Teaching bright and principled students** --on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.--who receive a rigorous, **classical liberal arts education, including** a required course on the Constitution

* **Distributing _Imprimis_** , America's leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.4 million homes and businesses ten times per year; previous issues include "The Politicization of the Department of Justice" by Harmeet K. Dhillon

* **Producing and promoting free online courses** for any citizen who wishes to learn, on topics such as the Constitution, American history, and free market economics

* **Providing a classical K-12 curriculum** with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide

After everything we've seen over the past few years, the need for Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts is undeniable. So please share your views by completing our **National Survey on the Department of Justice** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. Your completed survey will help us form the most effective strategy to **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. As you might know, Hillsdale College is almost unique in American higher education in its refusal to accept EVEN ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. **This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. But it also means that our work depends entirely on the generous support of private citizens, like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.** If you agree that we are now seeing an unprecedented assault on the American way of life, I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the attached **National Survey on the Department of Justice** , which you can access at this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zc7qf3j6m977pu1tst1f9c0p8n4hb2nqali54ufo_rp22sh2s8i6eo31cdh6apj6c1h2bs)** Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to receiving your completed survey, and I sincerely appreciate your support of Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 |

Yet today's ruling class regularly disregards the will of the American people, and our rights--to the freedoms of speech, assembly, and religion, to due process, to gun ownership, and more--are under constant attack. You and I know that liberty in America is under serious threat. But as I travel around the country, I tell the audiences I speak to how we are engaging in the fight against this threat. A vital part of our efforts in this fight--in which Hillsdale College is a leader--is reaching and teaching millions of citizens, with the TRUTH about America's great heritage of liberty. We are heavily invested in our educational outreach efforts through our Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions. Dhillon Producing and promoting free online courses for any citizen who wishes to learn, on topics such as the Constitution, American history, and free market economics Providing a classical K-12 curriculum with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide After everything we've seen over the past few years, the need for Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts is undeniable. So please share your views by completing our National Survey on the Department of Justice and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. Your completed survey will help us form the most effective strategy to reach and teach millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. As you might know, Hillsdale College is almost unique in American higher education in its refusal to accept EVEN ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. But it also means that our work depends entirely on the generous support of private citizens, like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty. If you agree that we are now seeing an unprecedented assault on the American way of life, I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. name: American Update
subject: FOX & Friends Features Breakthrough Solar Generator
body:
Demand Is Surging - 107,000 Americans Have Already Claimed Theirs...

# **FOX & Friends Features Breakthrough Solar Generator**
_**Demand Is Surging - 107,000 Americans Have Already Claimed Theirs...**_ [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c689338%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Tbrf5A2DlnCIKK1KMYkVsA&sysid=1) FOX & Friends featured a breakthrough solar generator right before a "polar vortex" sent thousands of Americans into total darkness. Skip Bedell recommended it as the perfect gift to prepare for winter storms. **_And then BOOM!_** _**Demand surged and 4Patriots sold out.**_ Days later, a massive ice storm hit the nation. The folks who were fortunate enough to claim their silent, fume-free solar generator were thanking their lucky stars. Because despite power outages, rolling blackouts and bone-chilling temperatures... Those who acted fast and got their [**4Patriots solar generator**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c689339%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=lXFa2bk%2buI44bCRWnSmwVQ&sysid=1) had peace of mind and could power critical devices like lights, space heaters, communications, critical medical devices and even fridges and freezers. Sadly, those who didn't prepare were left to hope and pray the lights came back on soon. **But that's not why this generator is going viral...** **National Security Experts Fear Imminent Threat to Our Power Grid** Freak ice storms, hurricanes and raging wildfires aren't the only threat to our nation's crumbling power grid... Shockingly, in 2022 alone there were over 70 physical attacks on our nation's power grid! And even worse, attacks on just 9 of the nation's 55,000 electrical substations could trigger... **A nationwide blackout that could last up to 18 months!** Former CIA Director, James Woolsey, warned that an attack on America's infrastructure would, _"Blackout the national electric grid and other life-sustaining critical infrastructures for over a year. Killing 9 out of 10 Americans by starvation and societal collapse."_ Despite this clear and present danger... **Our Government is Woefully Unprepared** They ignore dire warnings from national security experts about our vulnerable power grid. Warnings of physical, electro-magnetic pulse (EMP) and cyberattacks... And who suffers because of their neglect? YOU and your family. **Imagine a blackout lasting not days, but weeks or months.** Your life would be frozen in time right at the moment your power fails. An entire country plunged into darkness. Without a generator, your fridge, electric range and microwave would be dead. All the food in your fridge and freezer - spoiled. Your well couldn't pump fresh water into your house. And even if you don't have a well, a total grid failure means no fresh water to drink, cook or clean with. This is not some crazy doomsday theory. It's a real threat. **That's why many Americans are taking matters into their own hands and are securing their own solar powered generator.** Solar generators are a smart choice because they produce an endless supply of life-saving electricity when you need it most - and **without gas, fumes or noise**. Our top recommendation in portable solar generators is the [**Patriot Power Generator**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c689330%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=yngbJYAEnzCRjnV%2bCjoqDA&sysid=1). **THIS breakthrough solar generator is safe enough to use inside. And never needs gas, ever.** And you'll have peace of mind knowing that you and your family have a safe, reliable and easy-to-use source of backup power. To survive a blackout, storm, grid-down event... or worse. It's why the Patriot Power Generator was recently featured on **Fox & Friends**... **And why over 107,000 Americans already have it in their homes right now.** **Demand is surging...** _"It has a battery inside. You can charge it with electricity or - what's really cool - with a solar panel that comes with it for FREE."_ [**Click Here To See This Breakthrough Solar Generation In Action**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c689331%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=R8CvMkC26XFGEdvO33Wkqw&sysid=1)

name: ICYMI News
subject: Survey on the Department of Justice
body:
The survey will only take a few moments of your time

This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z9ernhvjqpr0h9h1fsu52i9l51a44ekej0cn6jg0_rp22sh2s8i6eo31cdh61o71cth2bs) Dear Friend, Before you move on to your next email--I would appreciate it if you would take a few moments to participate in Hillsdale College's **National Survey on the Department of Justice.** The survey will only take a few moments of your time, and its subject affects your liberty and the very survival of the rule of law in America. **The current administration 's weaponization of the Department of Justice is unprecedented in American history.** Instead of protecting your God-given constitutional rights, the administration uses the Department of Justice to attack its political opponents... ...as well as Christians, parents, and anyone who dares to stand up for our constitutional liberties. At the same time, with the help of the media it...
* Covers up a two-tiered justice system that violates your constitutional rights

* Hides the corruption of the ruling class

* Attacks those with traditional viewpoints

**That 's why I'm asking you to take the Hillsdale College National Survey on the Department of Justice.** By completing this survey, you will help us more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans like you on this critical issue. Your responses will help Hillsdale strengthen its nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--including the importance of the rule of law and checks and balances, which the American Founders saw as essential safeguards against corruption. Friend, you can complete the National Survey on the Department of Justice by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zjjr2bbon793a5054v5otb09gmrkd59h3hf64oeg_rp22sh2s8i6eo31cdh61o71cth2bs)** The **Declaration of Independence** argues that **the purpose of just government is to secure our natural rights** and that **just government is founded on the consent of the governed.** Yet today's ruling class regularly disregards the will of the American people, and our rights--to the freedoms of speech, assembly, and religion, to due process, to gun ownership, and more--are under constant attack. **You and I know that liberty in America is under serious threat. But as I travel around the country, I tell the audiences I speak to how we are engaging in the fight against this threat.** A vital part of our efforts in this fight--in which Hillsdale College is a leader--is **reaching** and **teaching** millions of citizens, with the TRUTH about America's great heritage of liberty. We are heavily invested in our educational outreach efforts through our **Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions.** These efforts include:
* **Teaching bright and principled students** --on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.--who receive a rigorous, **classical liberal arts education, including** a required course on the Constitution

* **Distributing _Imprimis_** , America's leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.4 million homes and businesses ten times per year; previous issues include "The Politicization of the Department of Justice" by Harmeet K. Dhillon

* **Producing and promoting free online courses** for any citizen who wishes to learn, on topics such as the Constitution, American history, and free market economics

* **Providing a classical K-12 curriculum** with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide

After everything we've seen over the past few years, the need for Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts is undeniable. So please share your views by completing our **National Survey on the Department of Justice** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. Your completed survey will help us form the most effective strategy to **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. As you might know, Hillsdale College is almost unique in American higher education in its refusal to accept EVEN ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. **This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. But it also means that our work depends entirely on the generous support of private citizens, like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.** If you agree that we are now seeing an unprecedented assault on the American way of life, I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the attached **National Survey on the Department of Justice** , which you can access at this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zb05ol2ur2j1mgqvvqime9g7mffslj0hi9a22mp8_rp22sh2s8i6eo31cdh61o71cth2bs)** Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to receiving your completed survey, and I sincerely appreciate your support of Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 |

| ICYMI News
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: BREAKING - SkyTree Book Fairs challenges Scholastic’s monopoly
body:
Here’s what we’re up against.

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z5u4uppgqg6sm5dkelpj0c9co9qui7fber9lje70_rp22sh2s8i6eo31cdh61p70c3h2bs "SkyTree Book Fairs")

Friend,

SkyTree Book Fair and I did a deep dive and discovered the cause of why sexually explicit and disgusting books get into our children's schools, classrooms, and libraries.

Here's what we're up against.

These are books Scholastic promotes at book fairs in schools. Here are pages from "Welcome to St. Hell," a 2022 Scholastic book glamorizing gender transitioning to middle schoolers. (We've censored these pages as the original content could violate social media policies against adult material):

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zer8r1ahs0525a86i783gv62nqj3kcb48s75kmr0_rp22sh2s8i6eo31cdh61p70c3h2bs)[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z5vr4mducg1uured0fdgb6dlt3moih6l8v1k51lo_rp22sh2s8i6eo31cdh61p70c3h2bs)

Scholastic holds a virtual monopoly on school book fairs. Like many of our cultural institutions in the last decade, Scholastic has fallen prey to the woke mob and radical LGBT political agenda.

Scholastic promotes this agenda over the well-being of our children.

**Here is the solution:**

SkyTree Book Fair offers schools a different option for book fairs. SkyTree Book Fairs is providing schools, parents, and children with an empowering alternative with literature rooted in truth and family values that matches the quality and ease of Scholastic while countering their harmful agenda.

Here's how you can help.

[I am asking for your urgent support to help SkyTree replace Scholastic in schools. Can you donate $35, $50, or even $100 today toward Sky Tree? We are kicking off with a goal to raise $100,000 this month.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z7qlggrmk3lvms5h44aa2dg7ua67qsb4hcburplo_rp22sh2s8i6eo31cdh61p70c3h2bs)

[Donate](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zj8huneoucmugjim1712v9ecft0r7ddjnfjtf79g_rp22sh2s8i6eo31cdh61p70c3h2bs)

SkyTree was inspired by my first children's book, As You Grow. Now, I am helping them spread to schools across the country as an alternative to Scholastic. And here's the thing: SkyTree will not only promote age-appropriate books, but they will do so more efficiently to make it easier for schools to choose SkyTree over Scholastic.

And it's working!

SkyTree has already secured its first public school book fair in Spotsylvania, VA!

No more race-infused storylines. No more confusing gender content. Only age-appropriate content that will nurture childhood innocence and character.

SkyTree needs your support today. American children need your support today!!

We are quickly lining up hundreds of new book fairs in the Spring semester. It costs roughly $7,500 to host a book fair. Please help sponsor SkyTree book fairs in schools across the country.

[Donate $10 >>](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2ze93p9h392fk476l9doveflb8uvqrdbqb51vsh5o_rp22sh2s8i6eo31cdh61p70c3h2bs)

[Donate $35 >>](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zcuddep8s5o485kjj3etb7hsv65v0sf6tk78cs9g_rp22sh2s8i6eo31cdh61p70c3h2bs)

[Donate $50 >>](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z9sbdg6qnba87qj9k9ehkjhffqmhc7d2gvkalkk0_rp22sh2s8i6eo31cdh61p70c3h2bs)

[Donate $100 >>](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zsq4av2218rttf7s9ifioe30c2fr5vk1aj796v58_rp22sh2s8i6eo31cdh61p70c3h2bs)

[Donate $250 >>](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zhqbpukosdfrr0m5kutaoehe9jonttlc8vk3ea08_rp22sh2s8i6eo31cdh61p70c3h2bs)

[Donate $500 >>](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zp6pb6tgnei7omnr77nukttjb77d9feutf4l9ci8_rp22sh2s8i6eo31cdh61p70c3h2bs)

[Donate $1,000 >>](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z6revlqpllrrs9l7qsbd0808lptjg7v52voqh9ro_rp22sh2s8i6eo31cdh61p70c3h2bs)

[Donate Any Amount >>](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zef7p4pda6d1qn8eoibba1ldrfr9ucsog7a0fmcg_rp22sh2s8i6eo31cdh61p70c3h2bs)

Let's bring back wholesome content to kids, like what we had growing up. Kids should remain innocent and have content to encourage their moral character while fostering their imagination.

It's not complicated! It's what you and I grew up with.

Thank you for helping us offer schools an alternative to Scholastic!

God bless,

Kirk Cameron

P.S. Scholastic's monopoly on school book fairs has ushered in woke and inappropriate books to kids across the nation.

I've partnered with SkyTree Book Fairs to give schools a positive alternative to scholastic.

[Help us raise $100,000 to fund book fairs this spring semester at schools. Click here to donate >>](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2ztqtkvofscbefa6d4e7oa5h4biick1isbdi9bg00_rp22sh2s8i6eo31cdh61p70c3h2bs)

A reminder of what we're up against:

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zvkjsparicv2uh7mvp7aqg2bk7ihqkd7sk2ido58_rp22sh2s8i6eo31cdh61p70c3h2bs)

It's time to fight back.

You and I cannot afford to do nothing and let the woke mob indoctrinate millions of children.

[Click here to donate and help SkyTree change the world.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zl3e60938lfa4avbtd4adf0mg0j132fdl9rirgkg_rp22sh2s8i6eo31cdh61p70c3h2bs)

body:

This movement isn't about me. **[It's about you, the American people.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zjome3t9jdd537i2rctdv3n6g4absbelrfq59hk0_rp22sh2s8i6eo31cdj64ob6c3h2bs)**

name: American Action News
subject: Survey on the Department of Justice
body:
The survey will only take a few moments of your time

This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zcgri9gcc5phckcuatukhnsecfra13v3glicju58_rp22sh2s8i6eo31cdj64ob3c3h2bs) Dear Friend, Before you move on to your next email--I would appreciate it if you would take a few moments to participate in Hillsdale College's **National Survey on the Department of Justice.** The survey will only take a few moments of your time, and its subject affects your liberty and the very survival of the rule of law in America. **The current administration 's weaponization of the Department of Justice is unprecedented in American history.** Instead of protecting your God-given constitutional rights, the administration uses the Department of Justice to attack its political opponents... ...as well as Christians, parents, and anyone who dares to stand up for our constitutional liberties. At the same time, with the help of the media it...
* Covers up a two-tiered justice system that violates your constitutional rights

* Hides the corruption of the ruling class

* Attacks those with traditional viewpoints

**That 's why I'm asking you to take the Hillsdale College National Survey on the Department of Justice.** By completing this survey, you will help us more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans like you on this critical issue. Your responses will help Hillsdale strengthen its nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--including the importance of the rule of law and checks and balances, which the American Founders saw as essential safeguards against corruption. Friend, you can complete the National Survey on the Department of Justice by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zerlsf8r7lt6dc9h420fnv0a0hur8fm5so1j3nlg_rp22sh2s8i6eo31cdj64ob3c3h2bs)** The **Declaration of Independence** argues that **the purpose of just government is to secure our natural rights** and that **just government is founded on the consent of the governed.** Yet today's ruling class regularly disregards the will of the American people, and our rights--to the freedoms of speech, assembly, and religion, to due process, to gun ownership, and more--are under constant attack. **You and I know that liberty in America is under serious threat. But as I travel around the country, I tell the audiences I speak to how we are engaging in the fight against this threat.** A vital part of our efforts in this fight--in which Hillsdale College is a leader--is **reaching** and **teaching** millions of citizens, with the TRUTH about America's great heritage of liberty. We are heavily invested in our educational outreach efforts through our **Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions.** These efforts include:
* **Teaching bright and principled students** --on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.--who receive a rigorous, **classical liberal arts education, including** a required course on the Constitution

* **Distributing _Imprimis_** , America's leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.4 million homes and businesses ten times per year; previous issues include "The Politicization of the Department of Justice" by Harmeet K. Dhillon

* **Producing and promoting free online courses** for any citizen who wishes to learn, on topics such as the Constitution, American history, and free market economics

* **Providing a classical K-12 curriculum** with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide

After everything we've seen over the past few years, the need for Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts is undeniable. So please share your views by completing our **National Survey on the Department of Justice** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. Your completed survey will help us form the most effective strategy to **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. As you might know, Hillsdale College is almost unique in American higher education in its refusal to accept EVEN ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. **This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. But it also means that our work depends entirely on the generous support of private citizens, like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.** If you agree that we are now seeing an unprecedented assault on the American way of life, I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the attached **National Survey on the Department of Justice** , which you can access at this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zba3jaajomin9qmcf4mi5ca0rjdk9ktp16vne3g8_rp22sh2s8i6eo31cdj64ob3c3h2bs)** Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to receiving your completed survey, and I sincerely appreciate your support of Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 |

| American Action News
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_

subject: FOX & Friends Features Breakthrough Solar Generator
body:
Demand Is Surging – 107,000 Americans Have Already Claimed Theirs...

# **FOX & Friends Features Breakthrough Solar Generator**
_**Demand Is Surging - 107,000 Americans Have Already Claimed Theirs...**_ [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zm1pbg5cqrv1aql5skp6c6sojtkr4pq11nk5apl8_rp22sh2s8i6eo31cdj62oj6chh2bs) FOX & Friends featured a breakthrough solar generator right before a "polar vortex" sent thousands of Americans into total darkness. Skip Bedell recommended it as the perfect gift to prepare for winter storms. **_And then BOOM!_** _**Demand surged and 4Patriots sold out.**_ Days later, a massive ice storm hit the nation. The folks who were fortunate enough to claim their silent, fume-free solar generator were thanking their lucky stars. Because despite power outages, rolling blackouts and bone-chilling temperatures... Those who acted fast and got their [**4Patriots solar generator**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zqn7grrg352ncsoqtgusand80ppj0mo40ctgbctg_rp22sh2s8i6eo31cdj62oj6chh2bs) had peace of mind and could power critical devices like lights, space heaters, communications, critical medical devices and even fridges and freezers. Sadly, those who didn't prepare were left to hope and pray the lights came back on soon. **But that's not why this generator is going viral...** **National Security Experts Fear Imminent Threat to Our Power Grid** Freak ice storms, hurricanes and raging wildfires aren't the only threat to our nation's crumbling power grid... Shockingly, in 2022 alone there were over 70 physical attacks on our nation's power grid! And even worse, attacks on just 9 of the nation's 55,000 electrical substations could trigger... **A nationwide blackout that could last up to 18 months!** Former CIA Director, James Woolsey, warned that an attack on America's infrastructure would, _"Blackout the national electric grid and other life-sustaining critical infrastructures for over a year. Killing 9 out of 10 Americans by starvation and societal collapse."_ Despite this clear and present danger... **Our Government is Woefully Unprepared** They ignore dire warnings from national security experts about our vulnerable power grid. Warnings of physical, electro-magnetic pulse (EMP) and cyberattacks... And who suffers because of their neglect? YOU and your family. **Imagine a blackout lasting not days, but weeks or months.** Your life would be frozen in time right at the moment your power fails. An entire country plunged into darkness. Without a generator, your fridge, electric range and microwave would be dead. All the food in your fridge and freezer - spoiled. Your well couldn't pump fresh water into your house. And even if you don't have a well, a total grid failure means no fresh water to drink, cook or clean with. This is not some crazy doomsday theory. It's a real threat. **That's why many Americans are taking matters into their own hands and are securing their own solar powered generator.** Solar generators are a smart choice because they produce an endless supply of life-saving electricity when you need it most - and **without gas, fumes or noise**. Our top recommendation in portable solar generators is the [**Patriot Power Generator**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z9fio8c0le7ll1v93e04l17uue66v84b3kfn1ha0_rp22sh2s8i6eo31cdj62oj6chh2bs). **THIS breakthrough solar generator is safe enough to use inside. And never needs gas, ever.** And you'll have peace of mind knowing that you and your family have a safe, reliable and easy-to-use source of backup power. To survive a blackout, storm, grid-down event... or worse. It's why the Patriot Power Generator was recently featured on **Fox & Friends**... **And why over 107,000 Americans already have it in their homes right now.** **Demand is surging...** _"It has a battery inside. You can charge it with electricity or - what's really cool - with a solar panel that comes with it for FREE."_ [**Click Here To See This Breakthrough Solar Generation In Action**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zm9vfusrjkh4vcf56qh2ot68tiid1inla6m12ci0_rp22sh2s8i6eo31cdj62oj6chh2bs)
