name: Your America
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us.

This sponsored message from Your America News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c38863%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=tAhX2p3z4GSE%2fnugEqVggg&sysid=1) Dear Fellow American,
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important.
To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled “The Second World Wars.”
Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c38864%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ZeRpIrdAxz9b3lxksrgktw&sysid=1) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.
Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of “**The Second World Wars** ” on DVD:
**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c38875%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=848sUKwU1rinUnw6S7kW8Q&sysid=1)**
Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College!
Best regards,
Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
---

body:
| | | | [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001fh7EgXLhDpkgFzVuxUNzPzMVHuPpV0NF3TPZ0vhpLdEHHzARkc7taFXJHnnRKy-UbmCtjQi1nxgmYOrNLKj-_sFEZkqKU6sHTIjwx_GB9aKm0zGszRBf4G41mdiZh9odHWQlgmvzceB0dRabCYwqWgtrR0O9gnTA8Fb2qWXkYylUp4axGyGNOMfSzDj-jFtIg4t4B3YFkGQDjzSuRFe9Fg==&c=kxb_8jQwwGUCFGJRwyGE5DcItaC447GeNnJM-IoaOaDZGAapvRKIZw==&ch=WkuHh5-6cnbQprsCkGZH-HGt8N3uWRJaB0CsedkNwwO05L3_Z7KXJw==)

| January 5, 2024
Friend,
Thank you for your continued support. We wanted to share some exciting news with you. We have decided to run for re-election to the Republican State Committee.
We will continue to be your conservative voice in the Massachusetts Republican Party. We will never cave to the establishment. The establishment knows this and that's why they recruited opponents against us.
That's why today we are asking for your support. Would you be willing to make a donation to our State Committee campaigns? You can make a donation by clicking here: [https://secure.winred.com/diehl-boss-for-state-committee/donate-today](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001fh7EgXLhDpkgFzVuxUNzPzMVHuPpV0NF3TPZ0vhpLdEHHzARkc7taFXJHnnRKy-UbmCtjQi1nxgmYOrNLKj-_sFEZkqKU6sHTIjwx_GB9aKm0zGszRBf4G41mdiZh9odHWQlgmvzceB0dRabCYwqWgtrR0O9gnTA8Fb2qWXkYylUp4axGyGNOMfSzDj-jFtIg4t4B3YFkGQDjzSuRFe9Fg==&c=kxb_8jQwwGUCFGJRwyGE5DcItaC447GeNnJM-IoaOaDZGAapvRKIZw==&ch=WkuHh5-6cnbQprsCkGZH-HGt8N3uWRJaB0CsedkNwwO05L3_Z7KXJw==)
State Committee campaigns are not governed by OCPF, and candidates can raise unlimited funds so anything you are willing to give would be greatly appreciated.
If you are unable to donate, please consider endorsing us, or volunteering with our race.
Together, we will win this fight, and we will continue fighting for you.
As always, thank you for your support.
Geoff Diehl and KathyJo Boss

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: REVEALED: What school book fairs are teaching children
body:
Here's what we're up against.

[](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=5e2a1352680944bb93a3facf9b9be909&_e=Uu62tPt_yQCIqxA0JsBUzCVMtI31snGxGX5U3nN8NLe47cIYhCbOQH-W5wv3GNPaVOiTlB_UUB9_AscQ6cEB00rzUhGU2y_IpKM_vrIMhZIXyaHAOLRXFyCX8xTfWg3X690h6wgzHcnV6CPoDOLDs_Oa2X5FeBe-isNkmrfeQQicHpCcrhwW-NYwUSvKTSQooNvsi1qk-4UTnpVg7QH23H2UeyhJDyJ862b5e5Z6qrxeq-yvgKh0HgPHjv8W9sB_ "SkyTree Book Fairs")

Friend,

SkyTree Book Fair and I did a deep dive and discovered the cause of why sexually explicit and disgusting books get into our children's schools, classrooms, and libraries.

Here's what we're up against.

These are books Scholastic promotes at book fairs in schools. Here are pages from "Welcome to St. Hell," a 2022 Scholastic book glamorizing gender transitioning to middle schoolers. (We've censored these pages as the original content could violate social media policies against adult material):

[](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=5e2a1352680944bb93a3facf9b9be909&_e=Uu62tPt_yQCIqxA0JsBUzCVMtI31snGxGX5U3nN8NLe47cIYhCbOQH-W5wv3GNPaVOiTlB_UUB9_AscQ6cEB00rzUhGU2y_IpKM_vrIMhZIxGmrwDsBo_6zKBegBroOzC8YlFt3PE-6njJdcZ4DFFIMlLrLekFnO5vWGKdPR2saRt9K6XIVSmIO-6HwfAQ4ED3tmVanKjkqRooYSrp4a-XSU4A3DIErfY2_zgVs1bXg07_ubWI1J9JwibHqDZEtu)[](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=5e2a1352680944bb93a3facf9b9be909&_e=Uu62tPt_yQCIqxA0JsBUzCVMtI31snGxGX5U3nN8NLe47cIYhCbOQH-W5wv3GNPaVOiTlB_UUB9_AscQ6cEB00rzUhGU2y_IpKM_vrIMhZL3GjVjTpkJPsrwM1kdanOW6iI4-Lead8LHm3WHmmRXQNFHvjK_vfY7u-9Ks8q5XwvxHnn8c-RtlKPxxpkYXzUaRovjbMkUzQUCGlhpd-rLmDZIw6kOyQPA2fv78WrLBiBVeJk0jD2N6iT6b9I3y4Lh)

Scholastic holds a virtual monopoly on school book fairs. Like many of our cultural institutions in the last decade, Scholastic has fallen prey to the woke mob and radical LGBT political agenda.

Scholastic promotes this agenda over the well-being of our children.

**Here is the solution:**

SkyTree Book Fair offers schools a different option for book fairs. SkyTree Book Fairs is providing schools, parents, and children with an empowering alternative with literature rooted in truth and family values that matches the quality and ease of Scholastic while countering their harmful agenda.

Here's how you can help.

[I am asking for your urgent support to help SkyTree replace Scholastic in schools. Can you donate $35, $50, or even $100 today toward Sky Tree? We are kicking off with a goal to raise $100,000 this month.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=5e2a1352680944bb93a3facf9b9be909&_e=Uu62tPt_yQCIqxA0JsBUzCVMtI31snGxGX5U3nN8NLe47cIYhCbOQH-W5wv3GNPaVOiTlB_UUB9_AscQ6cEB00rzUhGU2y_IpKM_vrIMhZKx646b9BDwMvLrLl-Wzx95YP_P-JvhwYyiolpHCTrMuAUWU7XM1lmPKQ9x8staCykmnqmhlvILbWhOXa1mfbxlTIUduHyHmzogPzIPytgOHtf97_L1EDIbs--CCVJWznfHESXZGgMUeUPIhSOoUoSt)

[Donate](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=5e2a1352680944bb93a3facf9b9be909&_e=Uu62tPt_yQCIqxA0JsBUzCVMtI31snGxGX5U3nN8NLe47cIYhCbOQH-W5wv3GNPaVOiTlB_UUB9_AscQ6cEB00rzUhGU2y_IpKM_vrIMhZLdEmqSTmzurlMvN73VhuCXJ_pwOFjdNFt8vNUjpUUy-UuyFxsCmSaNjIodyEglgJCuPgZLNbdLyYgCHG_TfQUgol5O832pg7yihoQ4tD4g__n2w1pXCFaz5CsdVF_QUVHWKtOh5SVJ88a81DAplaSt)

SkyTree was inspired by my first children's book, As You Grow. Now, I am helping them spread to schools across the country as an alternative to Scholastic. And here's the thing: SkyTree will not only promote age-appropriate books, but they will do so more efficiently to make it easier for schools to choose SkyTree over Scholastic.

And it's working!

SkyTree has already secured its first public school book fair in Spotsylvania, VA!

No more race-infused storylines. No more confusing gender content. Only age-appropriate content that will nurture childhood innocence and character.

SkyTree needs your support today. American children need your support today!!

We are quickly lining up hundreds of new book fairs in the Spring semester. It costs roughly $7,500 to host a book fair. Please help sponsor SkyTree book fairs in schools across the country.

name: Defend the Constitution
subject: FOX & Friends Features Breakthrough Solar Generator
body:
Demand Is Surging - 107,000 Americans Have Already Claimed Theirs...

# **FOX & Friends Features Breakthrough Solar Generator**
_**Demand Is Surging - 107,000 Americans Have Already Claimed Theirs...**_ [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=504faae469bd4eb3b67ecd112b33961f&_e=F0xcz5eb7WF2SVUPYo23_TsYYLK5wJO_ySGYwjNwOx0yE9mn_xl-7agzV6SyCyPsqWzyTHnYoh9Z6i-93htPJtXYa9FVIC50NMnYjICC8zZPSYdfUBcHe4vwELmCVNrSYaxhsb7RGsaXgZbaeYajvzrwHn6dxfQWc46zBNvY1Vw3CDTRteYc4tctOVRod95kCDvPazZ3Sop3kQkboczxK5Xaayk2awYAQHGZ1TBX50MWqBROLJWwE-lBUOyBeqAu7m7gv2tSeu-T7gscNHrpgugiXG_-OyhgEAq7dBDXibO0vbqHOFGZnNqUGnsLoAn7) FOX & Friends featured a breakthrough solar generator right before a "polar vortex" sent thousands of Americans into total darkness. Skip Bedell recommended it as the perfect gift to prepare for winter storms. **_And then BOOM!_** _**Demand surged and 4Patriots sold out.**_ Days later, a massive ice storm hit the nation. The folks who were fortunate enough to claim their silent, fume-free solar generator were thanking their lucky stars. Because despite power outages, rolling blackouts and bone-chilling temperatures... Those who acted fast and got their [**4Patriots solar generator**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=504faae469bd4eb3b67ecd112b33961f&_e=F0xcz5eb7WF2SVUPYo23_TsYYLK5wJO_ySGYwjNwOx0yE9mn_xl-7agzV6SyCyPsqWzyTHnYoh9Z6i-93htPJtXYa9FVIC50NMnYjICC8zZPSYdfUBcHe4vwELmCVNrSYaxhsb7RGsaXgZbaeYajv3fxDJyx_FIpYso5i3tz1YNfXQf5bXrInlAnYu1fFFN9NDNfJmQYmb1QUjvj4XBEodZtcGmJWSeeBhmLk0l7Zm5RD5Hom2-IRPaOV-UHfVoePQem07f5NU6DhJrLc6PUn1nD4aiXTdGKkkfPgbb4KFIX2I151qttdfOKTatQGtSF) had peace of mind and could power critical devices like lights, space heaters, communications, critical medical devices and even fridges and freezers. Sadly, those who didn't prepare were left to hope and pray the lights came back on soon. **But that's not why this generator is going viral...** **National Security Experts Fear Imminent Threat to Our Power Grid** Freak ice storms, hurricanes and raging wildfires aren't the only threat to our nation's crumbling power grid... Shockingly, in 2022 alone there were over 70 physical attacks on our nation's power grid! And even worse, attacks on just 9 of the nation's 55,000 electrical substations could trigger... **A nationwide blackout that could last up to 18 months!** Former CIA Director, James Woolsey, warned that an attack on America's infrastructure would, _"Blackout the national electric grid and other life-sustaining critical infrastructures for over a year. Killing 9 out of 10 Americans by starvation and societal collapse."_ Despite this clear and present danger... **Our Government is Woefully Unprepared** They ignore dire warnings from national security experts about our vulnerable power grid. Warnings of physical, electro-magnetic pulse (EMP) and cyberattacks... And who suffers because of their neglect? YOU and your family. **Imagine a blackout lasting not days, but weeks or months.** Your life would be frozen in time right at the moment your power fails. An entire country plunged into darkness. Without a generator, your fridge, electric range and microwave would be dead. All the food in your fridge and freezer - spoiled. Your well couldn't pump fresh water into your house. And even if you don't have a well, a total grid failure means no fresh water to drink, cook or clean with. This is not some crazy doomsday theory. It's a real threat. **That's why many Americans are taking matters into their own hands and are securing their own solar powered generator.** Solar generators are a smart choice because they produce an endless supply of life-saving electricity when you need it most - and **without gas, fumes or noise**. body:

Friend,

SkyTree Book Fair and I did a deep dive and discovered the cause of why sexually explicit and disgusting books get into our children's schools, classrooms, and libraries.

Here's what we're up against.

"SkyTree Book Fairs" Friend, SkyTree Book Fair and I did a deep dive and discovered the cause of why sexually explicit and disgusting books get into our children's schools, classrooms, and libraries. Here's what we're up against. These are books Scholastic promotes at book fairs in schools. Here are pages from "Welcome to St. Hell," a 2022 Scholastic book glamorizing gender transitioning to middle schoolers. (We've censored these pages as the original content could violate social media policies against adult material): Scholastic holds a virtual monopoly on school book fairs. Like many of our cultural institutions in the last decade, Scholastic has fallen prey to the woke mob and radical LGBT political agenda. Scholastic promotes this agenda over the well-being of our children. Here is the solution: SkyTree Book Fair offers schools a different option for book fairs. SkyTree Book Fairs is providing schools, parents, and children with an empowering alternative with literature rooted in truth and family values that matches the quality and ease of Scholastic while countering their harmful agenda. Here's how you can help. SkyTree was inspired by my first children's book, As You Grow. Now, I am helping them spread to schools across the country as an alternative to Scholastic. And here's the thing: SkyTree will not only promote age-appropriate books, but they will do so more efficiently to make it easier for schools to choose SkyTree over Scholastic. And it's working! SkyTree has already secured its first public school book fair in Spotsylvania, VA! No more race-infused storylines. No more confusing gender content. Only age-appropriate content that will nurture childhood innocence and character. SkyTree needs your support today. American children need your support today!! We are quickly lining up hundreds of new book fairs in the Spring semester. It costs roughly $7,500 to host a book fair. Please help sponsor SkyTree book fairs in schools across the country. - Let's bring back wholesome content to kids, like what we had growing up. Kids should remain innocent and have content to encourage their moral character while fostering their imagination. It's not complicated! It's what you and I grew up with. Thank you for helping us offer schools an alternative to Scholastic! God bless, Kirk Cameron P.S. Scholastic's monopoly on school book fairs has ushered in woke and inappropriate books to kids across the nation. I've partnered with SkyTree Book Fairs to give schools a positive alternative to scholastic. A reminder of what we're up against: It's time to fight back. body:
Demand Is Surging - 107,000 Americans Have Already Claimed Theirs...

# **FOX & Friends Features Breakthrough Solar Generator**
_**Demand Is Surging - 107,000 Americans Have Already Claimed Theirs...**_ [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=483f68d1fc8e49f7b58086a9512ad430&_e=G-tPsx5uJnMrdj9175JQGgfSJOBBP0-yWz0BjTsvz8w7stxnS4ge0RUqI1W5AO28LXpq0wxwIEtmQe2ozQ2ZysPFSjRQR7rb4-jI58IjJMoiS9B2l_3btFgNZAJhE_IyuWuSRhtUn8KzjcSJy2eC5-0d9MUPTMsNE_WIFBk_C3V3MIJZncMMUJEBJJqAx7oAywkEkt4Rdh9DNscm97ADl9uCPtDFlUw1iKZT9pFNRuJerRSN-1Hf_vJFoJY8cWfo_pmxmDwoNhVjMJ35Gc-KEFfuanMX9317X1wxgp2U7lA3HDVb5HDE2-zvz0vD9IuZ) FOX & Friends featured a breakthrough solar generator right before a "polar vortex" sent thousands of Americans into total darkness. Skip Bedell recommended it as the perfect gift to prepare for winter storms. **_And then BOOM!_** _**Demand surged and 4Patriots sold out.**_ Days later, a massive ice storm hit the nation. The folks who were fortunate enough to claim their silent, fume-free solar generator were thanking their lucky stars. Because despite power outages, rolling blackouts and bone-chilling temperatures... Those who acted fast and got their [**4Patriots solar generator**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=483f68d1fc8e49f7b58086a9512ad430&_e=G-tPsx5uJnMrdj9175JQGgfSJOBBP0-yWz0BjTsvz8w7stxnS4ge0RUqI1W5AO28LXpq0wxwIEtmQe2ozQ2ZysPFSjRQR7rb4-jI58IjJMoiS9B2l_3btFgNZAJhE_IyuWuSRhtUn8KzjcSJy2eC58SJudPyKoPP4jtVEzWuUONnvZh9x4QZxtAAi_CS7KUMNVg6KJ7jy22y25AHAxfZQP06s71JlOV76mPQ2ZVhui0clcyylVf-kf37Ua4I9ggI5QRCSWjjvoiiOFAJzPUHavekTTVUeukVWJe4x55EKzmS-Gd3lPt-C7xArZgvBidM) had peace of mind and could power critical devices like lights, space heaters, communications, critical medical devices and even fridges and freezers. Sadly, those who didn't prepare were left to hope and pray the lights came back on soon. **But that's not why this generator is going viral...** **National Security Experts Fear Imminent Threat to Our Power Grid** Freak ice storms, hurricanes and raging wildfires aren't the only threat to our nation's crumbling power grid... Shockingly, in 2022 alone there were over 70 physical attacks on our nation's power grid! And even worse, attacks on just 9 of the nation's 55,000 electrical substations could trigger... **A nationwide blackout that could last up to 18 months!** Former CIA Director, James Woolsey, warned that an attack on America's infrastructure would, _"Blackout the national electric grid and other life-sustaining critical infrastructures for over a year. Killing 9 out of 10 Americans by starvation and societal collapse."_ Despite this clear and present danger... **Our Government is Woefully Unprepared** They ignore dire warnings from national security experts about our vulnerable power grid. Warnings of physical, electro-magnetic pulse (EMP) and cyberattacks... And who suffers because of their neglect? YOU and your family. **Imagine a blackout lasting not days, but weeks or months.** Your life would be frozen in time right at the moment your power fails. An entire country plunged into darkness. Without a generator, your fridge, electric range and microwave would be dead. All the food in your fridge and freezer - spoiled. Your well couldn't pump fresh water into your house. And even if you don't have a well, a total grid failure means no fresh water to drink, cook or clean with. This is not some crazy doomsday theory. It's a real threat. **That's why many Americans are taking matters into their own hands and are securing their own solar powered generator.** Solar generators are a smart choice because they produce an endless supply of life-saving electricity when you need it most - and **without gas, fumes or noise**. Our top recommendation in portable solar generators is the [**Patriot Power Generator**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=483f68d1fc8e49f7b58086a9512ad430&_e=G-tPsx5uJnMrdj9175JQGgfSJOBBP0-yWz0BjTsvz8w7stxnS4ge0RUqI1W5AO28LXpq0wxwIEtmQe2ozQ2ZysPFSjRQR7rb4-jI58IjJMoiS9B2l_3btFgNZAJhE_IyuWuSRhtUn8KzjcSJy2eC51Ah-UGZy7kmhfoYfqoL7TAf6LLkaiWJZvQ3CaN36fXQCuQr2Tq4Xeptm9M9krz_zXock8ZK5Fkiis-HYNVilyMRUcDXD6_LbQkRNqC1wxInTRx0lKCL_8ZIWFozpeJt9-fThkw188q4XrrQ7QLT-2Hu_KAkpxwf9XAqWCd6iHFp). **THIS breakthrough solar generator is safe enough to use inside. And never needs gas, ever.** And you'll have peace of mind knowing that you and your family have a safe, reliable and easy-to-use source of backup power. To survive a blackout, storm, grid-down event... or worse. It's why the Patriot Power Generator was recently featured on **Fox & Friends**... **And why over 107,000 Americans already have it in their homes right now.** **Demand is surging...** _"It has a battery inside. You can charge it with electricity or - what's really cool - with a solar panel that comes with it for FREE."_ [**Click Here To See This Breakthrough Solar Generation In Action**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=483f68d1fc8e49f7b58086a9512ad430&_e=G-tPsx5uJnMrdj9175JQGgfSJOBBP0-yWz0BjTsvz8w7stxnS4ge0RUqI1W5AO28LXpq0wxwIEtmQe2ozQ2ZysPFSjRQR7rb4-jI58IjJMoiS9B2l_3btFgNZAJhE_IyuWuSRhtUn8KzjcSJy2eC5-G_lKGclmJLKM1RcJHwK6g2FdZHMEelzTGf5hSTFyJh7mdl697I2CGdrOm9rqj0f0rh6bkKBAKf_no0KaIJr17d_pJEcGcuT0y5wcc-HZ2NJ8LQ1eNwqp7PTzlpMxtiHyE0496CyLyA33Of-3-pMtqDFUvC8mcS7QOFDdrzlPw0)

FOX & Friends Features Breakthrough Solar Generator Demand Is Surging - 107,000 Americans Have Already Claimed Theirs... FOX & Friends featured a breakthrough solar generator right before a "polar vortex" sent thousands of Americans into total darkness. Skip Bedell recommended it as the perfect gift to prepare for winter storms. And then BOOM! Demand surged and 4Patriots sold out. Days later, a massive ice storm hit the nation. The folks who were fortunate enough to claim their silent, fume-free solar generator were thanking their lucky stars. Because despite power outages, rolling blackouts and bone-chilling temperatures... Those who acted fast and got their had peace of mind and could power critical devices like lights, space heaters, communications, critical medical devices and even fridges and freezers. Sadly, those who didn't prepare were left to hope and pray the lights came back on soon. But that's not why this generator is going viral... National Security Experts Fear Imminent Threat to Our Power Grid Freak ice storms, hurricanes and raging wildfires aren't the only threat to our nation's crumbling power grid... Shockingly, in 2022 alone there were over 70 physical attacks on our nation's power grid! And even worse, attacks on just 9 of the nation's 55,000 electrical substations could trigger... A nationwide blackout that could last up to 18 months! Former CIA Director, James Woolsey, warned that an attack on America's infrastructure would, "Blackout the national electric grid and other life-sustaining critical infrastructures for over a year. Killing 9 out of 10 Americans by starvation and societal collapse." Despite this clear and present danger... Our Government is Woefully Unprepared They ignore dire warnings from national security experts about our vulnerable power grid. Warnings of physical, electro-magnetic pulse (EMP) and cyberattacks... And who suffers because of their neglect? YOU and your family. Imagine a blackout lasting not days, but weeks or months. Your life would be frozen in time right at the moment your power fails. An entire country plunged into darkness. Without a generator, your fridge, electric range and microwave would be dead. All the food in your fridge and freezer - spoiled. Your well couldn't pump fresh water into your house. And even if you don't have a well, a total grid failure means no fresh water to drink, cook or clean with. This is not some crazy doomsday theory. It's a real threat. That's why many Americans are taking matters into their own hands and are securing their own solar powered generator. Solar generators are a smart choice because they produce an endless supply of life-saving electricity when you need it most - and without gas, fumes or noise. Our top recommendation in portable solar generators is the . THIS breakthrough solar generator is safe enough to use inside. And never needs gas, ever. And you'll have peace of mind knowing that you and your family have a safe, reliable and easy-to-use source of backup power. To survive a blackout, storm, grid-down event... or worse. It's why the Patriot Power Generator was recently featured on Fox & Friends... And why over 107,000 Americans already have it in their homes right now. Demand is surging... "It has a battery inside. You can charge it with electricity or - what's really cool - with a solar panel that comes with it for FREE." Freedom Nation Today 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 | _

name: Defend the Constitution
subject: Survey on the Department of Justice
body:
The survey will only take a few moments of your time

This sponsored message from Defend the Constitution is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c539550f210b472f8e902a6a3340fa36&_e=kxXorqNDY_p_BRkti50dL-FnI-VqilelFk8npOFKw5YOPy5vEI5RS4m4N4QJGlGq1UC_uUKRLXT6P3xc0xe76oe7lMv-Cu_DuRb93dbvkQUDl6vXy_hj4RiYc3001DnLwvPB8tEOg-Hlv6N4wwdZCbT1xLKgLPRqVK0HsowGh4L6mKT-8VLbbJysgHICATogj2rN0rvwkfIAJm8Sj1h9_5sLLhCawxtU0wX1yHSUXleTvEbRhKggOOBzOONsTaI1L9chIGcUpuFJhi3LODZIy6_4Qqu-fBgOBK2IxCz-t-JYAnOeka1h32mCXCta0t3z7LV6z0_spguQIR6lljSP1EOPscF03wK4quhfIaJC2hhW6ZXwvU5mGnvX68GVcYjh-p714Q013-uCfCa9CCHRHQ%3D%3D) Dear Friend, Before you move on to your next email--I would appreciate it if you would take a few moments to participate in Hillsdale College's **National Survey on the Department of Justice.** The survey will only take a few moments of your time, and its subject affects your liberty and the very survival of the rule of law in America. **The current administration 's weaponization of the Department of Justice is unprecedented in American history.** Instead of protecting your God-given constitutional rights, the administration uses the Department of Justice to attack its political opponents... ...as well as Christians, parents, and anyone who dares to stand up for our constitutional liberties. At the same time, with the help of the media it... Covers up a two-tiered justice system that violates your constitutional rights
Hides the corruption of the ruling class
Attacks those with traditional viewpoints **That 's why I'm asking you to take the Hillsdale College National Survey on the Department of Justice.** By completing this survey, you will help us more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans like you on this critical issue. Your responses will help Hillsdale strengthen its nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--including the importance of the rule of law and checks and balances, which the American Founders saw as essential safeguards against corruption. Friend, you can complete the National Survey on the Department of Justice by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c539550f210b472f8e902a6a3340fa36&_e=kxXorqNDY_p_BRkti50dL-FnI-VqilelFk8npOFKw5YOPy5vEI5RS4m4N4QJGlGq1UC_uUKRLXT6P3xc0xe76oe7lMv-Cu_DuRb93dbvkQUDl6vXy_hj4RiYc3001DnLwvPB8tEOg-Hlv6N4wwdZCbT1xLKgLPRqVK0HsowGh4L6mKT-8VLbbJysgHICATogj2rN0rvwkfIAJm8Sj1h9_5sLLhCawxtU0wX1yHSUXld7zcn1BEK71a7EIQfFZu2Y0uM-qJ9ax8LDwiApSEeZRvzsbB1juHrVubOEP2456h_JtMiwfeHJfQxH31pnnbropEbK1TQoDInw7V0M2P2XExL8SQXwSVLcB6PpM0r4miMdDYIh_JYIMdAmjl6mfoCqbw5uReuSqTDF3cAIGwRICA%3D%3D)** The **Declaration of Independence** argues that **the purpose of just government is to secure our natural rights** and that **just government is founded on the consent of the governed.** Yet today's ruling class regularly disregards the will of the American people, and our rights--to the freedoms of speech, assembly, and religion, to due process, to gun ownership, and more--are under constant attack. **You and I know that liberty in America is under serious threat. But as I travel around the country, I tell the audiences I speak to how we are engaging in the fight against this threat.** A vital part of our efforts in this fight--in which Hillsdale College is a leader--is **reaching** and **teaching** millions of citizens, with the TRUTH about America's great heritage of liberty. We are heavily invested in our educational outreach efforts through our **Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions.** These efforts include: **Teaching bright and principled students** --on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.--who receive a rigorous, **classical liberal arts education, including** a required course on the Constitution
**Distributing _Imprimis_** , America's leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.4 million homes and businesses ten times per year; previous issues include "The Politicization of the Department of Justice" by Harmeet K. Dhillon
**Producing and promoting free online courses** for any citizen who wishes to learn, on topics such as the Constitution, American history, and free market economics
**Providing a classical K-12 curriculum** with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide After everything we've seen over the past few years, the need for Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts is undeniable. So please share your views by completing our **National Survey on the Department of Justice** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. Your completed survey will help us form the most effective strategy to **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. As you might know, Hillsdale College is almost unique in American higher education in its refusal to accept EVEN ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. **This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. But it also means that our work depends entirely on the generous support of private citizens, like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.** If you agree that we are now seeing an unprecedented assault on the American way of life, I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the attached **National Survey on the Department of Justice** , which you can access at this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c539550f210b472f8e902a6a3340fa36&_e=kxXorqNDY_p_BRkti50dL-FnI-VqilelFk8npOFKw5YOPy5vEI5RS4m4N4QJGlGq1UC_uUKRLXT6P3xc0xe76oe7lMv-Cu_DuRb93dbvkQUDl6vXy_hj4RiYc3001DnLwvPB8tEOg-Hlv6N4wwdZCbT1xLKgLPRqVK0HsowGh4L6mKT-8VLbbJysgHICATogj2rN0rvwkfIAJm8Sj1h9_5sLLhCawxtU0wX1yHSUXlfbpGqIT30nBdjYoleoAi9eujzNGb_wsmQgHZUQ1YSCBzBUM141jaLsJwDDMi1hkHST_uQd6pCrLyfgzKj15ZNLxhPStJkvv90VTr1ICSFKDszfWXmv0-9qxhUfLO_dyMYh4wPpsabM9LpgY7E1ZgMAoLclaEGNvnzqC8E3ZfDRgg%3D%3D)** Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to receiving your completed survey, and I sincerely appreciate your support of Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 |

| Defend the Constitution
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_s=c539550f210b472f8e902a6a3340fa36&_t=ozYICWh1VIWRaCeCBnAUlobaBIG5hYD9bQqz1Kk5c8q8P0Lo7s7oLc78EFT0PjNFTv6fLhPiz2I4DxJ_avjjuleFQjcS0z0vJ8cMn99TTondlaaCe1Z5BZJ_9C4DNEGbDbxqMML0inwRySNThipUr-wCCIgpdTX_rKB7h7PjzGM%3D)

# **FOX & Friends Features Breakthrough Solar Generator**
_**Demand Is Surging - 107,000 Americans Have Already Claimed Theirs...**_ [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=17b8d8818f884eb883b8a7b2e42226c9&_e=Qc-H1UrqiRDsSHiKV2CLncxBmFpy1lf4iz2fNa5xXIq6n9nk7EsoBkapJqScTAfAVClt2IySQExYEYuQRt0CCKLYvAUgL0VW5ts23YIhk1hbTExK4XyPmNUaix4cIr2wMaDYl17ocTnMwL8d-LBWaM8Ei8w5HoFsBRpbWewFS0Liba58ULCt6hDxdTzvsrMvDc8SRMHQgFT5uQ5xjiBOuXqzURK93US97FbbGUPz1HQqmgZ3-TcDhIPQqjahuSvkQkkidXSPn6oO7N-uq62B8HYbKDGRwoJJbMqWXfwBw2y27AcJk8sBwXTjE_Z72eOC) FOX & Friends featured a breakthrough solar generator right before a "polar vortex" sent thousands of Americans into total darkness. name: Restore Our Nation
subject: Survey on the Department of Justice
body:
The survey will only take a few moments of your time
188d92cdddd40f90da47bc74ea2ba8fb
This sponsored message from Restore Our Nation is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/vGO2ACinOSuw1yNuGzLASA~~/AARclAA~/RgRnfT6CP0SoaHR0cHM6Ly9scC5oaWxsc2RhbGUuZWR1L2RlcGFydG1lbnQtb2YtanVzdGljZS1zdXJ2ZXkvP3NjPTAxMDQwTjAyNDJMMEFET0RFRVMmdXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wcm9zcGVjdGluZyZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1kb2pzdXJ2ZXkmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9UEEtUk9OLTIwMjQwMTA3VwNzcGNCCmWYdo-aZdvAN4RSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA) Dear Friend, Before you move on to your next email--I would appreciate it if you would take a few moments to participate in Hillsdale College's **National Survey on the Department of Justice.** The survey will only take a few moments of your time, and its subject affects your liberty and the very survival of the rule of law in America. **The current administration 's weaponization of the Department of Justice is unprecedented in American history.** Instead of protecting your God-given constitutional rights, the administration uses the Department of Justice to attack its political opponents... ...as well as Christians, parents, and anyone who dares to stand up for our constitutional liberties. At the same time, with the help of the media it...
* Covers up a two-tiered justice system that violates your constitutional rights

* Hides the corruption of the ruling class

* Attacks those with traditional viewpoints

**That 's why I'm asking you to take the Hillsdale College National Survey on the Department of Justice.** By completing this survey, you will help us more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans like you on this critical issue. Your responses will help Hillsdale strengthen its nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--including the importance of the rule of law and checks and balances, which the American Founders saw as essential safeguards against corruption. Friend, you can complete the National Survey on the Department of Justice by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/vGO2ACinOSuw1yNuGzLASA~~/AARclAA~/RgRnfT6CP0SoaHR0cHM6Ly9scC5oaWxsc2RhbGUuZWR1L2RlcGFydG1lbnQtb2YtanVzdGljZS1zdXJ2ZXkvP3NjPTAxMDQwTjAyNDJMMEFET0RFRVMmdXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wcm9zcGVjdGluZyZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1kb2pzdXJ2ZXkmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9UEEtUk9OLTIwMjQwMTA3VwNzcGNCCmWYdo-aZdvAN4RSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)** The **Declaration of Independence** argues that **the purpose of just government is to secure our natural rights** and that **just government is founded on the consent of the governed.** Yet today's ruling class regularly disregards the will of the American people, and our rights--to the freedoms of speech, assembly, and religion, to due process, to gun ownership, and more--are under constant attack. **You and I know that liberty in America is under serious threat. But as I travel around the country, I tell the audiences I speak to how we are engaging in the fight against this threat.** A vital part of our efforts in this fight--in which Hillsdale College is a leader--is **reaching** and **teaching** millions of citizens, with the TRUTH about America's great heritage of liberty. We are heavily invested in our educational outreach efforts through our **Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions.** These efforts include:
* **Teaching bright and principled students** --on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.--who receive a rigorous, **classical liberal arts education, including** a required course on the Constitution

* **Distributing _Imprimis_** , America's leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.4 million homes and businesses ten times per year; previous issues include "The Politicization of the Department of Justice" by Harmeet K. Dhillon

* **Producing and promoting free online courses** for any citizen who wishes to learn, on topics such as the Constitution, American history, and free market economics

* **Providing a classical K-12 curriculum** with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide

After everything we've seen over the past few years, the need for Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts is undeniable. So please share your views by completing our **National Survey on the Department of Justice** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. Your completed survey will help us form the most effective strategy to **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. As you might know, Hillsdale College is almost unique in American higher education in its refusal to accept EVEN ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. **This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. But it also means that our work depends entirely on the generous support of private citizens, like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.** If you agree that we are now seeing an unprecedented assault on the American way of life, I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the attached **National Survey on the Department of Justice** , which you can access at this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/vGO2ACinOSuw1yNuGzLASA~~/AARclAA~/RgRnfT6CP0SoaHR0cHM6Ly9scC5oaWxsc2RhbGUuZWR1L2RlcGFydG1lbnQtb2YtanVzdGljZS1zdXJ2ZXkvP3NjPTAxMDQwTjAyNDJMMEFET0RFRVMmdXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wcm9zcGVjdGluZyZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1kb2pzdXJ2ZXkmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9UEEtUk9OLTIwMjQwMTA3VwNzcGNCCmWYdo-aZdvAN4RSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)** Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to receiving your completed survey, and I sincerely appreciate your support of Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 |

| Restore Our Nation
---

body:

name: Andy Kim
subject: I refuse to believe that my kids are doomed to grow up in a broken, divided America
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[ unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T395d0e7e-f7f4-4d6c-90d5-7998d3cfe72f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, Yesterday, we reflected on the events of January 6. **Today, we’re looking forward to working on unifying our country and creating a nation that our children can be proud to grow up in.** Look, I don't want to keep living through history. I'd rather be able to take my kids to swim lessons or build the Lego Millennium Falcon, but this is just the moment that we're in. I refuse to believe that my kids are doomed to grow up in a broken, divided America. I want to help build a future where we can look at our kids and their kids and tell them that this is a country where I can guarantee that you will have a better life and more opportunities than we do. That's what I want. It’s why I’m committed to doing everything I can to get our country back on track. And if I believe that in my heart the question then is, what am I going to do about it? **My answer to that is that I'm going to be the next U.S. Senator from New Jersey.** [**Will you join our movement today by splitting a donation between my campaign and Blue Amp Action to help us win this race for the future?**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T949842d9-37fa-4b34-9332-bad444ac769a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) I’m running a different kind of campaign because that’s what the people of New Jersey want right now. People are sick and tired of division, partisan fights, and attacks on our democracy. Our campaign is about bringing in regular New Jerseyans, regular Americans, engaging with them about what’s on their minds, and figuring out how to earn their support. I’ve heard from a lot of people that say they’re tired of the business-as-usual for politics. They’re tired of political insiders chasing power, while ignoring the people they’re supposed to serve. **It doesn’t have to be this way, Peter. We’re building this campaign to show that we can do things differently,** that we can have a different kind of politics and we can restore trust in our democracy. It’s up to us to be caretakers for our democracy. That’s why I’m running for Senate. [**We need to restore confidence in our representation and New Jersey, and I’m running to be that representative. Will you join us in fighting for a better Washington by splitting a donation of $20 between my campaign and Blue Amp Action now?**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc5fab384-19cd-4774-9ad9-9561f9aee79a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | | | [DONATE NOW](https://default.salsalabs.org/T362a036a-593d-4d2d-9fc3-534aa8196561/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | We deserve something better. More soon, _Andy_
---
|
---
|
---
| | |
---
| | |
---
| | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good
---|---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country.
---
|
---
| | Follow Us | [](https://twitter.com/intent/follow?screen_name=cliffschecter) | [](https://linkedin.com/in/cliffschecter-0873a448/)
---|---
| **Blue Amp Strategies**
1776 Mentor Ave. #411 | Norwood, Ohio 45212
513.438.0171 | info@blueampaction.com
---
| Having trouble viewing this email? [View it in your web browser](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/baa_em_op_andykim24010717?wvpId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [Unsubscribe](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/manage-your-subscription?eId=1710d879-f586-4998-ac97-53347c709a8a&eType=EmailBlastContent&sId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) or [Manage Your Preferences](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/manage-your-subscription?eId=1710d879-f586-4998-ac97-53347c709a8a&eType=EmailBlastContent&sId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

name: Charlie Kirk, TPUSA Faith
subject: Equip The Church With TPUSA Faith
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | | | [](http://trk.libertyledger.-p6m04L-GmncYlsAiGfw8Q)
---
Fellow American% We’re living in a pivotal time. In many ways we are witnessing the dystopian nightmare of a culture moving further from Jesus -- not closer to Jesus. **_As believers in Biblical truth, we need to speak up to current Western civilization and all of humanity!_** To help equip Pastors and congregations to put our Christian faith into action, TPUSA Faith hosts **_Freedom Night in America_**. Through this monthly series, a guest speaker joins me to engage in discussions around topics such as sexuality, gender, and family life. **[Freedom Night in America is on a mission to strengthen the church and fight for liberty — which is God’s idea, not man’s idea. Will you support our Freedom Night series with your gift of $35, $50, $100, $250, or $500 today?](http://trk.libertyledger.)**
---
[Support Freedom Night in America ](http://trk.libertyledger._6Neg)
---
[](http://trk.libertyledger.)
---
**_God’s Word is the ultimate truth._** But radicals who bow at the altar of “wokeism” disagree. Gov. Gavin Newsome may soon sign legislation that would allow the government to take children away from parents who oppose their “gender transition.” Congregants at the Cathedral of Hope Protestant Church in Dallas, TX were led in a prayer pledging allegiance to drag queens and the LGBTQ+ movement. This is blasphemy. **But there is hope!** Thousands of American churches are aligned with TPUSA Faith’s mission to restore Biblical values, but they currently lack both engagement and opportunities to make a positive political and cultural change in our nation. **[Your gift of $35 or more will support TPUSA Faith in securing speakers for Freedom Night in America who stand for Biblical truth and will empower Pastors and churches to put their faith into action.](http://trk.libertyledger.)**
---
[](http://trk.libertyledger.--XGDw)
---
Christians founded this country, Fellow American%. Fifty-five of the 56 signers of the Declaration of Independence were Bible-believing, church-attending Christians. They applied biblical principles and wisdom in the founding of our great nation, and for nearly 250 years, our country has experienced the blessings of liberty in abundance. But today, those biblical principles are under constant attack by decadent, humanistic, and amoral movements -- and if we don’t defend the foundational truths that have made our nation great, we’re going to reap the consequences. As the inheritors of the Founding Fathers’ vision, it’s our turn to own our faith and stand up for Biblical truth. Resistance to tyranny is Biblical, and we must speak up! **[With your generous support today, TPUSA Faith will continue reaching, engaging, and equipping Christians to share their faith and to be bold in the public arena on behalf of Biblical principles.](http://trk.libertyledger.)** Thank you for your support! God bless you, Charlie KirkTurning Point USA Faith
---
[](http://trk.libertyledger.)
---
[Support Turning Point USA Faith](http://trk.libertyledger._PFLxllA_Q-nCq7DH4IAlw)
---
4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044
---

Box 455 Leesburg, VA 20178 If you no longer wish to receive sponsored promotional emails from us [_click here_](http://trk.libertyledger.com/uu/3/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM1MjE2Mjk1NiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjI0MDA3LWVkOGQ2ZDI0MjVhYjRmYTg5MjA1YWRiOWE5MDFmMjEzIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlfQ/TqUZxj1dyp6Vb3ta_gVakA) to unsubscribe.

presidential election on the 13th. “Correct choice”? China’s regime is
not happy.

really don’t expect the industry to gain much traction with
policymakers during the coming 12 months.

‘Marked For Death’: Here’s How Israel Plans To Hunt Down Hamas
Terrorists Across The Globe

http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zvgbjk4objqte6fo4c1pkug6stjp6ium4r8b4jeo_rp22sh2s8i6eo31cdgm1pr4clh238h5e8he485he5o7csn7kui3bd9ieir38cti69qbacpkmerj79hnmmrqbd1ieqqj2dd36up7b89l6gon1dd0mkp7adjlk2rretd4mpp78d9hmmg73d1jmpqq2ttlk2qn7cblk4rrestlk2q3bd1memgnacjieup79djhepqq8dhieur7ctd1e2qjb9phmup3adt24no

http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z1ve5dtq82svmu59gevatnssq3mb9s1rptbb3bh8_rp22sh2s8i6eo31cdgm1pr4clh238h5e8he485he5o7csn7kui3bd9ieir38cti69qbacpkmerj79hnmmrqbd1ieqqj2dd36up7b89l6gon1dd0mkp7adjlk2rretd4mpp78d9hmmg73d1jmpqq2ttlk2qn7cblk4rrestlk2q3bd1memgnacjieup79djhepqq8dhieur7ctd1e2qjb9phmup3adt24no

Israel plans to eliminate Hamas leaders around the world, and the
country’s long history of carrying out such operations against
terrorists proves its capability to do so, foreign policy and defense

subject: Left-Wing Billionaires Have A New Plan Up Their Sleeves In War On Fossil Fuels
body:
And Could This Crucial Election Lead China To Invade Taiwan?

https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c689454%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ojOSkOlF%2fqLH7RBeDrC0GA&sysid=1 Left-Wing Billionaires Have A New Plan Up Their Sleeves In War On Fossil Fuels

A few days ago I wrote on Substack about my set of nine energy-related predictions for 2024. Those predictions touched on various parts of the energy space, including coal, electric vehicles, renewable energy and oil and gas. I didn’t touch on nuclear energy, mainly because I really don’t expect the industry to gain much traction with policymakers during the coming 12 months.

“Taiwan compatriots must stand on the right side of history, and make a correct choice to promote cross-strait relations back to the right track of peaceful development,” Zhang Zhijun, a senior Chinese official, said on the 3rd of this month, referring to the island’s presidential election on the 13th. “Correct choice”? China’s regime is not happy.

The Department of Defense (DOD) failed to notify the White House about Defense Secretary Lloyd Austin’s hospitalization for four days, according to several reports. Austin was admitted to Walter Reed hospital in Washington, D.C., on Monday for a medical issue related to an elective procedure he underwent, reportedly ending up in the intensive care unit for several days, according to NBC News and Politico.

Here at the 1776 Project PAC, we closed out 2023 with a long list of incredible accomplishments. We won over 100 school board races in battleground districts across the country. We flipped school board control from liberal to conservative in 11 districts and kept the majority seven others.
[DONATE](https://substack.com/redirect/ecf7bb4d-f9fb-4cfe-ad53-cc6d5d1d5956?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
**OUR WINS GET RESULTS**
And these wins are delivering major reforms to protect students and their families.
For example, last month, the Lansing School Board in Kansas [voted](https://substack.com/redirect/1cfc200c-7317-4daa-a450-4402dbb87e61?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to prohibit teachers from inflicting pronoun theater in the classroom by banning the use of different pronouns for students without parental notification. This is a district we flipped back in 2021 and made even more gains in 2023.
In Miami-Dade County, the school board this year unveiled a plan [to implement ](https://substack.com/redirect/733ff554-5c16-4ed8-95b9-35273f7e8287?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)classical education that's "back to the basics" and focuses on Western European and Judeo-Christian principles.
And in the Perkiomen Valley School District in Montgomery County, PA, the school board [voted](https://substack.com/redirect/9c988bb6-820e-46a8-8014-81d9bf5f5aff?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to reject gender identity delusion and keep a policy that requires students and staff to use the bathrooms of their biological sex.
This is just a small sample of the major policy wins our school board victories are delivering for their districts. And there will be much more to come in 2024.
[DONATE](https://substack.com/redirect/ecf7bb4d-f9fb-4cfe-ad53-cc6d5d1d5956?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
**WE 'RE JUST GETTING STARTED**
The work we 're doing matters more than ever. Because not only do we get top candidates elected -- but once they're in office, they deliver on their biggest promises.
And like we always say, our work to restore sanity in the classroom and defeat far-left indoctrination is only getting started.
Because [even in red states](https://substack.com/redirect/d2ac872e-d5ae-4958-8f47-e7a63122d462?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) like Texas, far-left socialists are trying to pull one bait and switch after another, claiming to care about improving education while poisoning school curriculum with anti-capitalist and anti-American hate.
These radicals don't care about improving educational opportunities. They care about preserving their own power.
[In Chicago](https://substack.com/redirect/170dc584-e650-485c-ac76-53a7a4c93808?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), the board of education recently passed a resolution to abandon school choice initiatives to address so-called "structural racism."
Of course, we all know what this is really about: an effort to bolster the power of teachers unions, downplay the importance of merit, and strip away one of the city's best ways of helping working families build a stronger future for their children.
And add to this the influx of illegal immigrants who are [straining resources](https://substack.com/redirect/8f751011-58e7-4a87-afe1-7be762806e2f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and burdening schools across the country, creating a perfect storm for a complete and total breakdown of our nation's schools.
**UPCOMING ELECTION DAYS IN KEY STATES AND OUR MISSION FOR 2024**
In the new year, we're committed to protecting and expanding our majorities in Texas and Florida, and unleashing a red wave in states like New York and New Jersey.
And in states like Arizona, we're building major initiatives to increase voter turnout.
The states below will be especially critical in our path to success:
ALABAMA: MARCH 5
TEXAS: MAY 4
MARYLAND: MAY 14
NEW JERSEY: JUNE 4
NEW YORK: JUNE 25
ARIZONA: AUGUST 6
FLORIDA: AUGUST 24
Because the far-left madness must stop.
We must put Americans first.
We must cripple the power of teachers unions.
We must bring patriotism back into the classroom.
We must destroy the indoctrination agenda.
And with your help, we'll get the job done this year and in the years to come.
[DONATE](https://substack.com/redirect/ecf7bb4d-f9fb-4cfe-ad53-cc6d5d1d5956?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

Of course, we all know what this is really about: an effort to bolster the power of teachers unions, downplay the importance of merit, and strip away one of the city's best ways of helping working families build a stronger future for their children. And add to this the influx of illegal immigrants who are and burdening schools across the country, creating a perfect storm for a complete and total breakdown of our nation's schools. UPCOMING ELECTION DAYS IN KEY STATES AND OUR MISSION FOR 2024 In the new year, we're committed to protecting and expanding our majorities in Texas and Florida, and unleashing a red wave in states like New York and New Jersey. And in states like Arizona, we're building major initiatives to increase voter turnout. The states below will be especially critical in our path to success: ALABAMA: MARCH 5 TEXAS: MAY 4 MARYLAND: MAY 14 NEW JERSEY: JUNE 4 NEW YORK: JUNE 25 ARIZONA: AUGUST 6 FLORIDA: AUGUST 24 Because the far-left madness must stop. We must put Americans first. We must cripple the power of teachers unions. We must bring patriotism back into the classroom. We must destroy the indoctrination agenda. And with your help, we'll get the job done this year and in the years to come. 1776's Newsletter is free today. But if you enjoyed this post, you can tell 1776's Newsletter that their writing is valuable by pledging a future subscription. You won't be charged unless they enable payments. | | | | | | | (C) 2024 1776 Project PAC 548 Market Street PMB 72296, San Francisco, CA 94104 ? ?

name: Hillsdale College via Conservatives Give
subject: Survey on the Department of Justice
body:
The survey will only take a few moments of your time

This sponsored message from Conservatives Give is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=29446d48f37045ca853e188bc8ae6662&_e=VA0BkCL5EoF1Mw2rVaQbtsP_zkTUgqOgBR_SjP-odHxfMTRPm7hISIFgyAQBo2j5QD0GKA7ZBAh_n_P9AT3xrprLSJEg1jF052I02IpHvtFNLJOf9u_T36z2j0MeeYemC2-cn9PuIl-XIFKXM9vAKFU18VvjkzIZjzZyeDa_lKyea68go-A2oXXmLxjIBKfTy72KriQQ4MAxIuESdiybq9L4splW-_9nEwq8BPbm7S8VUkk5JAgLuDIdhkZEdBI7GJstCVnVRhinz5kj2m2ErdQV0XMyWN-Frc10moH1u4zKmP6pht8fQMFYCL6dzuvvWItjeS5dyH2ljJNtE7hQTKXDJZcCDgKAv0QvpIazLXR18xM3iWD_9vwQ3pjM9rJcTFFZgaVZIGx-fjEIlS5iUw%3D%3D) Dear Friend, Before you move on to your next email--I would appreciate it if you would take a few moments to participate in Hillsdale College's **National Survey on the Department of Justice.** The survey will only take a few moments of your time, and its subject affects your liberty and the very survival of the rule of law in America. **The current administration 's weaponization of the Department of Justice is unprecedented in American history.** Instead of protecting your God-given constitutional rights, the administration uses the Department of Justice to attack its political opponents... ...as well as Christians, parents, and anyone who dares to stand up for our constitutional liberties. At the same time, with the help of the media it... Covers up a two-tiered justice system that violates your constitutional rights
Hides the corruption of the ruling class
Attacks those with traditional viewpoints **That 's why I'm asking you to take the Hillsdale College National Survey on the Department of Justice.** By completing this survey, you will help us more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans like you on this critical issue. Your responses will help Hillsdale strengthen its nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--including the importance of the rule of law and checks and balances, which the American Founders saw as essential safeguards against corruption. Friend, you can complete the National Survey on the Department of Justice by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=29446d48f37045ca853e188bc8ae6662&_e=VA0BkCL5EoF1Mw2rVaQbtsP_zkTUgqOgBR_SjP-odHxfMTRPm7hISIFgyAQBo2j5QD0GKA7ZBAh_n_P9AT3xrprLSJEg1jF052I02IpHvtFNLJOf9u_T36z2j0MeeYemC2-cn9PuIl-XIFKXM9vAKFU18VvjkzIZjzZyeDa_lKyea68go-A2oXXmLxjIBKfTy72KriQQ4MAxIuESdiybq9L4splW-_9nEwq8BPbm7S8Q4aCSkcMAqHqQWIVVYbajWvPPmIJzuYmoYz0RUSPTnjAflRjsuTN6SIoCONNxaOI9la0I09CiwWoF_8P99KDn6E2QrBJh--WralMNl3GEmDxm9dlIr287qJKWxP4YQD0hPI_A3Dp88yhuBqqkli4e_pgA4h-0bBbtt58pi_MfNg%3D%3D)** The **Declaration of Independence** argues that **the purpose of just government is to secure our natural rights** and that **just government is founded on the consent of the governed.** Yet today's ruling class regularly disregards the will of the American people, and our rights--to the freedoms of speech, assembly, and religion, to due process, to gun ownership, and more--are under constant attack. **You and I know that liberty in America is under serious threat. But as I travel around the country, I tell the audiences I speak to how we are engaging in the fight against this threat.** A vital part of our efforts in this fight--in which Hillsdale College is a leader--is **reaching** and **teaching** millions of citizens, with the TRUTH about America's great heritage of liberty. We are heavily invested in our educational outreach efforts through our **Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions.** These efforts include: **Teaching bright and principled students** --on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.--who receive a rigorous, **classical liberal arts education, including** a required course on the Constitution
**Distributing _Imprimis_** , America's leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.4 million homes and businesses ten times per year; previous issues include "The Politicization of the Department of Justice" by Harmeet K. Dhillon
**Producing and promoting free online courses** for any citizen who wishes to learn, on topics such as the Constitution, American history, and free market economics
**Providing a classical K-12 curriculum** with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide After everything we've seen over the past few years, the need for Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts is undeniable. So please share your views by completing our **National Survey on the Department of Justice** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. Your completed survey will help us form the most effective strategy to **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. As you might know, Hillsdale College is almost unique in American higher education in its refusal to accept EVEN ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. **This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. But it also means that our work depends entirely on the generous support of private citizens, like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.** If you agree that we are now seeing an unprecedented assault on the American way of life, I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the attached **National Survey on the Department of Justice** , which you can access at this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=29446d48f37045ca853e188bc8ae6662&_e=VA0BkCL5EoF1Mw2rVaQbtsP_zkTUgqOgBR_SjP-odHxfMTRPm7hISIFgyAQBo2j5QD0GKA7ZBAh_n_P9AT3xrprLSJEg1jF052I02IpHvtFNLJOf9u_T36z2j0MeeYemC2-cn9PuIl-XIFKXM9vAKFU18VvjkzIZjzZyeDa_lKyea68go-A2oXXmLxjIBKfTy72KriQQ4MAxIuESdiybq9L4splW-_9nEwq8BPbm7S-Uerk8Wt4JKcyrrOr_7Sef7CU7MLXFvmuDkRc2G0rHxasiO9XT0pr614vGiNZnnqgrUanycB32X5i2LJ3rbAUDFklG_8IiwIU6nF3nAvijAsOOAb3IhfHTsZ2ZxqZj_C5CsXHaKFcm-5NhEvisH7dRNrf1C5pB2qVfuLXWKZmB3g%3D%3D)** Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to receiving your completed survey, and I sincerely appreciate your support of Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 |

| Conservatives Give
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_

name: Officer Harry Dunn (ret.)
subject: January 6th, 2021
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
#

[](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-dunn.SH4loA&refcode=em240107-1-30&t=1&akid=1672%2E734936%2EDKMOby)
Peter – My name is Harry Dunn and three years ago, I defended the U.S. Capitol and our nation’s leaders against a violent insurrection.
_Since that day, I vowed to help ensure that never happens again._
**That’s why I’m officially running for Congress in MD-03 to be the change I want to see for our country and our democracy.[I’d be honored for you to join me and Ruben Gallego in jump starting this campaign by chipping in a split donation of $25 or anything you can: **](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-dunn.SH4loA&refcode=em240107-1-30&t=2&akid=1672%2E734936%2EDKMOby)
[BECOME A FOUNDING DONOR: CHIP IN $25 >>](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-dunn.SH4loA&refcode=em240107-1-30&t=3&akid=1672%2E734936%2EDKMOby)
For the last sixteen years, I was a police officer for the United States Capitol where I saw millions of people visit to exercise their rights and lobby their representatives.
_And trust me, every political agenda you can think of walked through those doors._
It didn’t matter to me if you were there as a Democrat, Republican, or Independent though, because my job was the same - protect our elected officials and ensure everyone could safely participate in our democracy.
But three years ago, under the Capitol Rotunda that took my breath away each day, I was immersed in a profane mix of sweat, screams, shrieks, anger, death, fear, blood, broken limbs, spit, hatred, horror, racism, bigotry, and heroism for what felt like endless hours alongside fellow officers.
It was unlike anything we had seen before. Sure, there were heated political moments over the years. But this was different.
It was pepper spray, bear spray, and even WD-40 to our faces as we fought back rioters in tactical gear using anything they could as a weapon. It was disorienting chaos as we tried to block every entrance while our elected leaders and capitol staff ran to safety. **It was a direct attack on our democracy.**
Many people have tried to deny what happened that day – including some of the same people who stood behind us as we protected them. They’ve diluted the story and muddied the facts to preserve their own political agenda.
So I’ve made it a personal mission to share my story, speak truth to power, and work to ensure this _never_ happens again. That’s why a few weeks ago, I retired from the police force, and why I announced my campaign to run for Congress in Maryland’s Third Congressional District.
**I’m running because Maryland deserves a Congressman who will put the country above their party, and put the constitution above themselves.[This will be a competitive race, so I’ve set an ambitious goal to raise $500,000 within the first few days of my campaign. Will you chip in to become a Founding Donor and help hit our goal before midnight? **](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-dunn.SH4loA&refcode=em240107-1-30&t=4&akid=1672%2E734936%2EDKMOby)
[BECOME A FOUNDING DONOR: CHIP IN $25 >>](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-dunn.SH4loA&refcode=em240107-1-30&t=5&akid=1672%2E734936%2EDKMOby)
Thank you for reading,
Harry Dunn

Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform do not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Emails like this are a critical tool for our campaign's fundraising and organizing efforts. If you'd like to receive only the most important emails going forward, [tell us at this link](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/signup/fewer_emails/?source=fewer-emails&t=6&akid=1672%2E734936%2EDKMOby). Or, if you need to, you can [unsubscribe here](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=7&akid=1672%2E734936%2EDKMOby). If you would like to support Ruben's campaign for Senate, please consider [making a donation today.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ruben-em-footer?refcode=em-footer&t=8&refcode2=1672_734936_DKMOby&akid=1672%2E734936%2EDKMOby)

They’ve diluted the story and muddied the facts to preserve their own political agenda. So I’ve made it a personal mission to share my story, speak truth to power, and work to ensure this never happens again. That’s why a few weeks ago, I retired from the police force, and why I announced my campaign to run for Congress in Maryland’s Third Congressional District. I’m running because Maryland deserves a Congressman who will put the country above their party, and put the constitution above themselves. Thank you for reading, Harry Dunn Paid For By Gallego for Arizona Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform do not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20Editors=20at=20Broad=20+=20Liberty?=
subject: B+L Weekly Reads: Will the GOP Become a Permanent Minority? | Delco Prison Staff Morale at 'All-Time Low' + More ⚡🔔
body:
News + editorial to start your week. | | | |
---
| | |
### __Broad + Liberty's_ Weekly Reads:_
---
| [ ](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=d910d54e7b&e=b7b3eddce2)
---
| _**From the Editors: Democrats’ polling project shows how much Republicans have yet to learn.**_
---
| It’s well-known that Democrats have an advantage with big money donors. But Republicans are also falling behind in another way as Pennsylvania Dems have built up **institutional structures that the state GOP cannot match**. Their polling operation provides a much needed service to individual campaigns, while Republicans are flying blind. If they can’t match Democratic efforts, they’ll make themselves a **permanent minority** in state politics. [Read more at _Broad + Liberty_.](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=2999a6c891&e=b7b3eddce2)
---
|
---
|
### _Other Top Stories..._
---
|
---
| | [ ](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=868bce0a0a&e=b7b3eddce2)
---
Prison officials tell Delaware county council that [morale is at an all-time low](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=8cda2068e2&e=b7b3eddce2). The management of the prison was a big issue when Democrats campaigned successfully to run county government in 2019. But in the four years since they took over, conditions at the prison have only gotten **more dangerous, more deadly, and more expensive**.
---
|
---
| | [ ](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=1c2d872ec0&e=b7b3eddce2)
---
Words mean things, **Guy Ciarrocchi** wrote this week, and we even when we disagree, [we must agree on what we disagree about](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=67162d2ce4&e=b7b3eddce2). Progressives have twisted the language so badly that it’s getting to be impossible to understand what they’re even mad about nowadays.
---
|
---
| | [ ](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=622c640baf&e=b7b3eddce2)
---
And in a two-part article this week, **Prof. Stephen Gambescia** wrote about what we know about making education work for kids — and how American schools are moving in the opposite direction. Read about [the illness](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=320e319ef8&e=b7b3eddce2) and [the cure](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=545b968313&e=b7b3eddce2) to this steep decline in our most formative of institutions.
---
|
---
| _**What We’re Reading...**_
---
| As Democrats across the country and here in Pennsylvania lobby to push former President Trump off the 2024 ballot, **Peggy Noonan** writes for the _Wall Street Journal_ that these actions will only inflame the deepening divide between left and right. Her hope? That a unanimous Supreme Court will [put a lid on this undemocratic action](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=8b205b05a8&e=b7b3eddce2).****
---
|
---
| **_Broad + Liberty_ is funded exclusively by readers like you.**

Your generous support ensures that _Broad + Liberty_ can bring you stories and opinions that Pennsylvania’s mainstream media would rather leave unheard. As a new year and a new election cycle begins, please consider making a contribution today. If you would like your gift to be used to help us cover a specific story or subject matter, please let us know in the contribution form or at [editors@broadandliberty.com](mailto:editirs@broadandliberty.com).
As always, gifts made to _Broad + Liberty_ are 100% tax deductible!

Thank you, dear reader, for your steadfast support of our independent, broad-minded brand of local journalism. We could not do this without you.

With gratitude,

— The Editors at _Broad + Liberty_
---
|
---
| [Support Broad + Liberty](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=ab3cfc2da9&e=b7b3eddce2 "Support Broad + Liberty")

name: Conservative Liberty Wire
subject: Learn from Victor Davis Hanson
body:
This sponsored message from Conservative Liberty Wire is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5dd0605e853c41288871401d91017395&_e=J9GUUBatLcUQ9HLKT9J4QnsvHydAZoafFmtEzebSBe35zVvumk6kyMnOdNVPZMNbEeneKcf5wrhGBODioqdiXaemiG57-YrI0AW3P1Cv2F7nQTVOGTegtgyhLq_32PsesiTRsCy-_a2YNeCh9XvCDIQC6iBxtUnH5oZYBs1uLOxgI0yYGhKCLvhYV_j65IK5Q8f1bcDfCvF8JuJ8xZcHv3NIPceQnn1DZAk6LSwfakE_F6Bhm_Y1_c2bJjfeYO5WNCuA1bq5ZcRk7dthNN6ApDoMHkRFsxMOqap7RzhDGlWMqUsjcJ51fnaqYC1lJTZa6N0Ws48N0g9evn8o99PBOvElXQr63zI9BIidXn21j4rgsoXr6DZW6oQakiybx5mzfqVlIta4Oiuc0kiuZ9sIYRNZaK0M3WKdfoRFQ_1F2YI%3D) Dear Fellow American,
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we're losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important.
To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled "The Second World Wars."
Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict's diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5dd0605e853c41288871401d91017395&_e=J9GUUBatLcUQ9HLKT9J4QnsvHydAZoafFmtEzebSBe35zVvumk6kyMnOdNVPZMNbEeneKcf5wrhGBODioqdiXaemiG57-YrI0AW3P1Cv2F7nQTVOGTegtgyhLq_32PsesiTRsCy-_a2YNeCh9XvCDIQC6iBxtUnH5oZYBs1uLOxgI0yYGhKCLvhYV_j65IK5Q8f1bcDfCvF8JuJ8xZcHv3NIPceQnn1DZAk6LSwfakE_F6Bhm_Y1_c2bJjfeYO5WNCuA1bq5ZcRk7dthNN6ApPoCpB4PBnFhWzlJsUB23zxAnTxtW35ajdzVdVY3phfm7xmXQUlkTQqY0VBlou5F4RFbD0dPazg4hScP-PsxcpA1ZDR34G2aKLCmcMCrkmxSUeKKTk49njpur-WsUqhRc1qNlgp5B5ERDhUBJoAdVHU%3D) If you'd like to secure a DVD set before they're all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.
Here's a secure link to reserve your copy of "**The Second World Wars** " on DVD:
**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5dd0605e853c41288871401d91017395&_e=J9GUUBatLcUQ9HLKT9J4QnsvHydAZoafFmtEzebSBe35zVvumk6kyMnOdNVPZMNbEeneKcf5wrhGBODioqdiXaemiG57-YrI0AW3P1Cv2F7nQTVOGTegtgyhLq_32PsesiTRsCy-_a2YNeCh9XvCDIQC6iBxtUnH5oZYBs1uLOxgI0yYGhKCLvhYV_j65IK5Q8f1bcDfCvF8JuJ8xZcHv3NIPceQnn1DZAk6LSwfakE_F6Bhm_Y1_c2bJjfeYO5WNCuA1bq5ZcRk7dthNN6ApDuXR4GmJTrqtiKq8xCirlkbw-bdfTdO2t8rst_uHDgwp1ChNA2Y11UnqweaMsVUHnhkO6bPnI7zq3xl1H_tv6x_3FGUkMF0paDslJ5vNGqqI2eyOVN2vBnoonDRdUGLM9bFPfVLbxNEE3ZPbFY0PQk%3D)**
Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College!
Best regards,
Kyle Murnen, '09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
