name: Freedom Nation Today
subject: Survey on the Department of Justice
body:
The survey will only take a few moments of your time

This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=bb6c1edc46d143ee867dd1daa70372cd&_e=KUx5_g3FinfWwe1r1mjgmo02P-v_QBWgAuvXQ1_zZQwAvRNGoRH9Znn5dxIVuwWy2UU8-hqTvp-oLujM6_bpwPNg0L1MjWko1bQARZjYEvb-cericwUABviTr7bGRico1Xvl4NMp_b105J0n3XlBXudjP3wf3cA740blpV242wjslI6MILwngvfefAxnmNA5ZKAcXwao4BjFQ0E5rbPcq3k0t6WPos0GXsIbNtJyT2eiEq5tLvC_emuSfrLhfYqT8eSc-CwrKiFkMy6_qYkrtJ4q_jkiIk4HP4uCHYDYnkXdqdoGwYL8VaEP_Q1eafIv92zmjVBu8ch-n8z84rgH_dmWpzwKVg-Mcu-hdd-ORuUPr64YIVM9LznIkJKq9-zzpz-8geMEg3n1Yzn7sWFa4g%3D%3D) Dear Friend, Before you move on to your next email--I would appreciate it if you would take a few moments to participate in Hillsdale College's **National Survey on the Department of Justice.** The survey will only take a few moments of your time, and its subject affects your liberty and the very survival of the rule of law in America. **The current administration 's weaponization of the Department of Justice is unprecedented in American history.** Instead of protecting your God-given constitutional rights, the administration uses the Department of Justice to attack its political opponents... ...as well as Christians, parents, and anyone who dares to stand up for our constitutional liberties. At the same time, with the help of the media it... Covers up a two-tiered justice system that violates your constitutional rights
Hides the corruption of the ruling class
Attacks those with traditional viewpoints **That 's why I'm asking you to take the Hillsdale College National Survey on the Department of Justice.** By completing this survey, you will help us more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans like you on this critical issue. Your responses will help Hillsdale strengthen its nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--including the importance of the rule of law and checks and balances, which the American Founders saw as essential safeguards against corruption. Friend, you can complete the National Survey on the Department of Justice by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=bb6c1edc46d143ee867dd1daa70372cd&_e=KUx5_g3FinfWwe1r1mjgmo02P-v_QBWgAuvXQ1_zZQwAvRNGoRH9Znn5dxIVuwWy2UU8-hqTvp-oLujM6_bpwPNg0L1MjWko1bQARZjYEvb-cericwUABviTr7bGRico1Xvl4NMp_b105J0n3XlBXudjP3wf3cA740blpV242wjslI6MILwngvfefAxnmNA5ZKAcXwao4BjFQ0E5rbPcq3k0t6WPos0GXsIbNtJyT2cdIzEpvjJqff-bmb4KRyxpOktl3XGtLzeOPADZjjmo_JR9VRh1D9VZ_s9IWuINeE70e93cZt-EcLHsfFSyubnTiobL2ZzIv9yVORaF5CysdefjgO6qb0NYYu8voQT3UmYYdqnUpP3A0PnN3v5_OvEw09AU8fl54cYm5pETo-6LgA%3D%3D)** The **Declaration of Independence** argues that **the purpose of just government is to secure our natural rights** and that **just government is founded on the consent of the governed.** Yet today's ruling class regularly disregards the will of the American people, and our rights--to the freedoms of speech, assembly, and religion, to due process, to gun ownership, and more--are under constant attack. **You and I know that liberty in America is under serious threat. But as I travel around the country, I tell the audiences I speak to how we are engaging in the fight against this threat.** A vital part of our efforts in this fight--in which Hillsdale College is a leader--is **reaching** and **teaching** millions of citizens, with the TRUTH about America's great heritage of liberty. We are heavily invested in our educational outreach efforts through our **Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions.** These efforts include: **Teaching bright and principled students** --on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.--who receive a rigorous, **classical liberal arts education, including** a required course on the Constitution
**Distributing _Imprimis_** , America's leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.4 million homes and businesses ten times per year; previous issues include "The Politicization of the Department of Justice" by Harmeet K. Dhillon
**Producing and promoting free online courses** for any citizen who wishes to learn, on topics such as the Constitution, American history, and free market economics
**Providing a classical K-12 curriculum** with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide After everything we've seen over the past few years, the need for Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts is undeniable. So please share your views by completing our **National Survey on the Department of Justice** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. Your completed survey will help us form the most effective strategy to **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. As you might know, Hillsdale College is almost unique in American higher education in its refusal to accept EVEN ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. **This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. But it also means that our work depends entirely on the generous support of private citizens, like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.** If you agree that we are now seeing an unprecedented assault on the American way of life, I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the attached **National Survey on the Department of Justice** , which you can access at this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=bb6c1edc46d143ee867dd1daa70372cd&_e=KUx5_g3FinfWwe1r1mjgmo02P-v_QBWgAuvXQ1_zZQwAvRNGoRH9Znn5dxIVuwWy2UU8-hqTvp-oLujM6_bpwPNg0L1MjWko1bQARZjYEvb-cericwUABviTr7bGRico1Xvl4NMp_b105J0n3XlBXudjP3wf3cA740blpV242wjslI6MILwngvfefAxnmNA5ZKAcXwao4BjFQ0E5rbPcq3k0t6WPos0GXsIbNtJyT2cWHj7Ypw2SNElBGoMnZNfCsT_Rd2VxgaJ3ZhMcQFAZg-54ILWUZNqNTt0UeJvum15jSUNJEkYuI1Qzmj7KGDIqruWqG73UPBZN4dlG4VhdvCUR46XtcTz-jhfCaiE7hMORCImKBAzREOLIhqnFDoY8kZawWJuPEDmP_6s3FrX9Yg%3D%3D)** Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to receiving your completed survey, and I sincerely appreciate your support of Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 |

---

Freedom Nation Today
---

clean_body: The survey will only take a few moments of your time This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College Dear Friend, Before you move on to your next email--I would appreciate it if you would take a few moments to participate in Hillsdale College's National Survey on the Department of Justice. The survey will only take a few moments of your time, and its subject affects your liberty and the very survival of the rule of law in America. The current administration 's weaponization of the Department of Justice is unprecedented in American history. Instead of protecting your God-given constitutional rights, the administration uses the Department of Justice to attack its political opponents... ...as well as Christians, parents, and anyone who dares to stand up for our constitutional liberties. At the same time, with the help of the media it... Covers up a two-tiered justice system that violates your constitutional rights Hides the corruption of the ruling class Attacks those with traditional viewpoints That 's why I'm asking you to take the Hillsdale College National Survey on the Department of Justice. By completing this survey, you will help us more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans like you on this critical issue. Your responses will help Hillsdale strengthen its nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--including the importance of the rule of law and checks and balances, which the American Founders saw as essential safeguards against corruption. Friend, you can complete the National Survey on the Department of Justice by using the link below: The Declaration of Independence argues that the purpose of just government is to secure our natural rights and that just government is founded on the consent of the governed. Yet today's ruling class regularly disregards the will of the American people, and our rights--to the freedoms of speech, assembly, and religion, to due process, to gun ownership, and more--are under constant attack. You and I know that liberty in America is under serious threat. But as I travel around the country, I tell the audiences I speak to how we are engaging in the fight against this threat. A vital part of our efforts in this fight--in which Hillsdale College is a leader--is reaching and teaching millions of citizens, with the TRUTH about America's great heritage of liberty. We are heavily invested in our educational outreach efforts through our Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions. These efforts include: Teaching bright and principled students --on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.--who receive a rigorous, classical liberal arts education, including a required course on the Constitution Distributing Imprimis , America's leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.4 million homes and businesses ten times per year; previous issues include "The Politicization of the Department of Justice" by Harmeet K. Dhillon Producing and promoting free online courses for any citizen who wishes to learn, on topics such as the Constitution, American history, and free market economics Providing a classical K-12 curriculum with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide After everything we've seen over the past few years, the need for Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts is undeniable. So please share your views by completing our National Survey on the Department of Justice and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. Your completed survey will help us form the most effective strategy to reach and teach millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. As you might know, Hillsdale College is almost unique in American higher education in its refusal to accept EVEN ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. But it also means that our work depends entirely on the generous support of private citizens, like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty. If you agree that we are now seeing an unprecedented assault on the American way of life, I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the attached National Survey on the Department of Justice , which you can access at this secure link: Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to receiving your completed survey, and I sincerely appreciate your support of Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 | Freedom Nation Today 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

Here's the thing Peter, I _never_ thought I would run for office. Growing up, I wanted to be just like my dad, who was an athlete and a U.S. Air Force Veteran. I played football and earned an athletic scholarship that sent me to college. (_I was pretty good, but being 6-foot-7 sure didn’t hurt!_)
But wearing a football uniform taught me something special: it gave me purpose and made me feel a part of something bigger than myself.
So when I put on my Capitol Police uniform for the first time over 15 years ago to protect our nation’s Capitol, _it felt right_.
But I never thought I’d see the day that our democracy would be attacked by Donald Trump and an army of insurrectionists that HE directed to the Capitol.
I couldn't have been any closer to the chaos of January 6. I put my life on the line during the violence and destruction that Trump encouraged. So trust and believe when I tell you: _**we cannot allow our democracy to be in the hands of these MAGA-extremists.**_
I fought for our democracy and our Capitol once as Officer Dunn, and I'll do it again as Congressman Dunn.
[_**Please, can you chip in $10 or $20 split between Upset the Setup to become a Founding Donor of my campaign? I seriously appreciate any help you can give today >>**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/76637886/448026978/-749972717?amount=10&refcode=UTS_EN_90DO_240107_2_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5NDc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImEyZmI3MWI5LTY1YWQtZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyMzdkYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=V2iFduSpgZrInMwQM2KxdKa2DzDd9sPHrjf6Ob6w3GI=)

1️⃣ **_Pennsylvania:_ Ethics complaint to be filed against Republican state senator regarding his involvement in the Jan. 6th. insurrection**
In Pennsylvania, a Democratic state senator publicly shared his plan to file an ethics complaint against his Republican colleague for his involvement leading up to and during the Jan. 6th insurrection. 2️⃣ **_Wisconsin:_ Justices order new district maps to be drawn **
In Wisconsin, a state with extremely gerrymandered district maps, Democrats recently won a years-long fight in the courts in a ruling that ordered new district maps to be drawn. 3️⃣ **_Texas:_ New state laws passed to ban DEI offices in public universities **
In Texas, Republicans' newest attack on diversity and inclusivity comes as legislation took effect banning DEI offices in public universities. clean_body: Welcome to the latest edition of the DLCC's newsletter, January 7th, 2024 | | | | | ---|--- | 1️⃣ Pennsylvania: Ethics complaint to be filed against Republican state senator regarding his involvement in the Jan. 6th. insurrection In Pennsylvania, a Democratic state senator publicly shared his plan to file an ethics complaint against his Republican colleague for his involvement leading up to and during the Jan. 6th insurrection. 2️⃣ Wisconsin: Justices order new district maps to be drawn In Wisconsin, a state with extremely gerrymandered district maps, Democrats recently won a years-long fight in the courts in a ruling that ordered new district maps to be drawn. The previous maps unconstitutionally gerrymandered the state, and 3️⃣ Texas: New state laws passed to ban DEI offices in public universities In Texas, Republicans' newest attack on diversity and inclusivity comes as legislation took effect banning DEI offices in public universities. These offices served to train faculty and staff surrounding diversity initiatives in the school and ensure a fair hiring process, but 4️⃣ Read: Our path to majority update 2024 is shaping up to be the year of the states, and thanks to supporters like you we are in a great position to build on the momentum of our historic wins in 2022 and 2023. 🗳️ Special Elections: Democrats prepare for upcoming races Over the next few months, Democrats are facing nearly two dozen special elections in states like New Hampshire and Pennsylvania, so ** | | ---|---|--- ** | Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee 1225 Eye Street NW Suite 1250, Washington, DC 20005 Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. subject: $40 million in attacks 🤯
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President
body:
To view this email as a web page, go to the link below, or copy and paste it into your browser's address window.
https://view.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=cb18d4c6ea5b5587018617473ec85dc482eb4fbd293fc5af6800878bbdc20b4582b3e271be0c19f2a73aaed74117dbf74c174d665e02c48b1debd9ce354c43c68a403d26d2e1ab1865481fbdc89d7bb5

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=6e202e5037c835b7953a1181d6926b877a8a0da081606fe880b6b854f60f176a0708653ae62532e19a94df0f64e43b169226bfd0e1196d13cca95962879c04f6

🚨🚨 $40 Million Alert 🚨🚨

Friend, what does $40 million spent on attacking Ron DeSantis tell you? Maybe that he's the one threat in this race who has TERRIFIED the establishment down to its core.

The one thing the elites in Washington, DC don't want is a change agent who will shake up their comfy position above average Americans. That's why Nikki Haley, Donald Trump, and all of their mega-donors have thrown money at trying to shut down Ron Desantis' campaign.

Fun fact:Ron DeSantis has now been the target of nearly as much false negative spending as Donald Trump and Joe Biden combined.

This is why we ask you for help, friend. We aren't asking you to chip in $40 million, but it doesn't take nearly that much to show the nation the truth. Every small amount helps us get the word out and show off Ron DeSantis' sparkling, proven record.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=6e202e5037c835b7157d01acb5cdd4f3bd69bb5e93dc4ce8a20e5d329c33fb8700632578e52e9b48b9933d3ce357de8682dba8ea92a008b3b6576276791ab6d1
Help us fight back >> Send in $20!

No amount of money will be able to change the facts: Ron DeSantis is the one leader who can win and follow through on every threat he's made against those taking advantage of the American people.

We hope we can count on your help to contrast their false, negative ads.

Thank you,

Team DeSantis

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=6e202e5037c835b7953a1181d6926b877a8a0da081606fe880b6b854f60f176a0708653ae62532e19a94df0f64e43b169226bfd0e1196d13cca95962879c04f6

🚨 ATTENTION 🚨

Our grassroots team drives our every success, and we know we ask a lot of you to help us win this critical election. As this race continues to heat up, we will be relying on our supporters to help us go the distance, and we want to make sure we respect your preferences when we reach out to you. If you'd like to receive fewer emails from our team, please click
https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=6e202e5037c835b7143b688cce38002eda4f83a2ea4d9b0b18100de6c41c52ad5bce987c26abc2946a06f368278bc5defceeb49183bfe6c8fdc437b74401c548
here.

Volunteer!

We welcome you to join Team DeSantis by volunteering to spread our message: Decline is a choice. Success is attainable. And freedom is worth fighting for.

Help us lead our Great American Comeback by getting involved today!

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=6e202e5037c835b7b35cb1092fd4756d3f7c24512c6002c65624335f8a499280713e987758cd8d8933c77be74cedd41ae81dd9b806b9c639fc9648f69610b96b
Sign up here!

Get to Know Ron DeSantis

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=6e202e5037c835b7953a1181d6926b877a8a0da081606fe880b6b854f60f176a0708653ae62532e19a94df0f64e43b169226bfd0e1196d13cca95962879c04f6

Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain.

After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom.

When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor.

Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide.

In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is personal and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=6e202e5037c835b7953a1181d6926b877a8a0da081606fe880b6b854f60f176a0708653ae62532e19a94df0f64e43b169226bfd0e1196d13cca95962879c04f6

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has promised that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by immediately getting to work stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late.

In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He’s taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and won every single time. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon.

That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now.

Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without “green cards”), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general).

Contribution rules

- I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
- This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
- I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
- I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.
Ron DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

clean_body: To view this email as a web page, go to the link below, or copy and paste it into your browser's address window. 🚨🚨 $40 Million Alert 🚨🚨 Friend, what does $40 million spent on attacking Ron DeSantis tell you? Maybe that he's the one threat in this race who has TERRIFIED the establishment down to its core. The one thing the elites in Washington, DC don't want is a change agent who will shake up their comfy position above average Americans. That's why Nikki Haley, Donald Trump, and all of their mega-donors have thrown money at trying to shut down Ron Desantis' campaign. Fun fact:Ron DeSantis has now been the target of nearly as much false negative spending as Donald Trump and Joe Biden combined. This is why we ask you for help, friend. We aren't asking you to chip in $40 million, but it doesn't take nearly that much to show the nation the truth. Every small amount helps us get the word out and show off Ron DeSantis' sparkling, proven record. Help us fight back >> Send in $20! No amount of money will be able to change the facts: Ron DeSantis is the one leader who can win and follow through on every threat he's made against those taking advantage of the American people. We hope we can count on your help to contrast their false, negative ads. Thank you, Team DeSantis 🚨 ATTENTION 🚨 Our grassroots team drives our every success, and we know we ask a lot of you to help us win this critical election. As this race continues to heat up, we will be relying on our supporters to help us go the distance, and we want to make sure we respect your preferences when we reach out to you. If you'd like to receive fewer emails from our team, please click here. Volunteer! We welcome you to join Team DeSantis by volunteering to spread our message: Decline is a choice. Success is attainable. And freedom is worth fighting for. Help us lead our Great American Comeback by getting involved today! Sign up here! Get to Know Ron DeSantis Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain. After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom. When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor. Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide. In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is personal and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children. On Day One, Ron DeSantis has promised that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by immediately getting to work stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late. In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He’s taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and won every single time. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon. That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now. Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without “green cards”), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules - I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder). - This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution. - I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person. - I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source. Ron DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense. Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President

name: Harry Dunn
subject: I defended the Capitol from insurrectionists. Now, I'm the Democrat running for Congress in Maryland
body:
My friend and fellow veteran Jerrad told me I should reach out.
| | | | [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001OtKDllNsUNPzSPiMj2-DCbRgIhVhqoDr-PZRdI8VU2A272v81QN-F2pijnnUn5xY8sWy9EwKZfo55mgPpU3w_A8cywsg35GlgBZIzvQV5DFUdmHNQy3rA91uU6GU56VrhxYkH6opbHUShvy8jN7TQeOkRWs_6xH79_Ibd1LCkIPSpaS5eJBeZoJ-bEnK70E-vTL2yVA6y5c=&c=UlQLpxY2WEqIXJhoqBaWcNRQ53u97OuxdS_pgo6mdTRtTUeOO_Hczw==&ch=JP9UvfU9bwrZ0TmKdraLWPtc88pbVHzdBIOY6geAFza6VaJ1iBjriw==)
---
| Harry Dunn here, one of the Capitol police officers who defended the U.S. Capitol against MAGA insurrectionists just three years ago and testified in front of the January 6th Committee.
I've got an important announcement: I'm hoping to make my return to DC - but not as a Capitol police officer. I'm officially running to serve Maryland's 3rd Congressional District in the U.S. House.
[I'm counting on your support to get there. Can you rush $25 or more to become a Founding Donor of my campaign and support Jerrad Christian and Democrats around the country?](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001OtKDllNsUNPzSPiMj2-DCbRgIhVhqoDr-PZRdI8VU2A272v81QN-F2pijnnUn5xY8sWy9EwKZfo55mgPpU3w_A8cywsg35GlgBZIzvQV5DFUdmHNQy3rA91uU6GU56VrhxYkH6opbHUShvy8jN7TQeOkRWs_6xH79_Ibd1LCkIPSpaS5eJBeZoJ-bEnK70E-vTL2yVA6y5c=&c=UlQLpxY2WEqIXJhoqBaWcNRQ53u97OuxdS_pgo6mdTRtTUeOO_Hczw==&ch=JP9UvfU9bwrZ0TmKdraLWPtc88pbVHzdBIOY6geAFza6VaJ1iBjriw==)
---
| | [DONATE NOW >>](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001OtKDllNsUNPzSPiMj2-DCbRgIhVhqoDr-PZRdI8VU2A272v81QN-F2pijnnUn5xY8sWy9EwKZfo55mgPpU3w_A8cywsg35GlgBZIzvQV5DFUdmHNQy3rA91uU6GU56VrhxYkH6opbHUShvy8jN7TQeOkRWs_6xH79_Ibd1LCkIPSpaS5eJBeZoJ-bEnK70E-vTL2yVA6y5c=&c=UlQLpxY2WEqIXJhoqBaWcNRQ53u97OuxdS_pgo6mdTRtTUeOO_Hczw==&ch=JP9UvfU9bwrZ0TmKdraLWPtc88pbVHzdBIOY6geAFza6VaJ1iBjriw==)
---
| Here's the thing, I never thought I would run for office. Growing up, I wanted to be just like my dad, who was an athlete and a U.S. Air Force Veteran. I played football and earned an athletic scholarship that sent me to college. (I was pretty good, but being 6-foot-7 sure didn't hurt!)
But wearing a football uniform taught me something special: it gave me purpose and made me feel a part of something bigger than myself.
So when I put on my Capitol police uniform for the first time over 15 years ago to protect our nation's Capitol, it felt right.
But I never thought I'd see the day that our democracy would be attacked by Donald Trump and an army of insurrectionists that HE directed to the Capitol.
I couldn't have been any closer to the chaos of January 6. I put my life on the line during the violence and destruction that Trump encouraged. So trust and believe when I tell you: we cannot allow our democracy to be in the hands of these MAGA-extremists.
I fought for our democracy and our Capitol once as Officer Dunn, and I'll do it again as Congressman Dunn.
[Please, can you chip in $25 or $50 to become a Founding Donor of my campaign? I seriously appreciate any help you can give today >>](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001OtKDllNsUNPzSPiMj2-DCbRgIhVhqoDr-PZRdI8VU2A272v81QN-F2pijnnUn5xY8sWy9EwKZfo55mgPpU3w_A8cywsg35GlgBZIzvQV5DFUdmHNQy3rA91uU6GU56VrhxYkH6opbHUShvy8jN7TQeOkRWs_6xH79_Ibd1LCkIPSpaS5eJBeZoJ-bEnK70E-vTL2yVA6y5c=&c=UlQLpxY2WEqIXJhoqBaWcNRQ53u97OuxdS_pgo6mdTRtTUeOO_Hczw==&ch=JP9UvfU9bwrZ0TmKdraLWPtc88pbVHzdBIOY6geAFza6VaJ1iBjriw==)
---
| [BECOME A FOUNDING DONOR >>](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001OtKDllNsUNPzSPiMj2-DCbRgIhVhqoDr-PZRdI8VU2A272v81QN-F2pijnnUn5xY8sWy9EwKZfo55mgPpU3w_A8cywsg35GlgBZIzvQV5DFUdmHNQy3rA91uU6GU56VrhxYkH6opbHUShvy8jN7TQeOkRWs_6xH79_Ibd1LCkIPSpaS5eJBeZoJ-bEnK70E-vTL2yVA6y5c=&c=UlQLpxY2WEqIXJhoqBaWcNRQ53u97OuxdS_pgo6mdTRtTUeOO_Hczw==&ch=JP9UvfU9bwrZ0TmKdraLWPtc88pbVHzdBIOY6geAFza6VaJ1iBjriw==)
---
| Let's do it,
Harry Dunn
---
| |
---
| Mail checks to: Citizens for J Christian P.O. box 315 Galena, OH 43021

name: Andy Kim
subject: A caretaker for our democracy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Andy Kim for New Jersey
body:
With all this chaos, and craziness that's out there right now, I decided that I had to do everything I can to get our country back on track.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76650608/448058409/41798106?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOGQ4MjY5ZS03MWFkLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=afGb_au4V6O9ox59Ye-dKOA6NAxebIZ8HYCWrV84xKE=&emci=23047cb8-ecab-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=b8d8269e-71ad-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=26261389)
---

| | Yesterday, we reflected on the events of January 6. **Today, we're looking forward to working on unifying our country and creating a nation that our children can be proud to grow up in.** Look, I don't want to keep living through history. I'd rather be able to take my kids to swim lessons or build the Lego Millennium Falcon, but this is just the moment that we're in. I refuse to believe that my kids are doomed to grow up in a broken, divided America. I want to help build a future where we can look at our kids and their kids and tell them that this is a country where I can guarantee that you will have a better life and more opportunities than we do. That's what I want. It's why I'm committed to doing everything I can to get our country back on track. And if I believe that in my heart the question then is, what am I going to do about it? **My answer to that is that I'm going to be the next U.S. Senator from New Jersey.** [**Will you join our movement today by making a donation to help us win this race for the future?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76650609/448058412/1416144778?refcode=2024-01-07-jansix&recurring=&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=b8d8269e-71ad-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOGQ4MjY5ZS03MWFkLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=afGb_au4V6O9ox59Ye-dKOA6NAxebIZ8HYCWrV84xKE=) I'm running a different kind of campaign because that's what the people of New Jersey want right now. People are sick and tired of division, partisan fights, and attacks on our democracy. Our campaign is about bringing in regular New Jerseyans, regular Americans, engaging with them about what's on their minds, and figuring out how to earn their support. I've heard from a lot of people that say they're tired of the business-as-usual for politics. They're tired of political insiders chasing power, while ignoring the people they're supposed to serve. **It doesn't have to be this way. We're building this campaign to show that we can do things differently,** that we can have a different kind of politics and we can restore trust in our democracy. It's up to us to be caretakers for our democracy. That's why I'm running for Senate. [**We need to restore confidence in our representation and New Jersey, and I'm running to be that representative. clean_body: With all this chaos, and craziness that's out there right now, I decided that I had to do everything I can to get our country back on track. | | | | Yesterday, we reflected on the events of January 6. Today, we're looking forward to working on unifying our country and creating a nation that our children can be proud to grow up in. Look, I don't want to keep living through history. I'd rather be able to take my kids to swim lessons or build the Lego Millennium Falcon, but this is just the moment that we're in. I refuse to believe that my kids are doomed to grow up in a broken, divided America. I want to help build a future where we can look at our kids and their kids and tell them that this is a country where I can guarantee that you will have a better life and more opportunities than we do. That's what I want. It's why I'm committed to doing everything I can to get our country back on track. And if I believe that in my heart the question then is, what am I going to do about it? My answer to that is that I'm going to be the next U.S. Senator from New Jersey. = I'm running a different kind of campaign because that's what the people of New Jersey want right now. People are sick and tired of division, partisan fights, and attacks on our democracy. Our campaign is about bringing in regular New Jerseyans, regular Americans, engaging with them about what's on their minds, and figuring out how to earn their support. I've heard from a lot of people that say they're tired of the business-as-usual for politics. They're tired of political insiders chasing power, while ignoring the people they're supposed to serve. It doesn't have to be this way. We're building this campaign to show that we can do things differently, that we can have a different kind of politics and we can restore trust in our democracy. It's up to us to be caretakers for our democracy. That's why I'm running for Senate. = = We deserve something better. # [Democracy is not on the ballot, despite Biden's claims](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1018597&post_id=140439698&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTQwNDM5Njk4LCJpYXQiOjE3MDQ2NDIyNDYsImV4cCI6MTcwNzIzNDI0NiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTEwMTg1OTciLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.Her_ea2QB140aJ_L0Zc4ixqPuHuNvOYuT_kdo0KbjTc)
### A letter to liberals concerned about Trump
| | [Shahid Buttar](https://substack.com/redirect/e710e67b-12f5-475b-ba09-94abbad95ffa?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
---
| Jan 7| | | ∙| | Preview
---|---|---
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/e710e67b-12f5-475b-ba09-94abbad95ffa?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
---
---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1018597&post_id=140439698&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTQwNDM5Njk4LCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTcwNDY0MjI0NiwiZXhwIjoxNzA3MjM0MjQ2LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMTAxODU5NyIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.jJXrwWuZ8mEJgQskEc9oM-sDWJTNAp_O3fmK6T15l28&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1018597&post_id=140439698&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTQwNDM5Njk4LCJpYXQiOjE3MDQ2NDIyNDYsImV4cCI6MTcwNzIzNDI0NiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTEwMTg1OTciLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.Her_ea2QB140aJ_L0Zc4ixqPuHuNvOYuT_kdo0KbjTc&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1018597&post_id=140439698&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTQwNDM5Njk4LCJpYXQiOjE3MDQ2NDIyNDYsImV4cCI6MTcwNzIzNDI0NiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTEwMTg1OTciLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.Her_ea2QB140aJ_L0Zc4ixqPuHuNvOYuT_kdo0KbjTc)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zaGFoaWRidXR0YXIuc3Vic3RhY2suY29tL3AvZGVtb2NyYWN5LWlzLW5vdC1vbi10aGUtYmFsbG90LWRlc3BpdGU_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1zdWJzdGFjayZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJmFjdGlvbj1yZXN0YWNrLWNvbW1lbnQmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWVtYWlsLXJlc3RhY2stY29tbWVudCZyPTFodnI2MCIsInAiOjE0MDQzOTY5OCwicyI6MTAxODU5NywiZiI6dHJ1ZSwidSI6OTA1MDExOTIsImlhdCI6MTcwNDY0MjI0NiwiZXhwIjoxNzA3MjM0MjQ2LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMCIsInN1YiI6ImxpbmstcmVkaXJlY3QifQ.XKz8CsXQPXRKEmZq1QfYCBSG3wenThVKnqM_2iAYYJ0?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/shahidbuttar/p/democracy-is-not-on-the-ballot-despite?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store)
---
On Friday, President Biden delivered [a speech](https://substack.com/redirect/289baebb-0e06-4a7c-8a54-68f4b4b2133d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) widely hailed as a [defense of democracy](https://substack.com/redirect/1f168711-40a0-4532-a1d8-d980af53e20d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) from an existential threat in the form of his likely general election opponent, Donald Trump.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/62670f88-6d8c-489d-a243-2fe70d151332?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Many--including me--share the president's view of his predecessor as a threat to democracy.
But Biden relied on listeners to forget his own record.
"[A] presidential election is underway that each of the major corporate political parties are framing as tests of civilization, while advancing candidates who have shamelessly rejected any pretense of public accountability."
### **The worthy concerns of liberals**
Many of Biden's supporters feel concerned that if Trump returns to the presidency, he will unleash a wave of retribution targeting his political opponents, undermine crucial institutions, and impose his own will on the country.
They fear that democracy in America would collapse if Trump wins a second term.
Liberals remember Trump's mendacity. They remember his unrepentant [lies](https://substack.com/redirect/42072605-25b1-44e5-8c4c-86598bf146fb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) in office. They remember his [incitements](https://substack.com/redirect/7fdf9d43-3609-4d1d-8afb-a19fc65f06e8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to racist violence, his [insults](https://substack.com/redirect/667138aa-40a4-4ec4-84ca-3b839705cced?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to military veterans and their families, and his seeming willingness to set a torch to any institution in Washington while relentlessly promoting himself and his family fortune.
Some of those same observers perceive Trump as the worst president in history. If nothing else, he certainly has rivals. Earlier ones deployed weapons of mass destruction against civilian populations, committed overt genocide against Native Americans, and rejected any pretense of equal rights for women, or racial or gender minorities.
Some of Trump's critics might disregard his policy record as president entirely, and focus only on his seeming disdain for democracy, from defaming poll workers to inviting an insurrection to challenge the congressional certification of the electoral college vote. Few presidents have ever been so openly hostile to constitutional norms. His overt and public strategy to regain office in order to pardon himself from any number of outstanding criminal prosecutions reduces the office of the presidency to a self-serving mockery.
From the standpoint of constitutional law, Trump's most severe crimes were stealing from the Republic, which he did in any number of ways. Most directly, he effectively directed Secret Service funds into his pocket. His entourage of agents had to join him on his frequent trips to his lavish resorts, and all of their trips were [funded](https://substack.com/redirect/4196422d-4d08-4060-8940-1baaf78cb108?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) by taxpayers.
From an economic standpoint, the inflation of Trump's personal brand may have ultimately won him far greater returns than payments from federal funds to his businesses. A report released this week suggests that Trump may have been [unconstitutionally paid nearly $8 million](https://substack.com/redirect/2d4acda2-dbd5-4d31-9ff9-1f0ef02fed48?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) by foreign governments while serving as president. Given the alleged overestimation of his personal fortune, the [fraud pervading his career](https://substack.com/redirect/55d68150-c1dc-4219-b9c4-4832d7fba00e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) in business before entering politics, and the $370 million that prosecutors in New York announced yesterday that they will seek in his fraud trial, his personal brand might be among his most valuable remaining assets.
Tragically, neither of the impeachment processes that the House undertook towards Trump when he was in office included any charges related to his corruption, misappropriation of public funds, or constitutionally prohibited emoluments. That's not a small issue. When I ran for Congress in 2020, one of my defining platform planks was [the need to impeach Trump](https://substack.com/redirect/d79a082d-5fe5-438e-b78b-7814a0720362?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)--which, at the time, House Speaker Nancy Pelosi (my opponent in the general election) had refused to do. When she finally caved to public pressure and announced her belated support for impeachment, I [repeatedly](https://substack.com/redirect/a24cc0ef-9962-4751-baa3-5c80750f08ea?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) observed that her impeachment efforts were theatrical because they ignored (and thereby excused and invited the repetition of) his worst offenses.
Are you learning anything from this post? Share it with your friends to help them learn, too.
[Share](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1018597&post_id=140439698&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTQwNDM5Njk4LCJpYXQiOjE3MDQ2NDIyNDYsImV4cCI6MTcwNzIzNDI0NiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTEwMTg1OTciLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.Her_ea2QB140aJ_L0Zc4ixqPuHuNvOYuT_kdo0KbjTc)
To be fair, everyone should be concerned about each of these issues. But liberals also run the risk of overlooking the unfortunate reality under all of our feet.
### **What democracy?**
To imagine America to somehow embody democracy in 2023 requires blithely overlooking multiple vectors of authoritarianism that have festered for decades and grown effectively inexorable under each of the major corporate political parties.
I'll save my substantive critique of Biden Democrats based on their policy preferences for my next post, if only to prevent this one from becoming a book. For now, observations of the political process can suffice.
Democracy in America has suffered no less under the rule of Democrats than it has under Republicans. It has been reduced to a slogan used by presidents to distract a gullible public from the reality before our faces.
In a country that claims to lead the free world, a presidential election is underway that each of the major corporate political parties are framing as tests of civilization, while advancing candidates who have shamelessly rejected any pretense of public accountability. Both have refused to stand for debates. One of them (whom liberals rightly fear) rejected the legitimacy of general elections, but each of them has rejected the legitimacy of primary elections.
In that context, it makes perfect sense to expect former candidates who have expressed interest in the Democratic nomination to be disappointed in the formal rejection of any democratic process to determine the candidate poised to marshal the most support in the general election.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/8661399b-f581-4410-b28f-4a9188cbc667?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Posted at twitter.com/andrewyang/status/1743658454722768982?s=46&t=gPKdQ8xPbSUjXKNJzIV6Lg
Yang's concern is not merely that the Democratic Party is denying voters any influence over the choice of the next president. By uniting behind a figure with little public support, Democrats have also done everything possible to maximize the odds of a Trump victory. That would be bad enough, even if they hadn't recruited him to run for the White House in the first place, thinking that his candidacy would be so extreme to voters that it would make Clinton look good by comparison.
This dynamic of Democrats suppressing democracy emerges beyond national elections for executive offices. Across the country, when congressional candidates have emerged to challenge powerful corporate Democrats in contested elections, we have repeatedly faced [racist](https://substack.com/redirect/8e2eacc9-3c7b-41d4-a3af-da049a66aca4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), [Islamophobic](https://substack.com/redirect/ac5e1cb5-8f97-4a38-89ad-9778498551cf?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), and [homophobic](https://substack.com/redirect/77558ce8-88ca-42e7-beae-f1a086db0cd4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) smears, despite the [reliance](https://substack.com/redirect/13aa65b3-7e7b-4eff-890c-7e3101313e77?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) of Democrats on constituencies including racial minorities and LGBTQ communities.
This pattern of [Democrats smearing their opponents](https://substack.com/redirect/c8df1e6c-209d-4373-a235-f061f9cd09fa?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) extends beyond merely vicious attacks punching down and left. It has been orchestrated specifically to insulate [documented corruption](https://substack.com/redirect/7c2d9984-e3fc-4388-a6c8-ba56f42230df?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), with the absurd and [revealing support](https://substack.com/redirect/53cece71-7284-493f-90f9-457e129b3e2d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) of reporters and editors far beyond the corporate press, including supposed "nonprofit" and "independent" alternative voices.
Stay informed despite the efforts of co-opted editors & journalists! To receive new posts or, consider becoming a free or paid subscriber.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..J6H_PACRaXrsbTCrVogXwOuyDrxEo5upZ4n-4F8OTRE?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=140439698)
### **So ...what now?**
In an earlier era, Dr. Martin Luther King, Jr. invited liberals to reconsider the value of their comforts and weigh them against urgent demands for justice they have ignored in order to indulge their political caution. He wrote prolifically in his [Letter from Birmingham Jail](https://substack.com/redirect/ef2d38f7-43ea-49ee-a474-cdfd52e2609a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) about the unfortunate complicity of "the white moderate" in the abuses of his era that they decried, thinking themselves to be allies of those least fortunate, while in fact enabling oppression and injustice by withholding their crucial solidarity and urging patience to their "allies" whose needs they disregard.
Liberals ignored Dr. King's warnings, only to then [co-opt and water down](https://substack.com/redirect/72cb9cb6-3068-4b35-93de-0f36d70913e2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) his legacy. Thankfully, however, [another voice](https://substack.com/redirect/01a6441a-fba6-4519-9e0e-d7290f20e49c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) challenging today's quintessential white moderate--Joe Biden--offers an opportunity to learn from the mistakes of our forebears, if We the People prove so wise and bold as to make better choices than they did.
For decades, Americans who favor human rights have heard the refrain "bide your time," or alternatively "not now, when so much is at stake." Progressives and socialists willing to play along have repeatedly deferred crucial goals--from universal healthcare to climate justice--in order to support the lesser among evils embodied by corporate Democrats.
But the lesser of evils is still evil, and having chosen evil for years has led Democrats, the United States, and frankly our entire species into a tragic corner.
Many liberals imagine Biden to be better than Trump, not recognizing the reality. First, they nominated a candidate in 2020 who had been driven out of previous presidential contests by a long and [continuing](https://substack.com/redirect/382e8577-aeec-4220-a1dc-ae0129a145e4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) record of [public lies](https://substack.com/redirect/9dffe6ba-841a-47b2-ace4-f3d467eb39fa?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), and who enjoyed little support beyond the party's elite as a result. Then they chose to insulate him from primary challenges in 2024. Without any irony, they have effectively replicated Trump--yet bizarrely think their version to be a better alternative.
How many voices have you heard reinforce Washington's propaganda? You can help expose it by sharing this post with your friends.

clean_body: A letter to liberals concerned about Trump | | ---|---|--- | | | Forwarded this email? ? for more ? A letter to liberals concerned about Trump | | | Jan 7| | | ∙| | Preview ---|---|--- | | | | | | | | | | | | On Friday, President Biden delivered widely hailed as a from an existential threat in the form of his likely general election opponent, Donald Trump. | | ---|---|--- Many--including me--share the president's view of his predecessor as a threat to democracy. But Biden relied on listeners to forget his own record. "[A] presidential election is underway that each of the major corporate political parties are framing as tests of civilization, while advancing candidates who have shamelessly rejected any pretense of public accountability." The worthy concerns of liberals Many of Biden's supporters feel concerned that if Trump returns to the presidency, he will unleash a wave of retribution targeting his political opponents, undermine crucial institutions, and impose his own will on the country. They fear that democracy in America would collapse if Trump wins a second term. Liberals remember Trump's mendacity. They remember his unrepentant in office. They remember his to racist violence, his to military veterans and their families, and his seeming willingness to set a torch to any institution in Washington while relentlessly promoting himself and his family fortune. Some of those same observers perceive Trump as the worst president in history. If nothing else, he certainly has rivals. Earlier ones deployed weapons of mass destruction against civilian populations, committed overt genocide against Native Americans, and rejected any pretense of equal rights for women, or racial or gender minorities. Some of Trump's critics might disregard his policy record as president entirely, and focus only on his seeming disdain for democracy, from defaming poll workers to inviting an insurrection to challenge the congressional certification of the electoral college vote. Few presidents have ever been so openly hostile to constitutional norms. His overt and public strategy to regain office in order to pardon himself from any number of outstanding criminal prosecutions reduces the office of the presidency to a self-serving mockery. From the standpoint of constitutional law, Trump's most severe crimes were stealing from the Republic, which he did in any number of ways. Most directly, he effectively directed Secret Service funds into his pocket. His entourage of agents had to join him on his frequent trips to his lavish resorts, and all of their trips were by taxpayers. From an economic standpoint, the inflation of Trump's personal brand may have ultimately won him far greater returns than payments from federal funds to his businesses. A report released this week suggests that Trump may have been by foreign governments while serving as president. Given the alleged overestimation of his personal fortune, the in business before entering politics, and the $370 million that prosecutors in New York announced yesterday that they will seek in his fraud trial, his personal brand might be among his most valuable remaining assets. Tragically, neither of the impeachment processes that the House undertook towards Trump when he was in office included any charges related to his corruption, misappropriation of public funds, or constitutionally prohibited emoluments. That's not a small issue. When I ran for Congress in 2020, one of my defining platform planks was , at the time, House Speaker Nancy Pelosi (my opponent in the general election) had refused to do. When she finally caved to public pressure and announced her belated support for impeachment, I observed that her impeachment efforts were theatrical because they ignored (and thereby excused and invited the repetition of) his worst offenses. Are you learning anything from this post? Share it with your friends to help them learn, too. To be fair, everyone should be concerned about each of these issues. But liberals also run the risk of overlooking the unfortunate reality under all of our feet. What democracy? To imagine America to somehow embody democracy in 2023 requires blithely overlooking multiple vectors of authoritarianism that have festered for decades and grown effectively inexorable under each of the major corporate political parties. I'll save my substantive critique of Biden Democrats based on their policy preferences for my next post, if only to prevent this one from becoming a book. For now, observations of the political process can suffice. Democracy in America has suffered no less under the rule of Democrats than it has under Republicans. It has been reduced to a slogan used by presidents to distract a gullible public from the reality before our faces. In a country that claims to lead the free world, a presidential election is underway that each of the major corporate political parties are framing as tests of civilization, while advancing candidates who have shamelessly rejected any pretense of public accountability. Both have refused to stand for debates. One of them (whom liberals rightly fear) rejected the legitimacy of general elections, but each of them has rejected the legitimacy of primary elections. In that context, it makes perfect sense to expect former candidates who have expressed interest in the Democratic nomination to be disappointed in the formal rejection of any democratic process to determine the candidate poised to marshal the most support in the general election. | | ---|---|--- Posted at twitter.com/andrewyang/status/1743658454722768982?s=46&t=gPKdQ8xPbSUjXKNJzIV6Lg Yang's concern is not merely that the Democratic Party is denying voters any influence over the choice of the next president. By uniting behind a figure with little public support, Democrats have also done everything possible to maximize the odds of a Trump victory. That would be bad enough, even if they hadn't recruited him to run for the White House in the first place, thinking that his candidacy would be so extreme to voters that it would make Clinton look good by comparison. This dynamic of Democrats suppressing democracy emerges beyond national elections for executive offices. Across the country, when congressional candidates have emerged to challenge powerful corporate Democrats in contested elections, we have repeatedly faced , , and smears, despite the of Democrats on constituencies including racial minorities and LGBTQ communities. This pattern of extends beyond merely vicious attacks punching down and left. It has been orchestrated specifically to insulate , with the absurd and of reporters and editors far beyond the corporate press, including supposed "nonprofit" and "independent" alternative voices. Stay informed despite the efforts of co-opted editors & journalists! To receive new posts or, consider becoming a free or paid subscriber. So ...what now? In an earlier era, Dr. Martin Luther King, Jr. invited liberals to reconsider the value of their comforts and weigh them against urgent demands for justice they have ignored in order to indulge their political caution. He wrote prolifically in his about the unfortunate complicity of "the white moderate" in the abuses of his era that they decried, thinking themselves to be allies of those least fortunate, while in fact enabling oppression and injustice by withholding their crucial solidarity and urging patience to their "allies" whose needs they disregard. Liberals ignored Dr. King's warnings, only to then his legacy. Thankfully, however, challenging today's quintessential white moderate--Joe Biden--offers an opportunity to learn from the mistakes of our forebears, if We the People prove so wise and bold as to make better choices than they did. For decades, Americans who favor human rights have heard the refrain "bide your time," or alternatively "not now, when so much is at stake." Progressives and socialists willing to play along have repeatedly deferred crucial goals--from universal healthcare to climate justice--in order to support the lesser among evils embodied by corporate Democrats. But the lesser of evils is still evil, and having chosen evil for years has led Democrats, the United States, and frankly our entire species into a tragic corner. Many liberals imagine Biden to be better than Trump, not recognizing the reality. First, they nominated a candidate in 2020 who had been driven out of previous presidential contests by a long and record of , and who enjoyed little support beyond the party's elite as a result. Then they chose to insulate him from primary challenges in 2024. Without any irony, they have effectively replicated Trump--yet bizarrely think their version to be a better alternative. How many voices have you heard reinforce Washington's propaganda? You can help expose it by sharing this post with your friends. clean_body: Jirair is running for Congress because there is so much at stake to ensure everyone in our community has equal opportunities and a fair shot to chase their own dream. If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | Hey Peter, it's Team Ratevosian. We'll get straight to the point — now that it's 2024, it's GO TIME. On March 5th, which is just two months away , Jirair will be on the ballot to represent Los Angeles in Congress. So we have a question for you, Peter. How do you feel about the state of healthcare? Homelessness? Reproductive rights? LGBTQ+ representation? If you're with us and your answer is, "Not good," we urge you to support Jirair’s campaign right now: = Here's why: As a public health doctor, a former Legislative Director for Congresswoman Barbara Lee, and a former Senior Advisor to President Biden, Jirair has what it takes to fight for us in Congress. To effect real change. With Congress in a state of utter chaos, we need real progressive leadership like his more than ever. But the bottom line is that Jirair won’t win without your support! Every donation goes directly to paying for door knocking pamphlets, campaign staff, yard signs, digital ads. We need to get his story in front of as many people as possible. So are you with us, Peter? = | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now. | = | = | = | = | = | = Let’s do this! —Team Ratevosian * | = Meet Jirair An experienced federal policy leader, public health doctor and progressive voice for change, Jirair has dedicated his life to helping others and spent his career bringing diverse communities together to solve big challenges. Let's Build A Campaign Together That Lifts Up Every Californian. | = Paid for and authorized by Jirair Ratevosian for Congress Jirair Ratevosian for Congress 321 N. Hope you're doing well, Friend!

Well, we're off to the races -- welcome to the election year!

For years, we've waited for this opportunity.

Biden's stint in the White House has been a disaster since day one.

I'm tired of having a President who makes headlines for falling down stairs and shoving a woke agenda down our throats instead of fighting for WE, THE PEOPLE.

This is a big deal.

We've got to fight like never before. The next few months will fly by, and we must do everything possible to win.

My team has told me if you rush a donation before the cutoff, your contribution will make a 25X IMPACT. This is your FIRST opportunity of 2024 to make a BIG difference.

**[I'm asking you: Will you make a $25 donation before 11:59 pm tonight? ](http://links.primaryupdate.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=f6521da71f6c4f348c08f90c5354443c&_e=loQDeY7umJTZT23CC5GUyBDpfKwQscxdSCRfO673LHf1RwrkR6flsqpXoHhcaRv1gRF0XwQgG-yaHyWwTyDRefrWLqHuCq2nDzsNdiXMby5MEpYe18iBNLdjxqLlgSDso0Lk8vMY4j-vfPoRfQmAxElKUCcpZ_C0lcZnHBsT-S-E9PVw6Iqnq6pENOkDb11N2NRt0XeqL5dQOhw2kdXkN99VpxrBWJJSw5sCIPQmwYfqlvdDJfx1x8uXCYxWqLyxc2SpazRKjKHDxGfWkeS1-pO87rTRHjH8qWdVREb3r7lfX4pugnHPciHjbl7eIqAYZVjt8ejm2VDLWpCe1dG6oDCXdTF2-N60_175HxKqNqVGldI-1mM11vA0Acqb-MgD)**

\- Kari

Friend, Before we shut down our fundraising for the freeze on January 10th, we wanted to ask — **[can you pitch in $10 or more to help our campaign before we stop fundraising on 1/10?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76653680/448066710/-1354668681?refcode=em20240107&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ODJkNDNmNS03NWFkLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4UQvrr1rKfFG3krepWHwCxUnOQlVkp2TOtpxXo5ZloA=)** Friend, we don’t take a single donation for granted. We know that when you give, you’re trusting Wes to get the work done — and **that’s exactly what he’s going to do heading into the 446th legislative session.** This is Maryland’s decade. And our work to ensure we end the decade looking back at the progress we made means that we aren’t taking our foot off the gas. We’re moving fast to increase opportunity for all Marylanders. We can’t wait to see these investments pay off for our state! But with 100% of the Governor’s focus on building the Maryland we know we deserve, and the upcoming freeze, we have to ramp up our fundraising efforts now. **That’s where you come in.** **[Making a $10 contribution can be a simple, yet significant way to make a difference for our campaign during the fundraising freeze. clean_body: = Friend, Before we shut down our fundraising for the freeze on January 10th, we wanted to ask — = Friend, we don’t take a single donation for granted. We know that when you give, you’re trusting Wes to get the work done — and that’s exactly what he’s going to do heading into the 446th legislative session. This is Maryland’s decade. And our work to ensure we end the decade looking back at the progress we made means that we aren’t taking our foot off the gas. We’re moving fast to increase opportunity for all Marylanders. We can’t wait to see these investments pay off for our state! But with 100% of the Governor’s focus on building the Maryland we know we deserve, and the upcoming freeze, we have to ramp up our fundraising efforts now. name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: The fabric of our country
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vivek 2024
body:
TRUTH: The nuclear family is the greatest form of governance known to mankind.
[Unsubscribe](http://links.vivek2024.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_s=316c42af1d2e48be9f441e6abaf633a2&_t=83dhG6AGCZRQTKSQk-QGkR3YYSKAD-rd3M1G6ubTXs2bIG3ZOhIEl9lsVjX-iNdn5x3gdfNfUf8omPzF5CasQlXzRaVVUppNwP8ogNo5aJ4%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.vivek2024.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_s=316c42af1d2e48be9f441e6abaf633a2&_t=83dhG6AGCZRQTKSQk-QGkR3YYSKAD-rd3M1G6ubTXs2bIG3ZOhIEl9lsVjX-iNdn5x3gdfNfUf8omPzF5CasQlXzRaVVUppNwP8ogNo5aJ4%3D)

| [](http://links.vivek2024.com/u/click?_t=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_m=316c42af1d2e48be9f441e6abaf633a2&_e=xFgV7JurlI3Kfi5OWlPVaN6sEdOArgxlZSOu1qcJJbbRH-SOHN3Z5pgR0eAnqHSu_I0yFIbhE0_JgNY81DkSMGZPaP7Fe9Yr0jxOsAt0-yTSoXTARVxHrVL57MnrJ8f_lpWiMwHLCaLQIu-bcFwWsqmYpDh2k2lN1Zi_EYSM-Lli3ca6rnH3U6dQtIUG9hSV-CCAwRsFKS4EI-tL7HRRCvUCPFlgYYO41yFjmdXCN6GhtYzI47McHN6KDWSWKsWqKZZoYz5rCen4mrFncQaJw29VfZCYLJDa8QEcJ2L-xa307yyVGeoBMr7GF5T9EQtNCD3nVzcbW3T-IWxKMFo5b_mQQyTHbmRTA8FIAO5aXAytplg_TsVkoIXil3gXTUOauhgIR4MsV_YTDpydFt98IA%3D%3D)
**TRUTH: The nuclear family is the greatest form of governance known to mankind.**
Fellow American,

My two parents who brought me into this world and my wife, Apoorva, and our two sons, are the most important people in my life. Family is a grounding institution, one that matters and is worth preserving.

I have talked about how America is losing its sense of national identity and losing our ability to believe in God — we absolutely cannot lose and degrade the importance of family. The fabric of our country is built on the love and care we give to future generations and in making sure our country continues to thrive with each passing year, not just election cycles.

| [** FOR OUR FUTURE GENERATIONS **](http://links.vivek2024.com/u/click?_t=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_m=316c42af1d2e48be9f441e6abaf633a2&_e=xFgV7JurlI3Kfi5OWlPVaN6sEdOArgxlZSOu1qcJJbbRH-SOHN3Z5pgR0eAnqHSu_I0yFIbhE0_JgNY81DkSMGZPaP7Fe9Yr0jxOsAt0-yTSoXTARVxHrVL57MnrJ8f_lpWiMwHLCaLQIu-bcFwWsqmYpDh2k2lN1Zi_EYSM-Lli3ca6rnH3U6dQtIUG9hSV-CCAwRsFKS4EI-tL7HRRCvUCPFlgYYO41yFjmdXCN6GhtYzI47McHN6KDWSWKsWqgMOz3LGsFnCzhWJCeUV6LqS9wcU0yeFGIH40MUmp2mVMTOIjV3_5ySvfTgjT7Ui08HR4ZZutqdbbLuAOGwWJd5IRhrC9Na4lsLMhKsDTfcCG_br5USQLyu3ccqHoCDP0XFprSXu8eCXhq7pcF-ey1w%3D%3D)
---

We’ve gotten lazy just being against the other side, forgetting what we actually stand for. The nuclear family is the foundation of a flourishing nation. I have loved meeting the families who come in droves to our campaign events. We all want a better opportunity for our future generations and children.

[**I refuse to continue letting my sons grow up in a country where many people cannot even answer what it means to be an American. Our family’s top mission in the White House: revive our national character and the importance of the family institution. Apoorva and I are ready for the challenge.**](http://links.vivek2024.com/u/click?_t=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_m=316c42af1d2e48be9f441e6abaf633a2&_e=xFgV7JurlI3Kfi5OWlPVaN6sEdOArgxlZSOu1qcJJbbRH-SOHN3Z5pgR0eAnqHSu_I0yFIbhE0_JgNY81DkSMGZPaP7Fe9Yr0jxOsAt0-yTSoXTARVxHrVL57MnrJ8f_lpWiMwHLCaLQIu-bcFwWsqmYpDh2k2lN1Zi_EYSM-Lli3ca6rnH3U6dQtIUG9hSV-CCAwRsFKS4EI-tL7HRRCvUCPFlgYYO41yFjmdXCN6GhtYzI47McHN6KDWSWKsWqZOgXPVXQojzr9bLlV_VEDSqxbpRZsuhJqJpEgA3doppmfcMoScCpZ4HXDwd54yeGdf1QdQ5I6rnWlUd2sPHQdgNIolM-u10agDBWLG_ima28iAKEDXobv4lYvYpkbVWLk7P6OhTXZnnr7efuYzHL0Q%3D%3D)

We won’t be able to save what’s worth saving in this country if we do not first fight for the institution of the family.

Thank you,

[](http://links.vivek2024.com/u/click?_t=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_m=316c42af1d2e48be9f441e6abaf633a2&_e=xFgV7JurlI3Kfi5OWlPVaN6sEdOArgxlZSOu1qcJJbbRH-SOHN3Z5pgR0eAnqHSu_I0yFIbhE0_JgNY81DkSMGZPaP7Fe9Yr0jxOsAt0-yTSoXTARVxHrVL57MnrJ8f_lpWiMwHLCaLQIu-bcFwWsqmYpDh2k2lN1Zi_EYSM-Lli3ca6rnH3U6dQtIUG9hSV-CCAwRsFKS4EI-tL7HRRCvUCPFlgYYO41yFjmdXCN6GhtYzI47McHN6KDWSWKsWq6OAFfcrHyPpGf_4WJi_tPJw2keqTY1gQ8LUDoTIMlK9Xnj4ZHz-QOsAfgnQdOzMvdWrOELkQZDAHTGAukNyFroTGJ9Ae5okDdc3cXr7T9nKzfO1hRRXR8AhO7C1wdpBPGKlrKdj5JWQC3xuGkQOprA%3D%3D)
Vivek Ramaswamy

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

National Republicans already launched a 5-figure digital ad buy attacking Tammy and a right-wing megamillionaire is waiting in the wings to enter our race — ready to spend at up to $20 million to unseat Tammy.
We need to build the resources required to defend a toss-up state like Wisconsin and protect our Democratic majority. We can’t afford to slow down for even a second, so we’re asking:

I'm proud of the work that I've done
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76657321/448074011/1820369458?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk599-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzBhMzU5YjAtN2FhZC1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzN2RhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=iCSC4fd4siRzOzvBMT9T22T9YA1qkuD-kAshMYZwiek=)
Hi, friend, thank you for being a part of this grassroots team to flip Florida blue. Your support truly means so much to me.
**I want to take a moment to tell you a bit about my record and why I'm in this race.[(Polling data shows that this race is tied, so if you're already all in to flip Florida blue, you can make a gift here.)](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76657322/448074012/1820369458?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk599-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzBhMzU5YjAtN2FhZC1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzN2RhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=iCSC4fd4siRzOzvBMT9T22T9YA1qkuD-kAshMYZwiek=)**
My mother brought my sisters and me to America when I was 14 to give us a chance at a better life. It took long hours, hard work, and a whole lot of hope, but we were able to win our American Dream. **That's why I made the decision to spend my career giving back to this incredible country and the state that gave me so much.**
I worked at several nonprofit organizations across Florida, helping to **protect our wildlife and preserve our coral reefs**. During my time working at Florida International University, I helped lead a new program to **improve access to affordable health care for** more Floridians.
In 2018, I decided to take these fights to Washington. I ran for Congress in a tough battleground district — and I won. In the House, **I wrote the bill to expand seniors’ Medicare Advantage coverage,** to ensure that more Americans could get the vital care they deserve. I also worked with Republicans to provide **economic relief to families and small businesses** and secured $200 million for **Everglades restoration. **
Throughout my time in Congress, **I fought tirelessly for commonsense gun safety reforms** , serving as the vice chair of the Gun Violence Prevention Task Force. This issue is deeply personal to me: When I was 24, my father died from gun violence. After leaving Congress, I joined Gabby Giffords' advocacy group as a senior advisor and continued to fight for safer communities and an end to the gun lobby's grip on Washington.
I'm incredibly proud of the work that I've done to uplift and protect my community. I'll never hide from my record. But I don't think that my opponent can say the same. **Rick Scott has spent his time in power writing the plan to cut Social Security and Medicare, attempting to undermine our elections, attacking our rights, and making it harder for working families to get ahead**. It's no wonder his approval ratings are tanking.
**My opponent is ranked as one of the most vulnerable senators on the ballot this year, but I can only defeat him with strong, early grassroots support.[So please, if you have anything extra to spare, will you make a donation to help me hit my critical $75,000 fundraising goal so we can defeat Rick Scott and win a better future for Florida? I'm counting on you to have my back tonight.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76657323/448074013/1820369458?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk599-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzBhMzU5YjAtN2FhZC1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzN2RhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=iCSC4fd4siRzOzvBMT9T22T9YA1qkuD-kAshMYZwiek=)**

Debbie Mucarsel-Powell is a Floridian, South American immigrant, mother, and former Congresswoman. She’s dedicated her life to uplifting working families, ending gun violence, and fighting for her community. Now, she’s running to defeat Republican Senator Rick Scott and win a better, brighter future for Florida.
