clean_body: I'm proud of the work that I've done | | | = Hi, friend, thank you for being a part of this grassroots team to flip Florida blue. Your support truly means so much to me. I want to take a moment to tell you a bit about my record and why I'm in this race.= My mother brought my sisters and me to America when I was 14 to give us a chance at a better life. It took long hours, hard work, and a whole lot of hope, but we were able to win our American Dream. That's why I made the decision to spend my career giving back to this incredible country and the state that gave me so much. I worked at several nonprofit organizations across Florida, helping to protect our wildlife and preserve our coral reefs. During my time working at Florida International University, I helped lead a new program to improve access to affordable health care for more Floridians. In 2018, I decided to take these fights to Washington. I ran for Congress in a tough battleground district — and I won. In the House, I wrote the bill to expand seniors’ Medicare Advantage coverage, to ensure that more Americans could get the vital care they deserve. I also worked with Republicans to provide economic relief to families and small businesses and secured $200 million for Everglades restoration. Throughout my time in Congress, I fought tirelessly for commonsense gun safety reforms , serving as the vice chair of the Gun Violence Prevention Task Force. This issue is deeply personal to me: When I was 24, my father died from gun violence. After leaving Congress, I joined Gabby Giffords' advocacy group as a senior advisor and continued to fight for safer communities and an end to the gun lobby's grip on Washington. I'm incredibly proud of the work that I've done to uplift and protect my community. I'll never hide from my record. But I don't think that my opponent can say the same. Rick Scott has spent his time in power writing the plan to cut Social Security and Medicare, attempting to undermine our elections, attacking our rights, and making it harder for working families to get ahead. It's no wonder his approval ratings are tanking. My opponent is ranked as one of the most vulnerable senators on the ballot this year, but I can only defeat him with strong, early grassroots support.= If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = Thank you, Debbie Mucarsel-Powell | * | | | = Debbie Mucarsel-Powell is a Floridian, South American immigrant, mother, and former Congresswoman. She’s dedicated her life to uplifting working families, ending gun violence, and fighting for her community. Now, she’s running to defeat Republican Senator Rick Scott and win a better, brighter future for Florida.

subject: BREAKING: Lauren Boebert is running against me in CO-04
body:
Boebert is moving to my district and I’m the Democrat running against her

| | | [ ](https://www.shrewsburyforsenate.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_4EuiRHvEQu_OzjBiZlAGzs2u921EReiR88ARqrt5HWpbBPunnEofCMh9dr_AFzKQfx8vejx5N31n4SF27iTzhY&e=835c7faa13004566534194ac192acb50&utm_source=shrewsburyforsenate&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=split_email_with_ike&n=1)
---
Friend\- it’s Ike McCorkle, my friend and fellow Marine Zach Shrewsbury who is running for the U.S. Senate in West Virginia asked me to reach out to you with this breaking news.
---
[ ](https://www.shrewsburyforsenate.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_4EuiRHvEQu_OzjBiZlAGzsxrY9gZGFlNMRtFlk2lAxilEDHn8Y_nPvvwiOHZAH7Cg&e=835c7faa13004566534194ac192acb50&utm_source=shrewsburyforsenate&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=split_email_with_ike&n=2)
---
I am the Democrat who has been running to flip Colorado’s 4th Congressional district blue since 2020 and as a retired Marine Corps Officer and Purple Heart recipient -**I am ready for a fight**. Lauren Boebert is beyond vulnerable and has _no ties to this district_ \- we have name recognition, over 22,000 grassroots donations, and a coalition of thousands of volunteers and supporters from across the district and state. **Beating Boebert on our home turf is how we finally get her out of Congress.** We are now taking on one of the GOP’s biggest fundraisers and we need to supercharge our fundraising _immediately_. Friend[, can I count on you to rush a split donation between me and Zach to flip this district blue, beat Boebert, and get Zach elected in WV?](https://www.shrewsburyforsenate.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_4EuiRHvEQu_OzjBiZlAGzsxrY9gZGFlNMRtFlk2lAxilEDHn8Y_nPvvwiOHZAH7Cg&e=835c7faa13004566534194ac192acb50&utm_source=shrewsburyforsenate&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=split_email_with_ike&n=3)

He's using the full force of the executive branch to defend reproductive rights whenever and wherever possible. He passed the most substantive gun violence prevention reform in decades, made health care more affordable for millions of Americans and signed a series of executive orders to make our communities even safer. name: Maria Elvira Salazar
subject: I start each day with prayer
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Salazar for Congress
body:
| | | Fellow American, I start everyday with a prayer. My strong faith comes from my parents who relied on the power of prayer when they fled Cuba. I pray everyday for my daughters, our country, and for those still suffering under socialism across the world. **Right now, America is in a faith crisis. body:
My name is Mazi Pilip- I'm the GOP candidate in the NY special election

| |
---
| | | | [](http://links.theusapatriots.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=db04b9c4d1dc44d8aab41354bd6678f3&_e=WpX1mEMC6cAQn7F7UI7yfnLM8Lx8M2tNBovZYlTuYmEzj3G8dFSnmSk1GLQIEG8iXRCZX069wAF5kUaDtla8zUeDO0WSRgfifXC2onAhcfid8hy3GplyshpsNFtfnAkzapeE1OBuYKgmzENxHfATemqsDCXmuCIK7oBCuq5AeB0mF9xqdhSzlCxfBfRHQZJcXIFEhxtpi3eczMgPJCQrwWO7G4WUntmVJGEHzn5rOES_gaLBJyA7hvgGymlYc7JyFtCUICv27lfwIN1X0U7o9FcF-B2qbNIXbr1n_9gz9jbo6zz9Fx7edH6HWPRn37SMhsfvr7fv8hJrKteY1RVrSucRZv8ePR4NAvi9upM6zublIrten9xXCyS4jr2DAvdCEkx4FOMeqX49gmzQ01oA0vgxuxkVXDOQTEVVnMUDZqIFJr6MTo0s9MjwIFhmYjP6)
---

Friend,

I never thought I'd have running water, let alone be running for Congress.

My name is Mazi Melesa Pilip, but you can call me Mazi for short!

I'm the Republican nominee running in the New York special election that was just declared.

If you don't already know- this is the one & only seat we absolutely have to win to defend the House Majority.

I'm a black, Jewish woman & I'm not afraid to tell you that I am 100% Pro-Law Enforcement, Pro-Border security, and Pro-Family.

Democrats & the liberal media have spent years saying the GOP will never support someone of my ethnicity & my creed.

They say women like me don't exist & that we can't be any of those things.

And now they're spending millions to bury me in negative headlines, hit pieces, and TV commercials.

They take great pleasure in laying waste to minority women who don't fall in line with their sacred narrative.

And without your help today- I'm afraid I'm going to be one of them.

The only way to stop them is to come out of the gates strong with the full weight and might of the conservative movement behind me.

---
| [](http://links.theusapatriots.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=db04b9c4d1dc44d8aab41354bd6678f3&_e=WpX1mEMC6cAQn7F7UI7yfnLM8Lx8M2tNBovZYlTuYmEzj3G8dFSnmSk1GLQIEG8iXRCZX069wAF5kUaDtla8zUeDO0WSRgfifXC2onAhcfid8hy3GplyshpsNFtfnAkzapeE1OBuYKgmzENxHfATemqsDCXmuCIK7oBCuq5AeB0mF9xqdhSzlCxfBfRHQZJcXIFEhxtpi3eczMgPJCQrwWO7G4WUntmVJGEHzn5rOES_gaLBJyA7hvgGymlYc7JyFtCUICv27lfwIN1X0U7o9FcF-B2qbNIXbr1n_9gz9jZUQ8m_5gDou-BWYQOsv7q-0_Bxm_NERT0_Dddf_HlmsOz1E0ebI6m9rdW-WQh3kb2KsVe7FR4yIhH1o6b3r28zvCsKLf06AfV591GI6UcfL5DupXiZ2hnrhv-rLYlvmgZVrD6fERdJMVZLtw1iXLDn)
---

I've just launched my campaign to keep NY-03 red & so I'm humbly asking you to stand with me as we embark on this sprint to the finish line.

---
| | [STAND WITH MAZI PILIP TODAY](http://links.theusapatriots.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=db04b9c4d1dc44d8aab41354bd6678f3&_e=WpX1mEMC6cAQn7F7UI7yfnLM8Lx8M2tNBovZYlTuYmEzj3G8dFSnmSk1GLQIEG8iXRCZX069wAF5kUaDtla8zUeDO0WSRgfifXC2onAhcfid8hy3GplyshpsNFtfnAkzapeE1OBuYKgmzENxHfATemqsDCXmuCIK7oBCuq5AeB0mF9xqdhSzlCxfBfRHQZJcXIFEhxtpi3eczMgPJCQrwWO7G4WUntmVJGEHzn5rOES_gaLBJyA7hvgGymlYc7JyFtCUICv27lfwIN1X0U7o9FcF-B2qbNIXbr1n_9gz9jZnOpiytSF-wBRnZ33bYBkMEpuB5faGe5rbT7EXL6M9t7VrN7ByPNMi92ogbsVL14RpRCzxUHqg5zx1GS0AZuaV7ahr7XQYNTOjpEXthW6Lp2adz6ZAMob8H-OyVEiu3YmlVgv0NOuTJCyelKpPS9t_)

Early voting begins in just a few weeks. Voters are already planning to head to the polls & that makes this the most important race in the nation right now.

I hope you'll step up & stand with me today to defeat the Democrats & hold the House Majority.

---
| | [STAND WITH MAZI PILIP TODAY](http://links.theusapatriots.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=db04b9c4d1dc44d8aab41354bd6678f3&_e=WpX1mEMC6cAQn7F7UI7yfnLM8Lx8M2tNBovZYlTuYmEzj3G8dFSnmSk1GLQIEG8iXRCZX069wAF5kUaDtla8zUeDO0WSRgfifXC2onAhcfid8hy3GplyshpsNFtfnAkzapeE1OBuYKgmzENxHfATemqsDCXmuCIK7oBCuq5AeB0mF9xqdhSzlCxfBfRHQZJcXIFEhxtpi3eczMgPJCQrwWO7G4WUntmVJGEHzn5rOES_gaLBJyA7hvgGymlYc7JyFtCUICv27lfwIN1X0U7o9FcF-B2qbNIXbr1n_9gz9jaxTyNe3nNXXfADANiISbX4P_xyAhvq2hD_kHvdrOWPXPsyOSZp7u1EjZ6ySqu6aD37w2qBqkwIcsKlzS0UnaftZN92kfjzxAF6IXqo9cr6ebWPb7Y7tyV7brO6MrB8rKwIxl3HxiJ1n0AAoZBgzhe-)

clean_body: My name is Mazi Pilip- I'm the GOP candidate in the NY special election | | | | | | Friend, I never thought I'd have running water, let alone be running for Congress. My name is Mazi Melesa Pilip, but you can call me Mazi for short! I'm the Republican nominee running in the New York special election that was just declared. If you don't already know- this is the one & only seat we absolutely have to win to defend the House Majority. I'm a black, Jewish woman & I'm not afraid to tell you that I am 100% Pro-Law Enforcement, Pro-Border security, and Pro-Family. Democrats & the liberal media have spent years saying the GOP will never support someone of my ethnicity & my creed. They say women like me don't exist & that we can't be any of those things. And now they're spending millions to bury me in negative headlines, hit pieces, and TV commercials. They take great pleasure in laying waste to minority women who don't fall in line with their sacred narrative. And without your help today- I'm afraid I'm going to be one of them. The only way to stop them is to come out of the gates strong with the full weight and might of the conservative movement behind me. | I've just launched my campaign to keep NY-03 red & so I'm humbly asking you to stand with me as we embark on this sprint to the finish line. | | Early voting begins in just a few weeks. Voters are already planning to head to the polls & that makes this the most important race in the nation right now. I hope you'll step up & stand with me today to defeat the Democrats & hold the House Majority. | | - And if I can ever help you the way you've helped me, please just say the word. All the best, Mazi Melesa Pilip GOP Nominee Special Election NY-03 | | | Paid for by Mazi Pilip for Congress 228 S Washington St STE 115 Alexandria, VA 22314

---|---
Peter,

Last year, a Trump-appointed federal judge ordered the FDA to reverse its approval of mifepristone, a safe and essential abortion medication. Though the initial lawsuit was filed by an anti-choice extremist group in Texas, it threatened abortion access in _all 50 states_.

A couple weeks later, the Supreme Court issued a stay that has preserved access to mifepristone until it reaches a formal decision. **Now, the conservative-packed Court is scheduled to hear oral arguments soon and issue a decision on mifepristone's FDA status in the summer of 2024 — exactly two years after they issued their decision to overturn _Roe v. Wade._**

This is _exactly_ what Republicans were hoping would happen when they packed the Supreme Court with justices who would further a dangerous anti-choice agenda. Millions of Americans' fundamental rights depend on the whims of a Court they did not elect and do not trust.

****We're running a live poll to find out what this community thinks about the Court, and we want to hear from you, Peter. Make your voice heard by taking our short survey now:****
****Do you support access to medication abortion (mifepristone)?****

# FROM THE DESK OF ALAN DERSHOWITZ
---
| | Dear Peter,I am a lifelong supporter and defender of Israel. I do so on moral grounds, because of our shared values and because she has many vicious enemies. In particular, I've found much of the mainstream press coverage of Israel to be appalling. It's often misleading, inaccurate, and just plain biased. **Now, as Israel faces a desperate fight for its future, I’ve increasingly found myself turning to the outstanding and unique coverage of The New York Sun**.
---

---
| | The Sun takes the side of right over popular. I consider the Sun to be one of Israel’s most ardent defenders in the American press. It’s for this reason that when I have something to say, I often turn to the Sun. They have carried a number of my columns since the attack on October 7th (I've written many). **The voice of the Sun is precious and far too rare.** I’ve been impressed by its impact and influence, but I know it is the David in this battle, facing many Goliaths. It’s a battle that the Sun must win and I have pledged my support.**The Sun’s success will be a triumph over falsehood**. To succeed, we need you to join. I highly encourage you to become a member of the Sun today.
---

subject: I want to hear from you

body:
| Your opinions will help us better understand the issues that matter most to you, your family, and your community.
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=4996%2E5257348%2EAw8wdy)
Derek — We’re less than two months away from the Primary Election, and my team and I put together this survey for you to share your thoughts with me.
[**Will you take my Election Year Priorities Survey? It’ll only take a moment of your time!**](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1023?c0=engagement-20240107-election-year-issues-survey.ywmKyz&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_SUR_AC90_20240107_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=4&akid=4996%2E5257348%2EAw8wdy)
[TAKE THE SURVEY](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1023?c0=engagement-20240107-election-year-issues-survey.ywmKyz&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_SUR_AC90_20240107_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=5&akid=4996%2E5257348%2EAw8wdy)
---
Your opinions will help us better understand the issues that matter most to you, your family, and your community.
I believe that every voice matters. It’s why I want to hear from you. It’s why we are not accepting corporate PAC contributions and have built such a massive people-powered campaign. It’s why having a truly grassroots team is so important to me, Derek.
The information you provide will help my team and me plan on how to reach more voters ahead of the Primary Election, as well as how to amplify the message we are sharing with voters.
[**So, will you take a minute or two to fill out our Priorities Survey? Hearing directly from you is the best way I can address your top issues — so I appreciate anything you can add.**](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1023?c0=engagement-20240107-election-year-issues-survey.ywmKyz&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_SUR_AC90_20240107_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=6&akid=4996%2E5257348%2EAw8wdy)

Thank you for your input, Derek.
— Adam

name: Shift WA
subject: Top News: The 2024 legislative session
body:
The 2024 legislative session begins this week! And, as we prepare for the chaos in Olympia (and the national title game), we hope to keep you up-to-date with an item or two of interest last week from your own backyard. | | [](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/62663525:WA9PLoiNK:m:1:2610672541:51DA11D1194B8377C00C6859CFC96217:r "Shift Washington")
---
| Friends,

The 2024 legislative session begins this week! And, as we prepare for the chaos in Olympia (and the national title game), we hope to keep you up-to-date with an item or two of interest last week from your own backyard. Read on...

**This week 's Newsmaker Interview...**
State Senator Drew MacEwen (LD-35) joined us for this week's Newsmaker Interview. Serving as the ranking Republican on the Senate Environment, Energy, and Technology Committee, MacEwen discussed his strategy for the 2024 legislative session, and his aim to thwart misguided Democrat proposals, including bans on natural gas and rent control. Despite Republicans being in the minority, Sen. MacEwan expressed hope for bipartisan collaboration on key issues such as public safety and affordability. Also a Congressional candidate in the 6th District, he outlined his priorities if elected to Congress, focusing on national security, budget reform, and border security. [**Read more**](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/62663526:WA9PLoiNK:m:1:2610672541:51DA11D1194B8377C00C6859CFC96217:r).

**A pre-session survey ...**
With the start of the 2024 legislative session, we want to hear your thoughts on the critical issues facing our state! Please take our survey and give us your input on the most pressing issue that state lawmakers should address during the upcoming 2024 legislative session. The issues under consideration include public safety, affordability, education, and the Let's Go Washigton initiatives. [**Take the survey now**](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/62663527:WA9PLoiNK:m:1:2610672541:51DA11D1194B8377C00C6859CFC96217:r).

**This week 's top story...**
The Washington Policy Center's Todd Myers recently revealed, based on documents from Inslee's own administrative sources, that despite the governor's claims otherwise, he has long known that taxing CO2 emissions was known to significantly increase gasoline and natural gas prices. Myers relied on the governor's chief policy advisor, and a Senior Policy Advisor from the environmental group Climate Solutions, who admitted a decade ago that raising gas prices was the intended goal of the cap-and-trade policy which Inslee has long promoted. Even the mainstream media has now acknowledged that Inslee has knowingly misled the public, and now documents from 2014 further contradict his statements about the minimal impact of his carbon tax on gas prices. [**Read this story and more**](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/62663528:WA9PLoiNK:m:1:2610672541:51DA11D1194B8377C00C6859CFC96217:r).

**In case you missed it ...**
In Shift's annual interview with a legislative leader before the start of the session, we interviewed Senate Republican Leader John Braun from Centralia, who serves the 20th Legislative District in Southwest Washington. In his interview, Senator Braun outlined the three policy areas his caucus will focus on during the upcoming session (which commences on January 8). He also discussed the initiatives to the legislature that Let's Go Washington has delivered. Senator Braun shared his thoughts on the learning loss suffered by public education students during Governor Inslee's unilateral decision to unnecessarily force kids to stay in unproductive distance learning situations longer than anywhere else in the country. Finally, the GOP Senate Leader explained his views on the state budget, parental rights, and what more the legislature can do to repair the state's criminal justice system after recent Democrat laws led to skyrocketing crime rates and more crime victims. [**Read more**](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/62663529:WA9PLoiNK:m:1:2610672541:51DA11D1194B8377C00C6859CFC96217:r).

**Your bit of inspiration for the week ...**
Enjoy the beauty of Mt. Rainier, as photographed by former U.S. Rep. Rod Chandler. **** | [ DONATE ](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/62663530:WA9PLoiNK:m:1:2610672541:51DA11D1194B8377C00C6859CFC96217:r)
---
****
|
This message was intended for: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com) and sent from Shift Washington. If you would like to send this message to some of your friends, you can [click here](http://click.shiftwa.org/forwardthis/ft.php?mID=14386969&em=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&ch=49000b887de404a22f48ed48dd2d4356&schema=echo3) to do so.

You can also stay up to date on our efforts to shift the debate in Washington State by following us on [Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/shiftwa/) & [Twitter](https://twitter.com/ShiftWA). If you believe you received this message in error or no longer wish to receive emails from Shift Washington, [click to unsubscribe](http://click.shiftwa.org/p/oWA9PLoiNK).
---

name: News Team @ Our Revolution
subject: Revolution Report: Lee, Tlaib on Ceasefire, progressive strategy in 2024, and more!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

INSIDER NEWS FROM THE FRONTLINES OF THE POLITICAL REVOLUTION

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

HEADLINES: 2024 Kick-Off! | Peace for All Town Hall w/ Barbara Lee &
Rashida Tlaib | Fight the Filibuster w/ Jeff Merkley | 2024 Path Forward
for Progressives w/ Larry Cohen | Education for All w/ Barbara Lee | &
MORE!

★ ★ ★

THE PATH FOR PROGRESSIVES IN 2024

2024 is officially underway, and Progressives continue to lead a national
call for Peace as thousands of Palestinian civilians and children are
being killed in Gaza.

As we fight to end this horrible violence, we must also work to save
American democracy this election year. Trump is surging in the polls
despite 91 criminal charges — but our work to bar this Insurrectionist
from the ballot is gaining momentum state by state.

Our Revolution is building out our organizing machine to make sure we
defeat the far right up and down the ballot, while taking back the House
and electing powerful progressives like Rep. Barbara Lee to the U.S.
Senate.

We must also defend the progressives we’ve fought so hard to put in office
and grow the largest Congressional Progressive Caucus in history.

AIPAC lobbyists are already preparing to spend more than $100 MILLION to
try to unseat some of our strongest peace champions in Congress, including
Rashida Tlaib, Ilhan Omar, Cori Bush, Summer Lee, and others.

Progressives who are under attack for demanding a Ceasefire. Help Our
Revolution have their backs and make sure our most powerful anti-war
voices are not silenced by big money in 2024.

With a monthly membership donation of at least $5 or a one-time $10 gift,
we will send you the Defend Peace/Defend Democracy sticker above with our
gratitude.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13381?t=1011&akid=5150%2E5885482%2Em0W8Is ]GET YOUR PEACE STICKER

★ ★ ★

On Thursday, U.S. Reps. Barbara Lee and Rashida Tlaib joined Our
Revolution activists from around the country for a powerful discussion on
the urgent need for a Ceasefire at our Peace for All Town Hall.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13190?t=1012&akid=5150%2E5885482%2Em0W8Is ]WATCH THE TOWN HALL HERE

Not only did we lift up the call for Peace, but we dug into real
diplomatic and legislative solutions — including Bernie’s call to halt
more than $10 billion in military funding for the rightwing Netanyahu
government.

We hope you’ll add your voice to stand with Bernie and show the strength
of our demand: The U.S. government must stop using our tax money to fund
this brutal war against the Palestinian people. Not one more dollar.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13261?t=1013&akid=5150%2E5885482%2Em0W8Is ]SIGN THE PETITION

★ ★ ★

U.S. Rep. Barbara Lee has been on the forefront calling for a Ceasefire
and is one the most courageous anti-war advocates in all of Congress —
just one of many reasons Our Revolution is working so hard to elect her to
the Senate.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13280?t=1014&akid=5150%2E5885482%2Em0W8Is ]Jewish Insider mentioned Barbara’s “unequivocal ceasefire in Gaza” and
how it’s garnering progressive support in their reporting on Our
Revolution’s Peace for All Town Hall.

Barbara has actually visited refugee camps in the Middle East and nearly
stepped on a cluster bomb in Lebanon — later, finding a bomb casing that
read “Made in the USA.”

“I came to understand the dynamics and the United State’s role in the
Middle East,” she said. “And, since then, wherever I am or what platform I
have, I’m going to fight for peace and security for people no matter where
they live — Gaza, Ukraine, and our own communities.”

“I believe in security, but I don’t believe in taking our resources and
tax dollars to enrich arms dealers that are scamming the system and
creating war,” Barbara told us.

We all know about Barbara’s lone vote in Congress against the
authorization to give President Bush nearly unlimited war powers to go
into the disastrous conflicts in Iraq and Afghanistan — a vote that
resulted in death threats at the time but was vindicated by history.

But Barbara is also the only candidate running for Senate in California
who voted against the PATRIOT Act and drone strikes in Libya — and always
votes to slash the bloated Pentagon budget. She also serves as co-chair of
the Global Peace and Security Task Force in the Progressive Caucus.

★ ★ ★

Our Revolution was proud to announce our endorsement of U.S. Rep. Rashida
Tlaib — we’ve had her back since the beginning, and we’re going to fight
against the dark money targeting her in her race for re-election in 2024.

Rashida is the daughter of Palestinian immigrants and one of our most
fearless progressive leaders in Congress — always standing on principle
for peace, people, and planet no matter the cost.

Rashida was recently censured by her rightwing colleagues in the House of
Representatives for her outspoken advocacy for the Ceasefire — but she’s
not backing down!

“This is about speaking truth to power no matter if our voice is shaking,”
she told our Peace Town Hall on Thursday. “We can’t stop fighting to save
lives. The answer to war crimes is not more war crimes.”

The Resolution for a Ceasefire introduced by Rep. Tlaib and Rep. Cori Bush
has grown in support from 13 to more than 60 members of Congress and we
must keep going.

Rashida emphasized the importance of outside organizing to pressure
elected leaders to do the right thing. “Every time I see all of you out
there — whether it’s rallying or standing outside district offices or
making calls to your reps — it all makes a difference and it just makes me
cry,” she said, welling up with tears.

★ ★ ★

You won’t want to miss this deep dive into the filibuster and democracy —
join U.S. Senator Jeff Merkley and U.S. Rep. Barbara Lee in conversation
on Our Revolution’s LIVE National Organize-to-Win Call on Wednesday, Jan.
10th!

Progressives are leading the fight for a government and an economy that
works for all of us — that means ending the racist relic of the filibuster
and delivering material change for people’s lives.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13316?t=1015&akid=5150%2E5885482%2Em0W8Is ]RSVP HERE

On the call, we will dive into Sen. Merkley’s new book “Filibustered: How
to Fix the Broken Senate and Save America” — and offer signed copies at a
special price!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13367?t=1016&akid=5150%2E5885482%2Em0W8Is ]ORDER YOUR BOOK HERE

★ ★ ★

If you’re in the Bay Area on Martin Luther King Day, we would love for you
to join Our Revolution and Barbara Lee for a LIVE in-person Town Hall on
Education for All.

Barbara will lay out her plans for education and removing barriers for
young people and people of all ages to get the knowledge and training they
need to succeed in life.

This event will kick off at 6 pm on Jan. 16th, and we will be joined by
California State Superintendent of Public Instruction Tony Thurmond and
Our Revolution’s local chapter, San Francisco Education Alliance!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13106?t=1017&akid=5150%2E5885482%2Em0W8Is ]RSVP HERE

★ ★ ★

Join Our Revolution for this year’s Reducing the Threat of Nuclear War
Conference — one of the nation’s most significant gatherings of Nuclear
Disarmament advocates, led by Massachusetts Peace Action.

Guest speakers will include U.S. Rep. Ro Khanna, Our Revolution Board
Chair Larry Cohen, Shailly Gupta Barnes of the Poor Peoples Campaign, and
many other leading peace advocates from around the country.

We are in a period of unusual danger and difficulty: The Russia/Ukraine
conflict has sharply increased the danger of nuclear war; The tragic
Israel/Gaza Conflict threatens to expand; The Pentagon budget is higher
than ever and still going up; Cold Warriors in high places are beating the
drums of war toward Russia and China; And, within the US right wing forces
are working to weaken voting rights and representative democracy.

We must keep the candle lit for peace.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13111?t=1018&akid=5150%2E5885482%2Em0W8Is ]RSVP HERE

★ ★ ★

Every seat matters. That’s why Our Revolution is gearing up NOW for 2024
to expand our organizational capacity and our voter turnout operation for
the crucial battles to come.

Not only must we defeat Donald Trump and the far right, but we have got to
take back the House, defeat enemies of progress like Kyrsten Sinema in the
Senate, and elect amazing progressives like Barbara Lee to turn this ship
around.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13379?t=1019&akid=5150%2E5885482%2Em0W8Is ]If you can, please kick in a few bucks to help us staff up for the big
elections ahead in 2024 — there’s no time to waste!

★ ★ ★

In September of 2001, Barbara Lee cast the lone “No” vote in Congress
against a blank check for war in Afghanistan. She endured death threats,
hate mail, and media slander for years. But history vindicated her.

Today, Barbara Lee is the only candidate for U.S. Senate in California
calling for a ceasefire in Gaza. Check out this [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/12238?t=1020&akid=5150%2E5885482%2Em0W8Is ]LA Times article on
why Barbara is the Peace Candidate in this race compared to her opponents,
Katie Porter and Adam Schiff.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/12373?t=1021&akid=5150%2E5885482%2Em0W8Is ]JOIN PROGRESSIVES FOR BARBARA LEE

★ ★ ★

You can help elect Barbara Lee from anywhere in the country by making
calls as part of Our Revolution’s Phone Bank Team. It’s a lot of fun, but
this is serious business because we know what it would mean to get a
powerhouse like Barbara in the U.S. Senate!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/12528?t=1022&akid=5150%2E5885482%2Em0W8Is ]PHONE BANK FOR BARBARA LEE

★ ★ ★

We know what we’re fighting for, but we need to share the message far and
wide. Get your new Our Revolution T-shirt and advocate for our progressive
values everywhere you go!

We are proud to stand up for Education for All, Racial Justice,
Reproductive Rights, Medicare for All, Economic Justice, Labor Rights,
Housing for All, Environmental Justice, LGBT+ Rights, and so much more. In
short: JUSTICE FOR ALL.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8510?t=1023&akid=5150%2E5885482%2Em0W8Is ]GET YOUR NEW SHIRT TODAY!

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13011?source=email-20240107&amount=&t=1024&akid=5150%2E5885482%2Em0W8Is ][IMG]

From boots on the ground to the halls of Congress — we are building an
organized progressive movement at every level of government. If you’re
already a member of Our Revolution, THANK YOU! If you’re not yet an
official member, please consider signing up for a recurring monthly
donation today!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13011?source=email-20240107&amount=&t=1025&akid=5150%2E5885482%2Em0W8Is ]PLEASE SUPPORT OUR REVOLUTION

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13011?source=email-20240107&amount=&t=1026&akid=5150%2E5885482%2Em0W8Is ][IMG]

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13011?source=email-20240107&amount=&t=1027&akid=5150%2E5885482%2Em0W8Is ]WHEN WE ORGANIZE, WE WIN!

★ ★ ★

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9?t=1001&akid=5150%2E5885482%2Em0W8Is ]Facebook | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10?t=1002&akid=5150%2E5885482%2Em0W8Is ]Twitter | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/11?t=1003&akid=5150%2E5885482%2Em0W8Is ]Instagram | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2355?t=1004&akid=5150%2E5885482%2Em0W8Is ]Youtube | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2356?t=1005&akid=5150%2E5885482%2Em0W8Is ]Website |
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10247?t=1006&akid=5150%2E5885482%2Em0W8Is ]Sign Up

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13119?c0=email-20240107.EQvG-J&t=1007&akid=5150%2E5885482%2Em0W8Is ]Our membership swag

Our Revolution is the largest entirely grassroots funded progressive
group in America.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13120?c0=email-20240107.QxtvF6&t=1008&akid=5150%2E5885482%2Em0W8Is ]Help us defend democracy and take the fight directly to the
establishment by committing to a recurring donation of just $5 or more a
month!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13121?c0=email-20240107.6a15hu&t=1009&akid=5150%2E5885482%2Em0W8Is ]GIVE MONTHLY

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13122?c0=email-20240107.Ol19AN&t=1010&akid=5150%2E5885482%2Em0W8Is ]GIVE ONCE

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.ourrevolution.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-2/?akid=5150%2E5885482%2Em0W8Is

Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe

PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
PO Box 66208
WASHINGTON, DC, 20035

Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. Our Revolution is a
501(c)(4) organization. Donations to Our Revolution are not deductible as
charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. All donations are
made to support Our Revolution’s general mission and are not designated for
any specific activity.

**This could seriously be one of the last emails I ever send you, Friend.**

I’ll be honest with you, no matter how much it pains me to lay it out.

Things are not looking good for Trump-supporting conservatives like us in 2024, and I need to know how you’ll react to this message to know how to move forward. My next move depends on your response.

My name is JD Vance. If you haven’t heard of me, I’m a Husband, Father, Marine Corps Veteran, Businessman, Author, and Trump Conservative Senator from the great state of Ohio.

I’ve worked hard to serve the people of Ohio in Washington, and I’m never going to be dishonest with you.

**Joe Biden and his Hard-Left Liberal cronies are sending millions and millions of dollars across the country in an attempt to sweep the most important races and eradicate the conservative movement. We can’t let them win.**

**[That’s why I’m reaching out today and humbly asking you for support.](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=9c7245b0c5aa4f37b4ed577557436a5c&_e=1p6o0ITk9IuRA8-ZpZj53Ht7eM_mbtV_FpXZpGl74S9YgmqOWAwqnANJDUiW6hdrFd5CPCvYzQU-uYs5dWWlTf9pmMg0rctyfZlrCGjaSpSlR3noYfIoYK7bbI1Kn-gp82dXUbcGckjVo23VulWIM9GFQ-fJayuDxQflIhKbS6ZqTcNJh3HualhMnp4DhSep4VqWeRT6ITcpyx86bbCw1nV4-3UqRwlKvFAl9vAECX7CC-QiJEfZCJphvb_8or2VT0URr2yaAms_E0yAxwCQwr3-iQW07ppinh9w_-52gcU-4lR2p9SdLWY674HYXEba-eps_9L3XkuQQ-lbQiM3uutAAcRbxRpq7T_IlnwsNJH6rrhIGvzfGN42_fuHZB8QMAO7JQXyWsnluL3UxrNmJJ2qM1XIcq6K-OZG_FEnyvM%3D)**

The Democrats think that the American People are stupid. They’re wrong. I know how tuned in you are to the politics of our country, what needs to be done to turn it around, and how we can get there together.

I hate asking others for help, but there’s no way I can make it on my own. **[So please help me out this one time, friend:](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=9c7245b0c5aa4f37b4ed577557436a5c&_e=1p6o0ITk9IuRA8-ZpZj53Ht7eM_mbtV_FpXZpGl74S9YgmqOWAwqnANJDUiW6hdrFd5CPCvYzQU-uYs5dWWlTf9pmMg0rctyfZlrCGjaSpSlR3noYfIoYK7bbI1Kn-gp82dXUbcGckjVo23VulWIM9GFQ-fJayuDxQflIhKbS6ZqTcNJh3HualhMnp4DhSep4VqWeRT6ITcpyx86bbCw1nV4-3UqRwlKvFAl9vAECX7CC-QiJEfZCJphvb_8or2VsZPT8owQfAbc2tz407TNgHn7ifGz4K1Llew4p-btf3muo4--BvI-ZznAqkXBX_fZ1Pgxcl0RZTtMQs_e9hl_hY3RkawjtbVa2GLXiZiLPEXRUV4qHSskKiR0bMx20-uJy97nJCqXOOlRKIPZyERmGM4sfecEA0Pw2VGbNp4emag%3D)** | [**RUSH A $25 DONATION**](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=9c7245b0c5aa4f37b4ed577557436a5c&_e=1p6o0ITk9IuRA8-ZpZj53Ht7eM_mbtV_FpXZpGl74S9YgmqOWAwqnANJDUiW6hdrFd5CPCvYzQU-uYs5dWWlTf9pmMg0rctyfZlrCGjaSpSlR3noYfIoYK7bbI1Kn-gp82dXUbcGckjVo23VulWIM9GFQ-fJayuDxQflIhKbS6ZqTcNJh3HualhMnp4DhSep4VqWeRT6ITcpyx86bbCw1nV4-3UqRwlKvFAl9vAECX7CC-QiJEfZCJphvb_8or2VgA3gi73r1RUL4WZSFh47Gz3Iqy3FikKQZGkfGVVAK_eoc3h_M8lzaTpc3iP6bzpe4fXGIqtDh2QjxCfvq7Y1gA4zShHhEqEfXM_skqOBYAECR-HuZY8O_fqY_OkGvRdb8MsMUVEsfiWcX_66uYD4MqXiPH0yS6bf1b4e8rTqlMg%3D)

name: Conservatives Give
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us.

This sponsored message from Conservatives Give is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a30cc093acf84a9297a5378e7c336be2&_e=knn8JgwK9vZoNVXJzqqaE_mNS0XsVpitSJP5atzjTYAFsPRTfs13S3_KSJgBmeRV9bYXsxR7rYj5LtCqZ9ZhmZLo9lc3gMSJ8m-LgxB51BNF6qA0bVfRagOFI0GiqkNt2fPmQoraS-rMjTmlftnFTKwZi7n0_ENvGQpylEOWA8QKHSCeOAdsKGyzajaLWc99ttgYrQ6vbrqH81YhnnaXdnkBX5Gh7IpOQsXJJzWJXYsXPbbsIlGaLD2DXTGLCVErFGAMu3QuTM7tY84i4cAU_kdIK4EGJbWapOVftxgmV_DXxFTCQlzCyfasablHuAg2wIsdMMRYmnf0zJESM8ph3vShEsvAG9Uxnr7JEbqlUEtUG1b-sh3F_0mR6gGAVplfaCzbvWyJQb2WoIdJCVGrbFUIIfoKErbcG_G8SYHKQKI%3D) Dear Fellow American,
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we're losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important.
To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled "The Second World Wars."
Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict's diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis.

[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a30cc093acf84a9297a5378e7c336be2&_e=knn8JgwK9vZoNVXJzqqaE_mNS0XsVpitSJP5atzjTYAFsPRTfs13S3_KSJgBmeRV9bYXsxR7rYj5LtCqZ9ZhmZLo9lc3gMSJ8m-LgxB51BNF6qA0bVfRagOFI0GiqkNt2fPmQoraS-rMjTmlftnFTKwZi7n0_ENvGQpylEOWA8QKHSCeOAdsKGyzajaLWc99ttgYrQ6vbrqH81YhnnaXdnkBX5Gh7IpOQsXJJzWJXYsXPbbsIlGaLD2DXTGLCVErFGAMu3QuTM7tY84i4cAU_tEXwi2MPn1zgMAODUzEpQQK4eAQLk5MsJInqpq3NA1MBMKGthlGYk3-zEqX6quD3Ac1DAKv4tBQvrN2IAjoYdi3MXFxq03YRopnx2hhYeqs3xqA9kGVX81d3g3H1dNaU-RduNPvALDg7R_rZGMK9RU%3D) If you'd like to secure a DVD set before they're all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.
Here's a secure link to reserve your copy of "**The Second World Wars** " on DVD:
**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a30cc093acf84a9297a5378e7c336be2&_e=knn8JgwK9vZoNVXJzqqaE_mNS0XsVpitSJP5atzjTYAFsPRTfs13S3_KSJgBmeRV9bYXsxR7rYj5LtCqZ9ZhmZLo9lc3gMSJ8m-LgxB51BNF6qA0bVfRagOFI0GiqkNt2fPmQoraS-rMjTmlftnFTKwZi7n0_ENvGQpylEOWA8QKHSCeOAdsKGyzajaLWc99ttgYrQ6vbrqH81YhnnaXdnkBX5Gh7IpOQsXJJzWJXYsXPbbsIlGaLD2DXTGLCVErFGAMu3QuTM7tY84i4cAU_u14ljh9Xh4OQhrOzFU4j1m0zw-TlOpT_xgZzxWaZKc6ZB3-D_E43cZ_oyuMKfF-M_SJqoN-yAsPrl5dqEJVfClypEJjEX0CZgsDI2ZSgwzgpUaTeR0E_GA_m6eG0vBTqMCYoCnX-WPlGjbEfM7wUSE%3D)**

name: Replace Sinema
subject: Yet another ethics complaint against Sinema

name: Team Lucas Kunce
subject: Jason Kander just endorsed Lucas Kunce.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
Will you join him?
#
**_“For anyone who cares about democracy, reproductive freedom, health care access and working families, this race should be a priority.”_**
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/signup/lk-email-20240107_endorse-lucas?t=1&akid=4554%2E614464%2ERiZq6C)
Peter — that’s what Jason Kander said in his recent endorsement of Lucas Kunce.
**[Will you join Jason in supporting Lucas Kunce in the race against Josh Hawley for Missouri’s U.S. Senate seat by adding your personal endorsement today?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/signup/lk-email-20240107_endorse-lucas?t=2&akid=4554%2E614464%2ERiZq6C)**
**[ENDORSE LUCAS KUNCE](https://act.lucaskunce.com/signup/lk-email-20240107_endorse-lucas?t=3&akid=4554%2E614464%2ERiZq6C)**
As a veteran and Democrat who was elected statewide as Missouri’s secretary of state and then nearly defeated an incumbent GOP U.S. Senator in 2016, Jason Kander knows that Lucas has what it takes to be competitive against Josh Hawley.
And that’s not all. With recent news of Joe Manchin’s retirement — and the growing unpopularity of Josh Hawley among Missouri voters — Jason knows that Missouri’s U.S. Senate race has become our best opportunity to flip a GOP-held seat next year.
**Supporting Lucas Kunce could be your chance to make a real difference in 2024.[So will you join Jason Kander by personally endorsing Lucas today? Every person who adds their name is a powerful signal of strength to the insiders watching our race.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/signup/lk-email-20240107_endorse-lucas?t=4&akid=4554%2E614464%2ERiZq6C)**
**[ENDORSE LUCAS KUNCE](https://act.lucaskunce.com/signup/lk-email-20240107_endorse-lucas?t=5&akid=4554%2E614464%2ERiZq6C)**
Thank you,
Team Lucas Kunce

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lk-email-footer?refcode=em20240107-4554-footer&t=6&refcode2=4554_614464_RiZq6C&akid=4554%2E614464%2ERiZq6C)**

name: Team Deluzio
subject: We're ready for 2024 – are you with us?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHRIS DELUZIO FOR CONGRESS Chris Deluzio is a United States veteran
body:
Derek, we have a lot of work to do.

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76663831/448086816/-1807168276?refcode=wrpr_hdr&ms=230107_team_2024plans&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMDJkNmJlNS04NGFkLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uWPTI7PsTpSZOoVFRVyVWA0wHWXigtmn4MINdwLvNJA=)
---
We have a lot of work to do in 2024, Derek. As one of our top supporters last year, we wanted to make sure you got a sneak peek at our campaign plans in the new year. **On the road to the 2024 election, we're going to do everything we can to flip the House blue, fight for the Common Good in Western PA, and reelect Chris in PA-17. ** We're going to be crisscrossing Western PA, knocking on doors, and running a winning field operation. We're going to speak with local community organizers, union leaders, workers, and small business owners to make sure we're fighting for the Common Good of everyone in PA-17. And we're going to be taking the fight to extremist politicians and their corporate jagoff allies – without backing down. [_**We're ready for a tough 2024, but we need you with us, Derek. name: Josh Shapiro
subject: Pulling this off
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
Hi Peter, it’s Governor Josh Shapiro.
There’s no doubt in my mind that 2024 will be as historic an election year as 2022 was for Pennsylvania. In 2022, we won the Governor’s race, elected John Fetterman to the Senate, and ensured that fundamental freedoms would be protected in our Commonwealth.
**This year, the stakes are even higher.** Extremist Republicans have their sights set on my friend Bob Casey, so I’m reaching out to see if you’ll be one of the 2024 founding donors his Senate campaign needs today.
[**Can you contribute $5 or whatever you can afford right now to be one of Bob Casey’s 2024 Founding Donors?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240107-2?recurring=1&refcode=em20240107-2&refcode2=1619_552475_2qi3HY&akid=1619%2E552475%2E2qi3HY)
_Please use the links in this email to start a monthly donation through ActBlue._
[Donate $15 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240107-2?recurring=1&amount=15&refcode=em20240107-2-el&refcode2=1619_552475_2qi3HY&akid=1619%2E552475%2E2qi3HY) [Donate $25 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240107-2?recurring=1&amount=25&refcode=em20240107-2-el&refcode2=1619_552475_2qi3HY&akid=1619%2E552475%2E2qi3HY) [Donate $50 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240107-2?recurring=1&amount=50&refcode=em20240107-2-el&refcode2=1619_552475_2qi3HY&akid=1619%2E552475%2E2qi3HY) [Donate $100 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240107-2?recurring=1&amount=100&refcode=em20240107-2-el&refcode2=1619_552475_2qi3HY&akid=1619%2E552475%2E2qi3HY) [Donate $250 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240107-2?recurring=1&amount=250&refcode=em20240107-2-el&refcode2=1619_552475_2qi3HY&akid=1619%2E552475%2E2qi3HY) [Other amount ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240107-2?recurring=1&refcode=em20240107-2&refcode2=1619_552475_2qi3HY&akid=1619%2E552475%2E2qi3HY)
---
This race could decide Senate control. Mitch McConnell and far-right Republicans are ready to spend millions upon millions to try to defeat Bob, so we need to step up — and your donation, no matter how big or small, makes more of an impact now than later in this race.
There’s so much on the line, so I have to ask again:
[**Please, Peter, become one of Bob Casey’s 2024 Founding Donors by chipping in any amount right now.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240107-2?recurring=1&refcode=em20240107-2&refcode2=1619_552475_2qi3HY&akid=1619%2E552475%2E2qi3HY)
Thank you for supporting Bob Casey,
Josh Shapiro

name: Rashida Tlaib
subject: Sign now: Shut down Line 5 pipeline!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress
body:
Water is a human right. | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/ZsYp6Jc2ATNP3MkVzvte6Pmk0F4jS6NOytihmYTOZ1f-yWw6Cj7G9e1dlkX4TL0NMWtZ9DST5cFtdsPS-4D2fKNVbxdzSbLD9T9x2URiTkAkvV0OpQQCoNHFnrXrpjTv3gBe2JwKLxkOni7UbBiU_jFAX2H-1TECDPBy_PSrFDQhqGan4r4PSjwsa5KLForQyiWRDYRL8yH8kS9cHBZ36VIpcUS1-V48EPnUSPldMrG_U4k_jcW6pF1WIpYRYUFa-XHWLnaJ1ppbSyMxD9gF0G3tv3ZXQc28G91cKjMfLzU/42s/NgffZLeHS4uJl3AP1SUCug/h0/1wbyj7MrRUb3zsfuO8QIwaSvMnnMvtVpZfu7SjYRASI)
---
Friend, Water and oil don’t mix. And that’s especially true when you’re dealing with greedy fossil fuel corporations that put profits ahead of environmental safety. Right now there’s a dirty oil pipeline called Line 5 running between the upper and lower peninsulas of Michigan―through the most critical part of the Great Lakes. It’s operated by Canadian multinational corporation Enbridge Energy, which is responsible for one of the worst inland oil spills in U.S. history. The company’s Line 6B pipeline dumped 840,000 gallons of oil into the headwaters of the Kalamazoo River. Michigan Governor Gretchen Whitmer has ordered the pipeline to be shut down. But the Michigan Public Service Commission just granted Enbridge a permit that could potentially allow them to continue using the pipeline. President Biden could end this threat today by revoking Line 5’s federal permit and committing to the truth that water is life. [**Join me in calling on President Biden to act now to shut down the Line 5 pipeline, protect the human right to water, and put environmental justice over corporate greed. Add your name today >>**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnnRXHjijLi8Q1rSieUV-SwB3oYTV1CirKXYOzY81wWo_5-uJCgoDG7wfyB4TIKanVwx53GF-ueTt_AGAJ0M2hZSdlXW-PWvu58id1VC6iboiB4FEAl7ylBejzES1_q5vYH5kxh8XEImtHe-UVuogEtpEeLysnknPybS_4p3UzpYpfHSUxzwoj6_UQx4hwFDRdyiYpzjhCdxDwVC835govWGKwQ2d4Th-rcxPBelH0Z0bBIeLkvZMUQnqQ4Y5P5d8N9zUv3r8ufGp8BWDAX3sz89z0xG0LILxfO4IqEXVtv4kIhbgBI3SPjbM4pl9ZsKH2Y/42s/NgffZLeHS4uJl3AP1SUCug/h1/87W5LqUz_xth5bSVhON6tAT-wSDNgY0aqxie4tSjPW0) | [SIGN NOW](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnnRXHjijLi8Q1rSieUV-SwB3oYTV1CirKXYOzY81wWo_5-uJCgoDG7wfyB4TIKanVwx53GF-ueTt_AGAJ0M2hZS5bTUCj8CfN68GwfndlT_tlR97TKeu0oI60tQkTOypWuLyT7pOIRUqtoGcQxb6hRDmqFz90xlrOlFOQVpatdOlzZDW67Yj-kCo5jF6VHkfjXOOM6mNANRy8fsc9HBy8YpdiG0ZP2_w6yT_WAhd8ywBVXE6hN3Am0JGlnUsKxFQbgLlzbFtAynqhJb0lmwo97wfHHc7qAfVU1x0kpprAzsYq069EZ0obp4V8yOztYJh_c/42s/NgffZLeHS4uJl3AP1SUCug/h2/r4PoTAxjPt0TQOO2Jk4FM2IAbukGl-aDBHcH5N-uXkU)
---
Native Tribes have been fighting hard against the Line 5 pipeline, which violates their sovereignty and their sacred and legally protected water and fishing rights.
The Great Lakes are also home to precious ecosystems and wildlife, holding 21% of the world’s fresh surface water. Tens of millions of people rely on them for drinking water, jobs, and recreation.
We cannot allow the water we rely on to live, the water that helps make Michigan such a special place for so many, to be sacrificed for corporate greed.
[**Sign now to demand President Biden shut down the Line 5 pipeline and put environmental justice over corporate greed.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnnRXHjijLi8Q1rSieUV-SwB3oYTV1CirKXYOzY81wWo_5-uJCgoDG7wfyB4TIKanVwx53GF-ueTt_AGAJ0M2hZSD2nfmS-S0HaHOqVBzG21vpUHn1T4PTdZz4b23wMmLX2EovELoOSoHbdttc9ztB-3Obg1MzKV_bTut6OFUqmvQhaiNi_Xr45pPhPtdAVeQddEc3Wxu3kTDOfncrkUpKa2WO3ug5DOLBhEJVfDXLVyu7BIcP9ry-6246Uu_jp0dxpiCk5C5G-Oyy8gM2695d5Fi9wmith7eWBt7MLwNxQ9FhONab7JGp3WmLga0_X3_-0/42s/NgffZLeHS4uJl3AP1SUCug/h3/-l3YGlGH0W2UfqSU4y9kpBwEfRF2QvHoKSmZxx8eMBE)
Every day that oil flows through Line 5 is a catastrophic risk to the entire Great Lakes region.
Thank you. Together, we must keep pushing our government to recognize water as a human right.
In solidarity,
Rashida

[ORDER YOUR COPY!](https://substack.com/redirect/70a20ed5-a4a6-406b-b850-257362e3e719?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
"Frustrated with our polarized culture? Take this incredibly fun ride through the life of modern day Renaissance man Vikram Mansharamani to appreciate a simple solution-open-minded, generalist thinking. This book is an enjoyable read that lays out a viable path to move beyond today's identity-driven, label-dominated world." \- **Christopher T. Sununu** , _Governor_ ; State of New Hampshire
"As a modern day Indiana Jones, Vikram braves the wilds of today's uncertain world with remarkable tenacity and a devout commitment to identifying opportunities within risks. The generalist approach he models can help each of us create a better future for ourselves, our families, and quite possibly, our country." \- **David Tice** , _President_ , Paul Revere Films
[ORDER YOUR COPY!](https://substack.com/redirect/70a20ed5-a4a6-406b-b850-257362e3e719?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
#### _**Step into the fascinating world of Vikram Mansharamani, where the power of independent thinking takes center stage.**_
Vikram's remarkable journey has taken him from humble beginnings to being one of the most sought-after independent thinkers of our time in business, politics, and strategic decision-making. Filled with insights that show readers how to think and act for themselves, _**The Making of a Generalist**_ reveals how Vikram learned to navigate uncertainty from a young age.
As the son of two working-class immigrants who moved to rural New Jersey, Vikram balanced demanding academics while pumping gas at his dad's garage. His parents modeled a powerful migrant mindset that shaped his worldview and taught him the importance of open-mindedness and the value of education. In school, his unbridled curiosity opened doors to an Ivy League education, a PhD from MIT, and faculty appointments at Yale and Harvard.
Nothing about Vikram's journey to the top was linear or easy. As a generalist in a world of specialists, he often watched his ideas get dismissed by experts brimming with overconfident certainty. But Vikram resisted the herd, embraced multi-dimensional thinking, and regularly spotted what experts missed.
Vikram's life shows how anyone can find unconventional success through an intentional focus on breadth over depth-the lynchpin to being an effective generalist. Written with heart-warming candor, _**The Making of a Generalist**_ empowers readers to embrace challenges and view uncertainty as a gift of opportunity.
* * *

## _**About Vikram**_
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/9cbecec1-3efd-4e3d-a93f-3de08225e8a1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
**VIKRAM MANSHARAMANI** is an entrepreneur, consultant, scholar, neighbor, husband, father, volunteer, and professional generalist who thinks in multiple-dimensions and looks beyond the short-term. Self-taught to think around corners and connect original dots, he spends his time speaking with global leaders in business, government, academia, and journalism. _LinkedIn_ has twice listed him as its #1 Top Voice in Money & Finance, and _Worth_ profiled him as one of the 100 Most Powerful People in Global Finance. Vikram earned a PhD From MIT, has taught at Yale and Harvard, and is the author of two books, _**[Think for Yourself: Restoring Common Sense in an Age of Experts and Artificial Intelligence](https://substack.com/redirect/a1fdfefc-a7f9-4c0a-9437-7d60a81480a4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_ and _**[Boombustology: Spotting Financial Bubbles Before They Burst](https://substack.com/redirect/c214cfe6-1bc9-4091-be61-c809b35e05aa?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_. Vikram lives in Lincoln, New Hampshire with his wife and two children, where they can usually be found hiking or skiing.
[ORDER YOUR COPY!](https://substack.com/redirect/70a20ed5-a4a6-406b-b850-257362e3e719?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

"The Making of a Generalist" is set to be released on January 22, 2024. | | | Jan 7 | | | | | | | | | | | | | | ---|---|--- "Frustrated with our polarized culture? Take this incredibly fun ride through the life of modern day Renaissance man Vikram Mansharamani to appreciate a simple solution-open-minded, generalist thinking. This book is an enjoyable read that lays out a viable path to move beyond today's identity-driven, label-dominated world." \- Christopher T. Sununu , Governor ; State of New Hampshire "As a modern day Indiana Jones, Vikram braves the wilds of today's uncertain world with remarkable tenacity and a devout commitment to identifying opportunities within risks. The generalist approach he models can help each of us create a better future for ourselves, our families, and quite possibly, our country." \- David Tice , President , Paul Revere Films Step into the fascinating world of Vikram Mansharamani, where the power of independent thinking takes center stage. Vikram's remarkable journey has taken him from humble beginnings to being one of the most sought-after independent thinkers of our time in business, politics, and strategic decision-making. Filled with insights that show readers how to think and act for themselves, The Making of a Generalist reveals how Vikram learned to navigate uncertainty from a young age. As the son of two working-class immigrants who moved to rural New Jersey, Vikram balanced demanding academics while pumping gas at his dad's garage. His parents modeled a powerful migrant mindset that shaped his worldview and taught him the importance of open-mindedness and the value of education. In school, his unbridled curiosity opened doors to an Ivy League education, a PhD from MIT, and faculty appointments at Yale and Harvard. Nothing about Vikram's journey to the top was linear or easy. As a generalist in a world of specialists, he often watched his ideas get dismissed by experts brimming with overconfident certainty. But Vikram resisted the herd, embraced multi-dimensional thinking, and regularly spotted what experts missed. Vikram's life shows how anyone can find unconventional success through an intentional focus on breadth over depth-the lynchpin to being an effective generalist. Written with heart-warming candor, The Making of a Generalist empowers readers to embrace challenges and view uncertainty as a gift of opportunity. Given the importance of pre-orders to kick start a book launch, please place your order today! Please help Dr. Mansharamani spread the word about his forthcoming book! It’s a GREAT time to be a Cajun Conservative, Friend!
Bill’s back home this weekend, and we’re going to be celebrating the all-star cast of newly-elected Louisiana Republicans as they take office.
Maybe we’ll see you around?
__Weather and schedules permitting, you might run into us at:__
⚜️ _**Governor-elect Jeff Landry’s Inauguration Ceremony**_ at 4:30pm this afternoon on the State Capitol steps.
⚜️ The _**Republican State Legislative Delegation’s Inaugural Reception**_ this evening at the Old Governor’s Mansion.
⚜️ _**Governor-elect Landry’s Legislative Welcome Reception**_ a little later this evening at the Louisiana State Museum.
⚜️ A _**Brunch Reception for Secretary of State-elect, Nancy Landry**_ , on Monday morning.
⚜️ The _**Opening Session of the Louisiana State Senate**_ at the Capitol Senate Chambers.
Here’s to another year of Republican victories at the ballot and in the legislature!
As always, thank you for your continued support.
–Team Cassidy

Hi there,

We’re officially in our 2024 election year! With less than a year until Election Day, it’s critical that we keep our strong momentum going over these next several months.

**[Help us kick off 2024 on the right foot by endorsing my campaign for Congress.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76664158/448088125/-853782262?refcode=em-1.6.24-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYwODgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDQyMTFjYWUtODZhZC1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzN2RhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=-DNXp2uSMOCC1Y0ktLUmo3ugflLwiXd_ntG7RWGUO04=&emci=4f2f13a8-86ad-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=d4211cae-86ad-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=626985)**
| ****[Endorse Marlene](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76664159/448088126/-853782262?refcode=em-1.6.24-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYwODgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDQyMTFjYWUtODZhZC1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzN2RhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=-DNXp2uSMOCC1Y0ktLUmo3ugflLwiXd_ntG7RWGUO04=&emci=4f2f13a8-86ad-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=d4211cae-86ad-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=626985)****
---

The truth is, running for office has never been on my radar. I served our Arizona community as a broadcast journalist for 20 years, exposing corruption and holding the powerful accountable. Working to improve our community has always been a priority. Our family helped start the Boy’s and Girl’s Club of the East Valley and we helped launch the Children's Museum of Phoenix. Leaving Arizona better than we found it has always been a priority.

Then in 2016, our country began tearing apart at the seams. I was horrified by the January 6th insurrection of our Capitol, and then the next year, _Roe v. Wade_ was overturned.

**It was then, as MAGA Republicans continued to chip away at everything from voting rights to our health care, and now banning books you and I read as children that I knew I could not stay quiet. I could not stay out of this race.**

Political extremists including my opponent David Schweikert are the root of the problem. I’m running to give AZ–01 the true community-centered representation it deserves, and to put an end to this far-right madness.

After nearly 8 months on the trail, it's clear our message resonating, but our ability to win takes more than a message. We're going to need a groundswell of grassroots support in order to send Schweikert packing. That's why today's request -- at the beginning of Election Year -- is so important:

**[If you’re with me, will you endorse my campaign today? Our strength grows with every supporter that joins our team, and to start the year off strong, I’m counting on 500 signatures before midnight.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76664160/448088127/-853782262?refcode=em-1.6.24-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYwODgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDQyMTFjYWUtODZhZC1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzN2RhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=-DNXp2uSMOCC1Y0ktLUmo3ugflLwiXd_ntG7RWGUO04=&emci=4f2f13a8-86ad-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=d4211cae-86ad-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=626985)**
****[Endorse Marlene](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76664161/448088128/-853782262?refcode=em-1.6.24-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYwODgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDQyMTFjYWUtODZhZC1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzN2RhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=-DNXp2uSMOCC1Y0ktLUmo3ugflLwiXd_ntG7RWGUO04=&emci=4f2f13a8-86ad-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=d4211cae-86ad-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=626985)****

clean_body: | = Hi there, We’re officially in our 2024 election year! With less than a year until Election Day, it’s critical that we keep our strong momentum going over these next several months. | ** The truth is, running for office has never been on my radar. I served our Arizona community as a broadcast journalist for 20 years, exposing corruption and holding the powerful accountable. Working to improve our community has always been a priority. Our family helped start the Boy’s and Girl’s Club of the East Valley and we helped launch the Children's Museum of Phoenix. Leaving Arizona better than we found it has always been a priority. Then in 2016, our country began tearing apart at the seams. I was horrified by the January 6th insurrection of our Capitol, and then the next year, Roe v. Wade was overturned. It was then, as MAGA Republicans continued to chip away at everything from voting rights to our health care, and now banning books you and I read as children that I knew I could not stay quiet. I could not stay out of this race. Political extremists including my opponent David Schweikert are the root of the problem. I’m running to give AZ–01 the true community-centered representation it deserves, and to put an end to this far-right madness. After nearly 8 months on the trail, it's clear our message resonating, but our ability to win takes more than a message. We're going to need a groundswell of grassroots support in order to send Schweikert packing. That's why today's request -- at the beginning of Election Year -- is so important: Thank you, Marlene =** | Marlene's campaign to flip AZ-01 is being built from the ground up with grassroots support! = To learn more about Marlene and how she's fighting for Arizona families, please visit: We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . PAID FOR BY MARLENE FOR CONGRESS Marlene for Congress 7904 E. Chaparral Road, Suite A110-472 Scottsdale, AZ 85250 United States

Peter, it's Jon Tester.
Did you know that not a single state bordering Montana has a Democratic Senator? In fact, I’m the only statewide-elected Democrat in Montana.
That’s why I spend every single day fighting so hard, not just for my own constituents, but for everyone who lives in a farm town like me — especially folks without any Democratic senators looking out for them.
Because while Washington Republicans might choose wealthy corporations over dirt farmers, side with Big Pharma instead of teachers, or listen to their big donors and ignore the rest of us, **I will always work for you.**
When you make a donation to my campaign, you’re not just supporting me. You’re giving me the resources to fight back against Mitch McConnell’s disastrous policies and work to protect our progress — for all of us.
[_**So, if you can, I’m personally asking you to split a $3 or more donation between Upset the Setup and my campaign to help us reach our critical fundraising goal. clean_body: = Peter, it's Jon Tester. Did you know that not a single state bordering Montana has a Democratic Senator? In fact, I’m the only statewide-elected Democrat in Montana. That’s why I spend every single day fighting so hard, not just for my own constituents, but for everyone who lives in a farm town like me — especially folks without any Democratic senators looking out for them. Because while Washington Republicans might choose wealthy corporations over dirt farmers, side with Big Pharma instead of teachers, or listen to their big donors and ignore the rest of us, I will always work for you. When you make a donation to my campaign, you’re not just supporting me. You’re giving me the resources to fight back against Mitch McConnell’s disastrous policies and work to protect our progress — for all of us. = If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: = = = = = = Politics isn’t a game. Lives and livelihoods are put at stake when Washington Republicans continuously choose shady donors over everyday Americans. subject: 🚨BREAKING - Biden: Trump Must Sign Illinois Loyalty Oath
body:
Biden losing it, dropping in polls, now he wants Donald Trump to sign a Loyalty Oath that claims he’s an Illinois resident.

view in browser (https://mailchi.mp/184c318e1a75/exclusive-donald-trump-jr-draws-large-crowds-receives-lifetime-membership-9637664?e=1cb5fdae9e) | update preferences (https://illinoisreview.us14.list-manage.com/profile?u=811d47b3c0783e80274d515f7&id=1a5a561027&e=1cb5fdae9e&c=88b5c79e35) | unsubscribe (https://illinoisreview.us14.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=811d47b3c0783e80274d515f7&id=1a5a561027&e=1cb5fdae9e&c=88b5c79e35)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=88b5c79e35-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
This Illinois Review eBlast Powered By
https://www.bestdental.org/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=88b5c79e35-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

Dear Peter,

As Donald Trump continues to surge in the polls and Biden continues to drop, on the third anniversary of the events of January 6, 2021, Biden made the shocking accusation that Donald Trump advocates overthrowing the government. And his alleged proof? Donald Trump's candidacy papers recently filed in Illinois.

Biden Losing It, Dropping in Polls, Now He Wants Trump to Sign a Loyalty Oath that Claims He's a Resident of Illinois (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2024/01/biden-losing-it-dropping-in-polls-now-he-wants-trump-to-sign-a-loyalty-oath-that-claims-hes-a-resident-of-illinois.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=88b5c79e35-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

By Illinois Review

On Saturday, President Joe Biden said that President Donald Trump did not sign Illinois’ optional “loyalty oath” because it included language that candidates on the ballot would “not directly or indirectly teach or advocate the overthrow of the government of the United States...by force or any unlawful means.”
https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2024/01/biden-losing-it-dropping-in-polls-now-he-wants-trump-to-sign-a-loyalty-oath-that-claims-hes-a-resident-of-illinois.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=88b5c79e35-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

But there’s one very important piece of information that Biden deliberately left out of his deceptive and misleading statement.

Find out the full story to understand the documents and the process underlying the false narrative Biden's accusations have created. Click through to read our analysis of the Loyalty Oath and what Donald Trump's actions really mean.

Stay informed,

Illinois Review

| | Patriot,

---
Crooked Joe Biden gave a speech in Valley Forge comparing himself to George Washington.
---
George Washington is a man who humbly turned down the chance to be king in order to put power in the hands of YOU – the American people.
---
Joe Biden is a man who sold out our country to enrich himself and is now trying to imprison his leading opponent to crown himself king of America.
---
Washington would be rolling in his grave if he could see the sad state of our Republic.
---
**_It’s sickening that Washington, D.C. – which was named to honor our great first president – has now become a cesspool of corruption and power-drunk tyrants who have crowned themselves kings._**
---
But, this November, we will cast out the ruling class and restore our Republic in all its glory.
---
Our battle is about something far bigger than just any one person. _Not _Washington_. Not ___me__ _._ It’s about the survival of our COUNTRY and restoring the dignity and rights of _every_ citizen in the United States of America.
---
That’s why Americans of all walks of ages, of all walks of life, of all parties, are uniting against tyranny to join the only movement that puts the people of our country FIRST.
---
On November 5, we will vindicate our Founding Fathers’ bold vision and _prove_ that America still is a Republic OF, FOR, and BY the __People__.
---

clean_body: \- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - -| | | | | Patriot, Crooked Joe Biden gave a speech in Valley Forge comparing himself to George Washington. George Washington is a man who humbly turned down the chance to be king in order to put power in the hands of YOU – the American people. Joe Biden is a man who sold out our country to enrich himself and is now trying to imprison his leading opponent to crown himself king of America. Washington would be rolling in his grave if he could see the sad state of our Republic. It’s sickening that Washington, D.C. – which was named to honor our great first president – has now become a cesspool of corruption and power-drunk tyrants who have crowned themselves kings. But, this November, we will cast out the ruling class and restore our Republic in all its glory. Our battle is about something far bigger than just any one person. Not Washington. Not _me . It’s about the survival of our COUNTRY and restoring the dignity and rights of every citizen in the United States of America. That’s why Americans of all walks of ages, of all walks of life, of all parties, are uniting against tyranny to join the only movement that puts the people of our country FIRST. On November 5, we will vindicate our Founding Fathers’ bold vision and prove that America still is a Republic OF, FOR, and BY the People. | | Thank you, Donald J. name: Isaac
subject: There will be another Jan. 6th…
body:
Myself and many experts far more knowledgeable than I fear this will be our last election. | | [ ](https://url1005.email.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953w89kKB5u2yVtf13KRofeKJBQrPWVaPDGdrWmHkg1i9UECE7RAT4nlU9b0FbcHi2qE7DWdajqOILvDohS02z6UWql1GYtVoUvXacr_eRjYtTGVVn7aO3SLpYzyiO0q-He9dYZ0gxgbceV49oXTaDdnC0xBliytsi7A5xIF1zfLC8lokFLZfHMEye-2w1vElBJwEIS0-RdUNvPbgrCrjEX9eyM_Rms6FwvVkKIpokFjjJI00oq8n1ljIuLoUBiI_ntBbrF69WGB4Heas39UB2TNVOlmFWgOEkaztXCIxoP32u2WROkyfmn1A4X-f3vFudZo/42s/KSCUZ5p4RyKMqI0zhzd_pA/h0/DpHew2zv8MI6PGRI1ega8vMhz3reOD829YQ0aNvGXF4)
---
Friend, Today marks three years since the attack on our Capitol on January 6th, 2021. A dark day, but an important reminder of the fragility of our democracy. I remember what I was doing on that day three years ago. I was doing work on finishing my basement and hadn’t even been checking my phone. When I took a break and turned on the news my _heart sank_. Watching the videos playing I could tell that many of the rioters storming and infiltrating the capitol were using tactics eerily reminiscent of those that I had learned in the military. **What I was watching was not just a riot, but a carefully planned operation executed by operators with advanced training.**
---
| [ ](https://url1005.email.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953w89kKB5u2yVtf13KRofeKJBQrPWVaPDGdrWmHkg1i9UNkMJgiB4ZXZyz0jvQ_2VgEn_5nJ4l8PCU9EBaAASiD8mb1_71ezaHvcY-vZzYhiYgv-6zmzxA4ActjUQGTcpZQ1tbgxjvj_oEYSsnAsRyLtRtYmX9hO015AVZmDgvIiYjId2L4Cew7bXMu7IvS3MreTrBclrzVGsDQjgbYc1Y6Z2LGj_U_OyNJO_WDfjWZSKduMWZKSYbxCggXRtstrzGbWKq1r_VTbJlYW0ooKQHrEp9QkLSvKZUn3w-bspeLlIbJFMyfO7wc3MQ534fgukpo/42s/KSCUZ5p4RyKMqI0zhzd_pA/h1/OT6pSo29kdwmxuc7MylfLzTfQKq5KjmA27cbriOWI7A)
---
_Don’t let the Q-Anon shaman’s from that day fool you. Many of the individuals on the ground that day were organized, armed, well trained, and extremely dangerous._
---
I was sick to my stomach with a feeling that our democracy might be falling apart before my very eyes. On the day after 9/11, I volunteered to return to active duty in the US Marines. _On January 6th and the days following I remember a similar feeling in my heart that I had to do something._
The previous year I had just finished up my first Congressional Campaign. It was a long race in which **my family and I received death threats and my home was vandalized by partisan extremists similar to those that stormed the capitol**. When we finished after election day I was ready to take a long and much needed break from campaign life. Yet, when I saw the videos of the police officer being killed, of masked men kitted out in military gear climbing up the Capitol terraces, and brave capitol police holding the line, I knew that now was not the time to stand idly by. I relaunched my 2022 campaign that same week and have been going at it non-stop to flip this seat ever since. The force driving me was not what I witnessed that day but the constant reminder that **there will be another January 6th unless we take decisive action to stop it.** My opponent Lauren Boebert was one of the _key planners and instigators of the January 6th attack_. She went so far as to give reconnaissance tours of the Capitol to the men and women who would storm it days later, helping them to identify weak points in the building's security. Preventing the next January 6th means removing its instigators and planners at every level. It will be a national effort from the presidency down to local and state governments and helping me remove Lauren Boebert is a key component of this effort. **If Boebert remains in office come January, 2025, I assure you that she has vengeance on her mind and will work to ensure Trump’s return to power irregardless of who wins the election.****

**[ Can you support my campaign with a donation of $25, $50, $100, or whatever you can spare to help us remove Lauren Boebert and prevent the next January 6th? If we can’t defeat MAGA this election, myself, and many experts far more knowledgeable than I fear it will be our last.](https://url1005.email.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953w89kKB5u2yVtf13KRofeKJBQrPWVaPDGdrWmHkg1i9ULRxHjzAvpDMck3HpUH9UkUn6UZQUUwD51v1q86vABv-_rxQU9ZnBGnykBMe8beusLw4OEnNGhOFr88GpNPS6SFLUQ6EaskQpIX5An0VNgfAk66E-ArMN8EwDKdCGCaafFF3HQnCGvZacrRhpgZkpvyy6c8R2ACP8XRKY30So_3jbe88N43c5RhNWmHmSLLeW7wEdEHAz_rODN9ELepLuYu6zhNgYdGuMFgd5Qz5WRnEfomCSINBHgJ_FmVWSTBC_A5kAR0lFq9y9ChxGAic41Y/42s/KSCUZ5p4RyKMqI0zhzd_pA/h2/_MLfL3FX56sbxOB6lhn2nv6VzhlAbl87MdhyUXj7MRo)

clean_body: Myself and many experts far more knowledgeable than I fear this will be our last election. | | Friend, Today marks three years since the attack on our Capitol on January 6th, 2021. A dark day, but an important reminder of the fragility of our democracy. I remember what I was doing on that day three years ago. I was doing work on finishing my basement and hadn’t even been checking my phone. When I took a break and turned on the news my heart sank. Watching the videos playing I could tell that many of the rioters storming and infiltrating the capitol were using tactics eerily reminiscent of those that I had learned in the military. What I was watching was not just a riot, but a carefully planned operation executed by operators with advanced training. | Don’t let the Q-Anon shaman’s from that day fool you. Many of the individuals on the ground that day were organized, armed, well trained, and extremely dangerous. I was sick to my stomach with a feeling that our democracy might be falling apart before my very eyes. On the day after 9/11, I volunteered to return to active duty in the US Marines. On January 6th and the days following I remember a similar feeling in my heart that I had to do something. The previous year I had just finished up my first Congressional Campaign. It was a long race in which my family and I received death threats and my home was vandalized by partisan extremists similar to those that stormed the capitol. When we finished after election day I was ready to take a long and much needed break from campaign life. Yet, when I saw the videos of the police officer being killed, of masked men kitted out in military gear climbing up the Capitol terraces, and brave capitol police holding the line, I knew that now was not the time to stand idly by. I relaunched my 2022 campaign that same week and have been going at it non-stop to flip this seat ever since. The force driving me was not what I witnessed that day but the constant reminder that there will be another January 6th unless we take decisive action to stop it. My opponent Lauren Boebert was one of the key planners and instigators of the January 6th attack. She went so far as to give reconnaissance tours of the Capitol to the men and women who would storm it days later, helping them to identify weak points in the building's security. Preventing the next January 6th means removing its instigators and planners at every level. It will be a national effort from the presidency down to local and state governments and helping me remove Lauren Boebert is a key component of this effort. If Boebert remains in office come January, 2025, I assure you that she has vengeance on her mind and will work to ensure Trump’s return to power irregardless of who wins the election. I look forward to working alongside you in this last-ditch effort to save our democracy. Yours in the fight, Isaac "Ike" McCorkle US Marine Corps, Retired Democrat for CO-04 | | Our mailing address is: Ike McCorkle for Congress , | | Sent via .
