name: Governor Roy Cooper
subject: Do you know why I appointed Allison Riggs to the NC Supreme Court?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina
body:
It was an easy decision.
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76665418/448092561/823540626?refcode=RoyCooper&ms=RoyCooper&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlN2YwMDNjYS04OWFkLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=66NmlqajHM_cf4PmEeLBAqRV2-x1dBq_yA2KnD28EfY=&emci=39e02003-17ac-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=e7f003ca-89ad-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=1049176)
Hey Peter, It’s Governor Roy Cooper here. Every week, I make decisions that directly impact the lives of North Carolinians. It’s a lot of responsibility and many of those decisions are difficult. But appointing Justice Allison Riggs to the Supreme Court was an easy choice. A former Judge on the Court of Appeals, Justice Riggs is a brilliant attorney and a nationally renowned litigator who has spent her career fighting for fairness and defending people’s constitutional rights. In just her first few months on the Supreme Court, it’s clear I made the right call. **[I strongly support Justice Allison Riggs for the Supreme Court. Now, I am humbly asking you to join me in supporting her campaign as she gears up for the March 5th primary.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76665419/448092562/2112050847?refcode=RoyCooper&ms=RoyCooper&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlN2YwMDNjYS04OWFkLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=66NmlqajHM_cf4PmEeLBAqRV2-x1dBq_yA2KnD28EfY=&emci=39e02003-17ac-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=e7f003ca-89ad-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=1049176)** | [Endorse Justice Allison Riggs](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76665420/448092563/2112050847?refcode=RoyCooper&ms=RoyCooper&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlN2YwMDNjYS04OWFkLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=66NmlqajHM_cf4PmEeLBAqRV2-x1dBq_yA2KnD28EfY=&emci=39e02003-17ac-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=e7f003ca-89ad-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=1049176)
---
It is not only her skills in the courtroom that make Justice Riggs a fantastic appointment; Allison also knows how to build successful movements. She knows that we need to reframe how we talk about judicial races and our Democratic values if we want to take back our appellate courts in the next few election cycles.
Now more than ever, we need leaders with a broad vision of where our state and country are headed. That’s why I’m campaigning for Democrats in 2024 just as hard as I would be if my name were on the ballot. Allison shares that sentiment; her commitment to our state and rebuilding our courts extends far beyond this November. **[I hope you’ll join the movement Allison is building to reclaim our state’s highest courts.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76665421/448092564/2112050847?refcode=RoyCooper&ms=RoyCooper&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlN2YwMDNjYS04OWFkLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=66NmlqajHM_cf4PmEeLBAqRV2-x1dBq_yA2KnD28EfY=&emci=39e02003-17ac-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=e7f003ca-89ad-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=1049176)**
[Endorse Justice Allison Riggs](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76665422/448092565/2112050847?refcode=RoyCooper&ms=RoyCooper&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlN2YwMDNjYS04OWFkLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=66NmlqajHM_cf4PmEeLBAqRV2-x1dBq_yA2KnD28EfY=&emci=39e02003-17ac-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=e7f003ca-89ad-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=1049176)

name: Tom Suozzi
subject: Our first big test of 2024
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/m23-suozzi [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/m23-suozzi]
Hi there, it’s Tom Suozzi. I’m the Democratic nominee in NY-03 to replace the expelled George Santos, and we have a special election coming up on February 13.
Team, the implications of this election in just a few weeks are huge. There’s so much at stake for Nassau, Queens, and the whole country. Everyone is watching to see if we can finally break through the partisan gridlock in Congress to get things done and solve the critical problems our country faces. With George Santos gone, we have a chance to do just that.
In short, team, we have to win. This special election will set the tone for all of 2024–including the general election in November.
So, team, I’m asking if you’ll split a contribution between Seth Moulton and I so we can win NY-03, finally get to solving the problems our country faces, and start off 2024 with a big win? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/m23-suozzi]
Thank you,

clean_body: [] Hi there, it’s Tom Suozzi. I’m the Democratic nominee in NY-03 to replace the expelled George Santos, and we have a special election coming up on February 13. Team, the implications of this election in just a few weeks are huge. There’s so much at stake for Nassau, Queens, and the whole country. Everyone is watching to see if we can finally break through the partisan gridlock in Congress to get things done and solve the critical problems our country faces. With George Santos gone, we have a chance to do just that. In short, team, we have to win. This special election will set the tone for all of 2024–including the general election in November. So, team, I’m asking if you’ll split a contribution between Seth Moulton and I so we can win NY-03, finally get to solving the problems our country faces, and start off 2024 with a big win? [] Thank you, Tom Donate [] If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: . Peter, Here are the facts: **_Our border is defenseless._** **_Our economy is still crumbling by the day._** **_Congress can't get their act together_**. While politicians in DC chirp from the sidelines about what they want to do, Ron DeSantis is taking action in Florida to get the job done. He is the only candidate in this race with the discipline, focus, and mission-first mentality that is focused on putting America first.
---

---
While Ron DeSantis has been working, Joe Biden has only caused damage to our country. And Kamala Harris has just sat by.** We're tired of the excuses. **Ron DeSantis has FOUGHT BACK...
* Against the Left's need to strip away parental rights and indoctrinate children.

* Against corporations pushing radical agendas.

* Against unelected bureaucrats trying to take control of American lives.

2024 is the moment we've been waiting on. If we come together to support a Ron DeSantis presidency, Republicans will forget this culture of losing once and for all. _The time to act is now. The time for leadership is now._
---

Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain. After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom. When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor. Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide. In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is _personal_ and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.

---
| [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=19e01e79e61e4d29ab450741a8aa93fe&_e=wHvhZJxSS3-Apeiga5N9h_q-zIUfVHz8tRLxVDu27ko1a1LC0p2CWplzX3Ez_VuPvmLPlR_wA1-ewmfO_A1x7sK45MXZR8QYJp-A2W_6LBt3A4Bf__LbLep5a79yeyuqzNWQSnKqCRfzghljRFuimbBGngH4zqZ3v_wMat4Ow38Z3AKesdrBSRY-Y7FdECYaC6pmhsuTEHwBHl_ZDtxqaD8jp4ckZLEPXlQgTrLLY3xVYhCp2piNlEAOKBn6puX4RU4fKaPrL-8vMb6fagy67XGZj-JjOu6SG5IhEDZQDcY0VAbMIH-VFNhJlaV51vNj7xoc6Ir1GI8NUBtxiDCNQ1ZAyxnaZijjKrYHvOspBOrsEcYRxg0jt4tR9bptn43p1KHQTpybVjaK9BvzmTMYw-4Lb1NMOdOb8awxbXcJp6KxfuQAqkPR27sTuqJBmVQeIQDGnaRB0rQSKhkY7IuZZQ%3D%3D)
---

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has _promised_ that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by _immediately getting to work_ stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late. In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He's taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and **_won every single time_**. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon. _That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now._

---
|
---
Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without "green cards"), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules
* I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
* This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.

* I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.

But here at the California Democratic Party, we are committed to organizing and mobilizing in key districts around the clock, all year long. Why? That’s how you win.
Our Forever Organizing team is working every day to:

That’s why we are activating our 2024 Founding Donor program and asking you to invest in the team that will successfully flip these seats and the House Majority this year. Can we count on you? name: American Update
subject: US Navy Ship Fends Off Drone Attack From Yemen In First Confirmed Act Of ‘Self-Defense’ Since Israel-Hamas War Began
body:
And How Three Misguided Beliefs Are Threatening America’s Future

https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c689410%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=j4vXIXSisthFdQf12goYLw&sysid=1 US Navy Ship Fends Off Drone Attack From Yemen In First Confirmed Act Of ‘Self-Defense’ Since Israel-Hamas War Began

The U.S. Navy shot down a drone fired from a Houthi-controlled area of Yemen, the response was the first confirmed act of “self-defense” by an American ship in the Red Sea since the breakout of the Israel-Hamas war.

Read more https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c689410%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=j4vXIXSisthFdQf12goYLw&sysid=1

US Navy Ship Fends Off Drone Attack From Yemen In First Confirmed Act Of ‘Self-Defense’ Since Israel-Hamas War Began https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c689410%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=j4vXIXSisthFdQf12goYLw&sysid=1

https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c689410%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=j4vXIXSisthFdQf12goYLw&sysid=1

The U.S. Navy shot down a drone fired from a Houthi-controlled area of Yemen, the response was the first confirmed act of “self-defense” by an American ship in the Red Sea since the breakout of the Israel-Hamas war.

See It Here https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c689410%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=j4vXIXSisthFdQf12goYLw&sysid=1

https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c689411%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=kqESKa%2fd9UxYtFi37p8QmQ&sysid=1 How Three Misguided Beliefs Are Threatening America’s Future

Misguided Belief #1: “We [the federal government] don’t have to balance our checkbook. We are like the banker in Monopoly. We create the money. We hand out the money everyone else plays the game with.” Rep. John Yarmuth (D-KY), the then-chairman of the House Budget Committee, was literally caught on film making that claim.

Read more https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c689411%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=kqESKa%2fd9UxYtFi37p8QmQ&sysid=1

https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c689412%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=FqJNJaIcZ0sDX7BEt%2foQiw&sysid=1 The World Needs More Elon Musks And Fewer Elizabeth Warrens

Are you a MAKER or a TAKER? Politicians are often takers. They take our money (and freedom) in the name of achieving goals they rarely achieve. Elon Musk and Sen. Elizabeth Warren may be the best examples of maker and taker. They’re the stars of my video this week.

Team, we’ve said it before, and we’ll say it again: **Americans care about abortion rights. ** And while out-of-touch, anti-choice Republicans are working around the clock to restrict abortion across the nation, Andrea is fighting even harder to protect the right to choose and communicate that __abortion is on the ballot__ in November – work that _NPR_ recently highlighted on “All Things Considered”. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76667191/448098903/1032217744?refcode=em_fr_2024.01.07_b1_ts_all-nd&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZmU5MjM3Yi05MGFkLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZReBvSFXhJ3G0iK52ifZZ-mt5SwZdaeoIKEDl3UcI64=) **[It’s more important than ever to have reproductive rights champions like Andrea in Congress. Will you chip in $10 today and help Andrea protect abortion rights?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76667192/448098904/1032217744?refcode=em_fr_2024.01.07_b1_ts_all-nd&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZmU5MjM3Yi05MGFkLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZReBvSFXhJ3G0iK52ifZZ-mt5SwZdaeoIKEDl3UcI64=) ** Friend, Andrea believes that abortion and reproductive healthcare shouldn’t just be legal – it should be affordable and accessible to as many people as possible. **Protecting abortion access is one of her top priorities.** And despite the massive disapproval for a national abortion ban, extremist Republicans have been clear about their intentions to keep pushing until abortion is banned nationwide. They’ve proven that they’ll do whatever it takes to strip away abortion rights and eliminate access to reproductive healthcare. Elections matter, team, and we can’t sit on the sidelines in 2024 while Republicans plan to criminalize abortion nationwide. **[Donate $10 now – or whatever you can spare – to keep OR-06 blue, flip the House of Representatives, and defend abortion access nationwide. name: Gallego for Arizona
subject: A short email for Peter.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
The truth is, we’ve started our fundraising off way too slowly this year.
#

A short email for you today, Peter.
Today marks the end of the first seven days of the year.
We’ve got three more quarterly FEC deadlines ahead of us. 10 end-of-month deadlines. 302 days until the election.
And nearly 150,000 people have contributed to support Ruben’s campaign. That means a lot.
Now, we know you probably didn’t wake up thinking that you were going to make your first donation online to Ruben today... but that’s what we’re asking you to do.
The truth is, we’ve started our fundraising off way too slowly this year. We need to absolutely crush our goals this month to stay on pace to defeat Kari Lake this November, but we’re not on track to do that right now.
We don’t expect you to contribute to each email we send. Not by a long shot. But today, because we are so far behind, we’re hoping you will contribute to this one.
[**So please, we are humbly asking you to donate $3 before we close out this first weekend of the year. $3 to get us back on track. $3 to win in Arizona, and hold the Senate.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-jan24.RCwesN&refcode=em240107-2-45&t=1&akid=1657%2E734936%2Ebs5R-0)

# FROM THE DESK OF ALAN DERSHOWITZ
---
| | Dear Reader,I am a lifelong supporter and defender of Israel. I do so on moral grounds, because of our shared values and because she has many vicious enemies. In particular, I've found much of the mainstream press coverage of Israel to be appalling. It's often misleading, inaccurate, and just plain biased. **Now, as Israel faces a desperate fight for its future, I’ve increasingly found myself turning to the outstanding and unique coverage of The New York Sun**.
---
| | [Join the Sun Now →](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=191ab43044104463ba7d50fc70a62925&_e=rNDYgAeyq34zjuVjk337WVEmdStQUPJWdhXYKMCUhzF8rLjHtNdsN6wy6T8ouQvvB7e82VLCeOccLTiqHQWsfn1fnHzg4ksg5bU6QaQynlH30A0Ono6VRzu_tnqx4JU6u8FAmuRXNRB6hvXTz7YAQWDe_r266hORo_rYaB-a9N_rscAsJ0zXCzuA9LdAegAIHc5BQGIsVqJrs_nhEYc5zewfliNf0DjXZBoLv2KZcocbKr8eGIzqfP5UQXGpUdsx4EX98JZwHOlsMIv1N4zPO6iF_DCwLL_Eq78aeTyVtmXCnj8v7m25dZ2D7KnJpxl4MsG3Cli664w7NeacnVHvNyPP_bnbxsQfHNWdqngooGeuC36mgQbETrPISO8zNSCQwXguB1NJw4exQnl06iSGNw%3D%3D)
---
| | The Sun takes the side of right over popular. I consider the Sun to be one of Israel’s most ardent defenders in the American press. It’s for this reason that when I have something to say, I often turn to the Sun. They have carried a number of my columns since the attack on October 7th (I've written many). **The voice of the Sun is precious and far too rare.** I’ve been impressed by its impact and influence, but I know it is the David in this battle, facing many Goliaths. It’s a battle that the Sun must win and I have pledged my support.**The Sun’s success will be a triumph over falsehood**. To succeed, we need you to join. I highly encourage you to become a member of the Sun today.
---
| | [Join the Sun Now →](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=191ab43044104463ba7d50fc70a62925&_e=rNDYgAeyq34zjuVjk337WVEmdStQUPJWdhXYKMCUhzF8rLjHtNdsN6wy6T8ouQvvB7e82VLCeOccLTiqHQWsfn1fnHzg4ksg5bU6QaQynlH30A0Ono6VRzu_tnqx4JU6u8FAmuRXNRB6hvXTz7YAQWDe_r266hORo_rYaB-a9N_rscAsJ0zXCzuA9LdAegAIHc5BQGIsVqJrs_nhEYc5zewfliNf0DjXZBoLv2KZcocojfw41VpjqSc1qOMIuJNuYrIoiiEDtNXEIurs76VC308NreXqagiQPSHRLYqksu0l0Ra0vjApkZ5Nzebt6Q19e2eRErHxBXVTuKXd6788vIEtNkcDNu7xL0eCY5iXRG22cPzybGp-ER_75l6GDhn29erVkoUwj01qeUmlp-4WUw%3D%3D)
---
| | Every person counts. **Don’t wait.** Our battle for truth starts now.

name: Democrat Harry Dunn
subject: January 6th, 2021
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Swalwell For Congress
body:
Democrat Eric Swalwell represents California's 14th Congressional District.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ESCA-14-Email-jan2024-fr-january?refcode=headerfooter-header&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ESCA-14-Email-jan2024-fr-january?refcode=headerfooter-header&amount=25]
Friend — My name is Harry Dunn and three years ago, I defended the U.S. Capitol and our nation’s leaders against a violent insurrection.

Since that day, I vowed to help ensure that never happens again.

That’s why I’m officially running for Congress in MD-03 to be the change I want to see for our country and our democracy. I’d be honored for you to join me and Eric Swalwell in jump starting this campaign by chipping in a split donation of $25 or anything you can: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ESCA-14-Email-Jan2024-FR-DunnSplit?&refcode=E5861-20240107-DunnSplit-SL-Other&amount=25]

BECOME A FOUNDING DONOR: CHIP IN $25 >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ESCA-14-Email-Jan2024-FR-DunnSplit?&refcode=E5861-20240107-DunnSplit-SB-Other&amount=25]

For the last sixteen years, I was a police officer for the United States Capitol where I saw millions of people visit to exercise their rights and lobby their representatives.

And trust me, every political agenda you can think of walked through those doors.

It didn’t matter to me if you were there as a Democrat, Republican, or Independent though, because my job was the same — protect our elected officials and ensure everyone could safely participate in our democracy.

But three years ago, under the Capitol Rotunda that took my breath away each day, I was immersed in a profane mix of sweat, screams, shrieks, anger, death, fear, blood, broken limbs, spit, hatred, horror, racism, bigotry, and heroism for what felt like endless hours alongside fellow officers.

It was unlike anything we had seen before. Sure, there were heated political moments over the years. But this was different.

It was pepper spray, bear spray, and even WD-40 to our faces as we fought back rioters in tactical gear using anything they could as a weapon. It was disorienting chaos as we tried to block every entrance while our elected leaders and capitol staff ran to safety. It was a direct attack on our democracy.

Many people have tried to deny what happened that day – including some of the same people who stood behind us as we protected them. They’ve diluted the story and muddied the facts to preserve their own political agenda.

So I’ve made it a personal mission to share my story, speak truth to power, and work to ensure this never happens again. That’s why a few weeks ago, I retired from the police force, and why I announced my campaign to run for Congress in Maryland’s Third Congressional District.

I’m running because Maryland deserves a Congressman who will put the country above their party, and put the constitution above themselves. This will be a competitive race, so I’ve set an ambitious goal to raise $500,000 within the first 48 hours of my campaign. Will you chip in to become a Founding Donor and help hit our goal before midnight? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ESCA-14-Email-Jan2024-FR-DunnSplit?&refcode=E5861-20240107-DunnSplit-SL-Other&amount=25]

SPLIT A DONATION >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ESCA-14-Email-Jan2024-FR-DunnSplit?&refcode=E5861-20240107-DunnSplit-SB-Other&amount=25]

Thank you for reading,

Harry Dunn
DONATE TO ERIC >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ESCA-14-Email-jan2024-fr-january?refcode=headerfooter-footer&amount=25]
secure.actblue.com/donate/ESCA-14-Email-jan2024-fr-january?refcode=headerfooter-footer&amount=25 [secure.actblue.com/donate/ESCA-14-Email-jan2024-fr-january?refcode=headerfooter-footer&amount=25]
Text ERIC to 43033 to get text updates! On your phone? Press here to sign up in just two clicks >> [http://go.txting.io/e8bRZP] Democrat Eric Swalwell proudly represents California's 14th Congressional District. He needs your support in order to keep protecting what's important: our healthcare, our paychecks, our future, and our democracy.

Eric runs a people-powered campaign that relies on grassroots supporters like you, and if he's going to win re-election, he's going to need your help. It was pepper spray, bear spray, and even WD-40 to our faces as we fought back rioters in tactical gear using anything they could as a weapon. It was disorienting chaos as we tried to block every entrance while our elected leaders and capitol staff ran to safety. It was a direct attack on our democracy. Many people have tried to deny what happened that day – including some of the same people who stood behind us as we protected them. They’ve diluted the story and muddied the facts to preserve their own political agenda. So I’ve made it a personal mission to share my story, speak truth to power, and work to ensure this never happens again. That’s why a few weeks ago, I retired from the police force, and why I announced my campaign to run for Congress in Maryland’s Third Congressional District. I’m running because Maryland deserves a Congressman who will put the country above their party, and put the constitution above themselves. This will be a competitive race, so I’ve set an ambitious goal to raise $500,000 within the first 48 hours of my campaign. Will you chip in to become a Founding Donor and help hit our goal before midnight? [] SPLIT A DONATION >> [] Thank you for reading, Harry Dunn DONATE TO ERIC >> [] secure.actblue.com/donate/ESCA-14-Email-jan2024-fr-january?refcode=headerfooter-footer&amount=25 [secure.actblue.com/donate/ESCA-14-Email-jan2024-fr-january?refcode=headerfooter-footer&amount=25] Text ERIC to 43033 to get text updates! On your phone? Press here to sign up in just two clicks >> [] Democrat Eric Swalwell proudly represents California's 14th Congressional District. He needs your support in order to keep protecting what's important: our healthcare, our paychecks, our future, and our democracy. DONATE TO ERIC >> [] Eric runs a people-powered campaign that relies on grassroots supporters like you, and if he's going to win re-election, he's going to need your help. If you'd still like to stop receiving emails, you can unsubscribe: Paid for by Swalwell For Congress Swalwell For Congress P.O. Box 2847 Dublin, CA 94568 United States

Hey Friend - Harry Dunn here.

Three years ago yesterday, on January 6, 2021, I was defending the Capitol, the Constitution, the Members of Congress who you and I both may not agree with, and my own life from MAGA insurrectionists. **[Now, I’m announcing my campaign to serve as the next Congressman from Maryland’s 3rd District.](https://eqjdwl.clicks.mlsend.com/te/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjUwODYzOCxcImxcIjoxMDk3Mzk2MzI5MTMwMjQwNDcsXCJyXCI6MTA5NzM5NjY2NDMyODUzMDY3fSIsInMiOiJiNjY3OGU3NTcxZGE1MWU3In0) **

On January 6, 2021, we were inches from watching democracy crumble right before our eyes.

It’s not an exaggeration to say that democracy is on the brink of extinction. We’re one administration from it. And if we lose it, we’ll never get it back.

I refuse to stand by and watch. I’m prepared to fight to protect our rights, our fragile democracy – and to be honest, I’m prepared to win.

In Congress, I’ll be one of the loudest voices defending democracy – but I need your help to get there. [I’m humbly asking you to make a donation to my campaign to be the next Congressman from Maryland’s District 3:](https://eqjdwl.clicks.mlsend.com/te/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjUwODYzOCxcImxcIjoxMDk3Mzk2MzI5MTYxNjk3NzcsXCJyXCI6MTA5NzM5NjY2NDMyODUzMDY3fSIsInMiOiI1NDMzOTkxMGY4OGRlZWM1In0) [](https://eqjdwl.clicks.mlsend.com/te/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjUwODYzOCxcImxcIjoxMDk3Mzk2MzI5MjE0MTI2NTgsXCJyXCI6MTA5NzM5NjY2NDMyODUzMDY3fSIsInMiOiI1OTQ0MTVjODU3YjE4Y2I0In0)
|
---
| [ Donate Today ](https://eqjdwl.clicks.mlsend.com/te/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjUwODYzOCxcImxcIjoxMDk3Mzk2MzI5MjQ1NTgzODcsXCJyXCI6MTA5NzM5NjY2NDMyODUzMDY3fSIsInMiOiJkYWFmOTQ3NTZlODk4ZTU3In0)
---
|
---
Here’s the cold hard truth:

All across our great nation, rights are being stripped-back one-by-one by Trump’s MAGA army who would rather oppress folks than treat them as human beings. They cry “freedom,” fight tooth-and-nail to dismantle our democracy to protect their power, and dictate the choices people are allowed to make.

That’s where everyday Americans like you come in:

$5 will help me have a vote to protect and expand voting and reproductive rights.

$5 will be able to conduct investigations and hold folks accountable.

$5 will help me fight for democracy through legislation.

If you’re ready to get in Good Trouble and redeem the soul of America, as my hero, John Lewis, urged us all to do, I need you to join this movement today.**[

I’ve set an ambitious goal to raise $500,000 within the first few days of my campaign, and I need your help to reach it. Please, will you split a contribution to my campaign and Tamie Wilson right now to send us to Congress and help flip the House blue?](https://eqjdwl.clicks.mlsend.com/te/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjUwODYzOCxcImxcIjoxMDk3Mzk2MzI5Mjk4MDEyNjgsXCJyXCI6MTA5NzM5NjY2NDMyODUzMDY3fSIsInMiOiI5N2U2OWRkYTc4NDI4NDY3In0)** [](https://eqjdwl.clicks.mlsend.com/te/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjUwODYzOCxcImxcIjoxMDk3Mzk2MzI5MzI5NDY5OTgsXCJyXCI6MTA5NzM5NjY2NDMyODUzMDY3fSIsInMiOiI1OTYxNzUyNjc2NGVkY2JlIn0)
|
---
| [ Donate ](https://eqjdwl.clicks.mlsend.com/te/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjUwODYzOCxcImxcIjoxMDk3Mzk2MzI5MzcxNDEzMDMsXCJyXCI6MTA5NzM5NjY2NDMyODUzMDY3fSIsInMiOiIwOGFiOTcyNDk1NGFjYWU4In0)
---
|
---
Thank you,

Harry 💙 [](https://eqjdwl.clicks.mlsend.com/te/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjUwODYzOCxcImxcIjoxMDk3Mzk2MzI5NDEzMzU2MDgsXCJyXCI6MTA5NzM5NjY2NDMyODUzMDY3fSIsInMiOiIyYzJmMTZjN2UwMjkwY2FiIn0)

clean_body: Across the country, extremist legislators are going to be taking a stab at the ballot measure process | | Hi team, In the coming weeks, every state will start their legislative session — and we know that, once again, direct democracy will be under attack. Extremist legislators want to limit our right to use our collective power, and we won’t stand for it. = = = These extremists are afraid of what we can accomplish when we come together. We’ve used direct democracy to bring home major wins on Medicaid expansion, abortion access, worker’s rights, and police reform — and it’s upsetting the institution. But that’s the point, team! If our legislators won’t put our interests first,we will. That’s why we launched our Ballot Measure Rescue Campaign and why we will always fight for people-powered ballot measure campaigns. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to the Fairness Project will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thank you, The Fairness Project Thanks to grassroots supporters like you, our team at the Fairness Project has won over 30 people-powered ballot measure campaigns since 2016, changing over 18 million lives by expanding health care, raising wages, guaranteeing paid leave, and ending predatory lending directly at the ballot box when politicians refuse to act. _**500 RESPONSES NEEDED BY MIDNIGHT**_
* * *
A damning report by the European Union's Copernicus Climate Change Service confirms that 2023 was the hottest year ever recorded — with average temperatures soaring to unprecedented levels.

And here's the kicker: Climate experts agree that we're inching dangerously close to the 1.5 degrees Celsius global warming point of no return. Cross that, and we're talking serious, irreversible climate chaos.

But you don't need an expert to tell you that things aren’t going the right way. We’re already feeling the heat, _right here, right now._

But year after year, our elected leaders drag their feet. Why? Because greedy politicians are too busy filling their pockets with Big Oil money. We have to take action to change that.

**Jane Fonda Climate PAC is taking on the fossil fuel industry by working to elect climate champions at every level of government.**

But we need to know if you’re with us. So tell us: **Do you think our elected leaders need to act now to protect the environment and combat climate change?**

| Peter,

Since the overturning of _Roe v. Wade,_ lawmakers throughout the country have introduced and passed dangerous legislation to restrict women’s reproductive rights.

Even right here in Virginia, Governor Glenn Youngkin has previously said he would “happily and gleefully” sign any anti-choice bill that got to his desk.

These attacks on choice have no place in Virginia. We have to protect reproductive rights for every Virginian in 2025.

Virginians deserve a Governor who will focus on defending women’s rights and making sure that a woman’s healthcare decisions remain between her and her healthcare provider – not with the government or hyper-partisan politicians.

clean_body: These attacks on choice have no place in Virginia. We have to protect reproductive rights for every Virginian in 2025. | = | Peter, Since the overturning of Roe v. Wade, lawmakers throughout the country have introduced and passed dangerous legislation to restrict women’s reproductive rights. Even right here in Virginia, Governor Glenn Youngkin has previously said he would “happily and gleefully” sign any anti-choice bill that got to his desk. These attacks on choice have no place in Virginia. We have to protect reproductive rights for every Virginian in 2025. Virginians deserve a Governor who will focus on defending women’s rights and making sure that a woman’s healthcare decisions remain between her and her healthcare provider – not with the government or hyper-partisan politicians. = | = | = | = | = | = Thanks, Abigail * | | = Paid for by Spanberger for Governor Spanberger for Governor P.O. | John McGuire
I'm Running for Congress to "Save America!"
Christian Conservative
(Father - Navy SEAL - Business Owner)

---
| Hello Friend,
It has been an honor serving you in the General Assembly as a member of the Virginia House of Delegates. As your representative, my team and I have solved many problems for our constituents, been awarded a Legislator of the Year Award, and much more.
It really is amazing what we can achieve when we respect one another, put our differences aside, and work as a team. Thanks to our incredible team, my name has recently been entered in for a Policy Maker of the Year Award. More on that later.
We are looking forward to continuing serving you in the State Senate in the upcoming session starting Wednesday. Governor Youngkin and fellow legislators are working hard to make Virginia the best place to live, work, and raise a family.
Here is some of what is on my mind and what we have been up to:
---
| Getting Ready for Session
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
| Fellow Senators and I are getting ready for session. Will Democrats work with fellow Republicans to give Virginians tax relief?
---
| Fact Finding Mission Southern Border
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
| I served in every country in South and Central America doing counter drug missions and more as a Navy SEAL. A few days ago, I visited our Southern Border for a fact finding mission. The magnitude of the chaos at our Southern border is tough to fathom. This insanity is being allowed by the White House on purpose. Since August, there are officially more illegal immigrants arriving each month than there are children being born to American mothers. Minor children and drugs are being trafficked by the Cartels. Our country has been invaded by 10 plus million illegal immigrants since Biden was elected, because of his anti-American open border policies.
These dangerous policies are impacting us in the Commonwealth and across our country. This General Assembly session we will address these challenges. The fentanyl crisis is Chinese chemical warfare. These drugs are produced in China and coming across our Southern Border and poisoning or killing the American people. I re-submitted my bill to charge drug dealers with felony homicide when one of their victims dies. Human trafficking is modern day slavery and is at an all-time high. I have re-submitted my bill to stiffen felony penalties for those who participate in trafficking humans and especially children.
I will continue to do everything I can to put the American people first and keep you safe at the local, state, and federal level. We need Trump back in the White House and we need to stop the flow of illegal immigrants with Trump's Remain in Mexico Policy.
---

| My "Never Trumper" opponent Bob Good continues to change his comments about Trump because Bob is out for Bob. [Click here](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001QTfvdDA1hd1m6zjO-ZKupX5zJKHZ89z696n5RzBjM86w3ZaMVEHj9F4A4AMrdubTJgtpT3bzSmZNYLPFWGSrDvggcWIfoI6B2QCJCRpIxsPlC0eDgShlvwHtDq2God1pznPfWVN60lc0ejezdPySP0rqfu1JA9NIxvmm_NE7pozmakj0QDbAvT5tCT7o2Ldy0EZycXXktmIBjuJ9fONNTRt7sSKUBOAEZl21UyQ6RvZnDTr3-n7WC7nfPbSV9bVZw4tqL2mdXy9yDJ8m4ws2XaKD9oPZvSrmXpXZ98zdWz9WtmS7Awl4CGA5Y4W0Rvd4&c=SELrYYab9oNHpieKcjwLiYTWrVAFZ4oBFn6L9KD60kqXlsFXzMzOSA==&ch=oSUiywUZYnKvmFp5P7wUwD-iMt29ub0d7lgMOZUCHspCp_DChLEbag==) for the John Frederick's Virginia Star story.
Bob Good must hate Trump to endorse Trump's opponent, Ron DeSantis, less than a year after Bob received a Trump endorsement, the day Trump received a ridiculous indictment, and before DeSantis entered the race for president.
Bob accepted millions of dollars from Speaker Kevin McCarthy and then he betrayed McCarthy less than a year later. Bob begged Trump for an endorsement and he betrayed Trump less than a year later. Several sources say Bob is now about to betray DeSantis, less than a year later. Why? To save his own hide. This a pattern folks. Bob is out for Bob.
After saying he would not criticize Trump publicly or privately, a video came out in Politico of Bob doing just that. Good unbelievably says Trump is not pro-life, not pro-gun, and not conservative. [Click here](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001QTfvdDA1hd1m6zjO-ZKupX5zJKHZ89z696n5RzBjM86w3ZaMVEHj9LOjRPZaj5NQQpCZ9FHMGXTuUot7PmP_TP-h8-mPxB-ww-GvMcg3sR3bgUI79RBwv1zM4R0l8AIw5Q_8XY8O88E2J3Te6qKoqhzAX-b19d59uzog0Um9NE0Yxa4X9EhmX-Bbmn-V2djYEw4QpUZ7BOwCWkaR0p86ueZybh4RmErPGxK8fiIn5aL9JdUuaurxfAZH10KZwPp_TD-8P_06DemkDISKGYXkDcfC10s4lXVLNEXAtXBwJAYbNF-Zc1zQmI6uoGh70VjH66ekwx2nrfgujP35GY03TQ==&c=SELrYYab9oNHpieKcjwLiYTWrVAFZ4oBFn6L9KD60kqXlsFXzMzOSA==&ch=oSUiywUZYnKvmFp5P7wUwD-iMt29ub0d7lgMOZUCHspCp_DChLEbag==) and ask yourself what else is Bob not telling you the truth about. We can do better than Good.

| I'm running for Congress because the enemy isn't at the gate -- the enemy is THROUGH the gate and in our communities. Open borders, fentanyl, lawlessness, out of control spending, and more. Our country is in big trouble. I am running to represent the people of the 5th Congressional District because I am a conservative with a record of building teams to solve problems. We can do better than Good.
I've been all over the district and I can tell you the 5th Congressional District loves Trump and the America First Agenda!
I invite you and your friends to join me in this cause. Take care, please spread the word and I look forward to seeing you around the district!

Christian Conservative (Father - Navy SEAL - Business Owner) | Hello Friend, It has been an honor serving you in the General Assembly as a member of the Virginia House of Delegates. As your representative, my team and I have solved many problems for our constituents, been awarded a Legislator of the Year Award, and much more. It really is amazing what we can achieve when we respect one another, put our differences aside, and work as a team. Thanks to our incredible team, my name has recently been entered in for a Policy Maker of the Year Award. More on that later. We are looking forward to continuing serving you in the State Senate in the upcoming session starting Wednesday. Governor Youngkin and fellow legislators are working hard to make Virginia the best place to live, work, and raise a family. Here is some of what is on my mind and what we have been up to: | Getting Ready for Session | | | | | Fellow Senators and I are getting ready for session. Will Democrats work with fellow Republicans to give Virginians tax relief? | Fact Finding Mission Southern Border | | | | | | I served in every country in South and Central America doing counter drug missions and more as a Navy SEAL. A few days ago, I visited our Southern Border for a fact finding mission. The magnitude of the chaos at our Southern border is tough to fathom. This insanity is being allowed by the White House on purpose. Since August, there are officially more illegal immigrants arriving each month than there are children being born to American mothers. Minor children and drugs are being trafficked by the Cartels. Our country has been invaded by 10 plus million illegal immigrants since Biden was elected, because of his anti-American open border policies. These dangerous policies are impacting us in the Commonwealth and across our country. This General Assembly session we will address these challenges. The fentanyl crisis is Chinese chemical warfare. These drugs are produced in China and coming across our Southern Border and poisoning or killing the American people. I re-submitted my bill to charge drug dealers with felony homicide when one of their victims dies. Human trafficking is modern day slavery and is at an all-time high. I have re-submitted my bill to stiffen felony penalties for those who participate in trafficking humans and especially children. I will continue to do everything I can to put the American people first and keep you safe at the local, state, and federal level. We need Trump back in the White House and we need to stop the flow of illegal immigrants with Trump's Remain in Mexico Policy. | Bob Good Hates Trump | == | My "Never Trumper" opponent Bob Good continues to change his comments about Trump because Bob is out for Bob. == for the John Frederick's Virginia Star story. Bob Good must hate Trump to endorse Trump's opponent, Ron DeSantis, less than a year after Bob received a Trump endorsement, the day Trump received a ridiculous indictment, and before DeSantis entered the race for president. Bob accepted millions of dollars from Speaker Kevin McCarthy and then he betrayed McCarthy less than a year later. Bob begged Trump for an endorsement and he betrayed Trump less than a year later. Several sources say Bob is now about to betray DeSantis, less than a year later. Why? To save his own hide. This a pattern folks. Bob is out for Bob. After saying he would not criticize Trump publicly or privately, a video came out in Politico of Bob doing just that. Good unbelievably says Trump is not pro-life, not pro-gun, and not conservative. == and ask yourself what else is Bob not telling you the truth about. We can do better than Good. | Batteries Recharged | | | Tracy and I had a wonderful time celebrating Christmas and New Year's. We are blessed have had most of our children home. We hope you had a wonderful time with your family and are fired up and ready to take on 2024! | Thank You for the Prayers | | I stopped by to check on my Dad (age 82), as he is doing much better after spending a week in the hospital over New Years. Thank you for all the prayers! | FYI | | | | | | | I'm running for Congress because the enemy isn't at the gate -- the enemy is THROUGH the gate and in our communities. Open borders, fentanyl, lawlessness, out of control spending, and more. Our country is in big trouble. I am running to represent the people of the 5th Congressional District because I am a conservative with a record of building teams to solve problems. We can do better than Good. I've been all over the district and I can tell you the 5th Congressional District loves Trump and the America First Agenda! I invite you and your friends to join me in this cause. Take care, please spread the word and I look forward to seeing you around the district! | == | | | | | | | For God and Country, Delegate John McGuire Soli Deo Gloria Republican Jesus is my Savior Husband Father Navy SEAL == Pro-Life == Pro-Gun (==) Pro-Israel (==) American Legion Member VFW (Life Member) NRA (Life Member) Highest Award for Conservatism (ACU/ CPAC) Family Foundation 100 VCDL 100 (Life Member) == The Spirit of Virginia == our Facebook Page Twitter: @JohnMcGuire4VA Instagram: JohnMcGuire4VA == == john@mcguireva.com www.mcguireva.com | | == | == | == | == == == | Paid for and Authorized by McGuire for Virginia | | McGuire for Virginia | McGuire for Virginia, PO Box 242, Manakin Sabot, VA 23103 | | Sent by mailto:john@mcguireva.com powered by

clean_body: There’s a movement for change afoot. | A recent poll confirmed what we all knew already: Marsha Blackburn is more unpopular than ever. We HAVE to seize this chance to defeat her and elect a real leader for Tennessee — but we can’t take this moment for granted. Change takes hard work and perseverance. = | = Now more than ever, Tennesseans are fired up to elect leaders who will fight for their rights. After the Supreme Court overturned Roe v. Wade and TN banned abortion, courageous women began stepping up to tell their stories. In the wake of the tragic massacre at The Covenant School, survivors and families have never once backed down from their demands for gun violence prevention. We’re in the right time and place to make a change — but we can only win this critical race if we have the resources to compete. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thanks so much for all you do for this campaign, Gloria = | Gloria Johnson is running for the U.S. Senate because Tennesseans deserve leaders who care. clean_body: = | Peter, a little while back, we asked you to share the issues that matter most to you ahead of the New Year. I'm following up with the survey results but first, I want to thank you. Not just for taking the time to read these emails, but for ensuring that your voice is heard on our campaign. Here are which issues mattered most to supporters like you: → Strengthening & protecting our democracy 🗳️ → Making health care more accessible & affordable 🩺 → Protecting our coastal district from climate change 🌎 → Safeguarding & fighting for reproductive freedom ✊ I hear you loud and clear, Peter! You can count on me to enter Congress with a fire in my belly to tackle these issues and more. I'm running because South Carolina needs a leader who's ready to roll up their sleeves and get to work. But, as I'm writing this, there's a good chance Nancy Mace is doing an interview somewhere on some new stunt she pulled. Enough of the charades, it's time we send her packing. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = With you, \- Michael = | | Paid for by Michael B. subject: An amazing fact about our team ⭐
body:
|
#
Hey Peter, We’ve spent the past week looking through all our fundraising data from 2023, and we just discovered an amazing statistic about this grassroots team. Throughout the past year, your support has fueled our efforts to re-elect Mazie, power her bold, progressive agenda in Washington, and protect our Democratic Senate majority. **And this team did it by chipping in an average of just $20 to emails like this one.** That says a lot about us. It shows that while Mitch McConnell and MAGA Republicans spent their year calling up mega-donors and cashing checks from right-wing billionaires, Mazie’s fight for our families, our planet, and our future was powered by folks like you — chipping in what you could, when you could, in support of our shared progressive values. It shows that Mazie can always count on folks like you to step up when she needs it the most. name: Justice Democrats
subject: re: Biden and Netanyahu
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

We may have entered a new year, but the slaughter and starvation of
Palestinians in Gaza did not end in 2023, and according to Israeli Prime
Minister Benjamin Netanyahu, it will go on “for many more months.”

This comes at the very same time that President Biden simultaneously said
he wants Israel to “scale down” its military attacks on Gaza, while his
administration bypassed Congress for a second time to send Israel nearly
$150 million more in bombs and weapons to continue waging violence against
a civilian population.

The hypocrisy is astounding. The President of the United States is not
making genuine calls for peace and human rights when his administration is
paying for the weapons Israel is using to target refugee camps, hospitals,
residential buildings, and places of worship. In the words of Ilhan Omar,
it is morally indefensible.

What’s even worse is that this week, Israeli officials are hitting back at
Biden’s comments and making it clear that their intent is to clear Gaza of
its Palestinian inhabitants so that Israelis may live there — that’s
ethnic cleansing, plain and simple.

Progressive leaders like Ilhan, Cori Bush, Rashida Tlaib, Jamaal Bowman,
and Summer Lee were the very first members of Congress to call for a
ceasefire, and they’re continuing to hold our government’s feet to the
fire as long as the Biden Administration funds the atrocities we’re
witnessing.

It’s just one of many reasons we can’t afford to lose their seats in the
U.S. House this year, and why we need your help right now:

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-20240107.SB4BZY&refcode=em20240107-32684&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=3&t=1001&akid=32684%2E1203867%2EqQEjUU ]Will you pitch in $3 or whatever you can afford to fuel
Justice Democrats’ work to re-elect our Squad incumbents and keep up the
fight for human rights for Palestinians?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-20240107.SB4BZY&refcode=em20240107-32684&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=3&t=1020&akid=32684%2E1203867%2EqQEjUU ]Contribute $3

We cannot give up on the Palestinian people. It’s up to us to ensure we
protect those in Congress with the moral clarity and courage to keep up
this critical fight.

— Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time.

There are other ways to make an impact in support of peace and equality in
Israel and Palestine: please urge your member of Congress to support a
ceasefire through [ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/139873?t=1021&akid=32684%2E1203867%2EqQEjUU ]Adalah Justice Project’s petition or by calling them
using [ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/139874?t=1022&akid=32684%2E1203867%2EqQEjUU ]Jewish Voice for Peace’s dialer here. Your voice matters in this
critical moment.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20240107-32684-footer&t=1023&refcode2=32684_1203867_qQEjUU&akid=32684%2E1203867%2EqQEjUU

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1024&akid=32684%2E1203867%2EqQEjUU

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
Justice Democrats
1390 Columbia Ave #261
Lancaster PA 17603
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

name: Mark Kelly
subject: Please, support our plan to reduce gun violence
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
The GOSAFE Act will help protect communities from the most dangerous semi-automatic rifles and the high-capacity magazines that go with them.
#

I know firsthand the damage a firearm can do in the wrong hands.
Tomorrow marks the 13th anniversary of the day my wife Gabby Giffords was shot at a Congress on Your Corner event in Tucson. Like so many other families affected by gun violence, our lives changed forever that day.
But Gabby has not quit. Neither have I. Because here in America, it is well within our power to solve tough problems.
That’s why I introduced legislation to reduce gun violence with several of my colleagues. The GOSAFE Act will help protect communities from the most dangerous semi-automatic rifles and high-capacity magazines like the one used in Tucson.
It doesn’t apply to handguns, hunting rifles, or shotguns commonly used for self-defense and hunting. What we’re talking about are the types of weapons that are designed to kill as many people as possible in as little time as possible.
These are the weapons we see used over and over again in deadly mass shootings.
Nothing we do can bring back the lives we’ve already lost to gun violence. But if we can take action — any action — that might save lives in the future, we should do it. This legislation can.
[**So today, I’m asking you to add your name and say that you support this plan. This is just the start of this process, and we need folks like you to speak out in support of it. Can you sign on?**](https://act.markkelly.com/signup/mek-em-gun-pet-jan24/?source=em240105-1-450&refcode2=5691.6688874.LiLVt3&akid=5691%2E6688874%2ELiLVt3)
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.markkelly.com/signup/mek-em-gun-pet-jan24/?source=em240105-1-450&refcode2=5691.6688874.LiLVt3&akid=5691%2E6688874%2ELiLVt3)**
It will take thousands and thousands of us joining together to help get this across the finish line. So please, add your voice alongside the others who have already signed on.
Thank you,
Mark

Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.markkelly.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=1&akid=5691%2E6688874%2ELiLVt3).
Mark Kelly was a Captain in the U.S. Navy and astronaut. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or Department of Defense and reference to NASA does not imply endorsement by the National Aeronautics and Space Administration.

name: Marshall for Congress
subject: SIGN: Ceasefire NOW
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Derek Marshall for Congress
body:
| | |
[](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnl4R8uUpp1BotIjVdv04E3cWGw20eT-FC5yHMr4d4rEQcL5LnP9J_QRSCn5X53j2XMywP-cv5QiD4lC4bwD1HrUHATWRDSDawM60itrQ-TcLaMnJ9L9npLHr0B5jUk12a3NRWPPc0KaMuMImVJCP1DGOriMoz1ThuwS9KiYDWzlgX1uc7LJhrXKZIx0NZvjbywMb1uFJ7Ys9jW5No4012wg8-86_12idDsy-tzpFehLi_3EVuPoAvYoOiDHGKd0Jkvh46_n7QSjT845trSU9cCc9GhOhu43XJoD4181EKRJyQ/42s/22NwItvAQlO9NRII5qg8Qw/h0/xqLQMPZ24NwINGh_J1iuCrprsbsWYvuy5r5aYGOLaFo)
Peter,
Everyday we see shocking new evidence of the unimaginable horrors that continue to worsen by the day in Gaza.
Death and destruction have been unleashed on one of the most densely populated areas in the world.
**Indiscriminate bombing isn’t bringing the region closer to peace, or bringing hostages home. Peace is achieved through diplomacy and humanitarian measures which require an IMMEDIATE ceasefire.**

Hi Peter,

to

What this means for us:
We urgently need your support right now. Your donation today will be instrumental in ensuring that we have the resources ready to jump into action as soon as the legislative session ends. Kate Briefs

Peter,
Never in my wildest dreams did I expect to be the Republican Party’s favorite punching bag for insults and attacks.
But if investigating Donald Trump for his attempts to overturn the election and incite an insurrection makes me a “Wild-eyed conspiracy nut,” as Tucker Carlson called me, **so be it.**
If investigating and impeaching Donald Trump means Kevin McCarthy calling me a liar and kicking me off the Intelligence Committee, **so be it.**
And if Donald Trump himself wants to call me “shifty Schiff” or a “sleaze bag” for holding him to account again (and again, and again), **so be it.**
**I wear their enmity as a badge of honor. The insults and attacks show that they’re terrified of how effective I’ve been — and I’m not letting my foot off the gas when it comes to defending our democracy from MAGA extremists like Trump, Carlson, McCarthy, or anyone else.**

But if investigating Donald Trump for his attempts to overturn the election and incite an insurrection makes me a “Wild-eyed conspiracy nut,” as Tucker Carlson called me, so be it. If investigating and impeaching Donald Trump means Kevin McCarthy calling me a liar and kicking me off the Intelligence Committee, so be it. Republican candidates and their far-right PACs are flooding the airwaves ahead of Iowa’s primary in less than two weeks. Meanwhile, the super PAC backing her spent $25 million in 2023, with another $3.3 MILLION reserved for the final stretch before the first caucus. Republicans are spending BIG on ads in 2024 — they’ll do whatever it takes to take control and force a harmful agenda on our country, but this is just the beginning. If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately. | | | | | | Thank you, The Collective PAC The Collective PAC is strategically focused on creating a truly equitable democracy where our nation’s local, state and federal governments have diverse and talented elected leadership and Black people are fully represented in positions of power to create the policies necessary to progress our communities forward. name: Donald J. Trump
subject: “Discouraged FBI from investigating…”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J
body:
WOW! Jack Smith prosecutor shielded the Clintons from the FBI...
| | | [ ](https://email.win.donaldjtrump.com/c/eJw8kUGP2yAQhX8NvtmaDBjsgw_doqhqql21l_YWEZgkswJs2bjp7q-vHGX3-r0n9D7GpSny-W0Q5kkgXjksAlHILwLxoJ7-POvD74Ot2z6-11a36ral-FUglreJPquPVxpKjuNGja3CgL5D7ysadgaU1hqkrq7DyclT6Lw-QSdPTqlA0EJ3VqonTb12FQ8IqGAHBhFBto1rewrnTgaiNoAyQsGNcxPG7GJ4LfOapsaPqYrDtZRpuU_aC9wv5NeZmhvnmcLW2Jj7S7VLNLN39evIudTnNYfZ8cL5UvsxJS6FSOA--0gIZAjAdG1QCqSQ-7WkY6LAaxLSPnz1BpdxnT0JaT0f3YN5lybHlyyk_XD6SMZcKBch7Q5MjwL1MUcOQtrOfneHf-vz-usO7yeR9sX8-PkN1Mt7NQ9hunGMvOjtJy7bhE3ufwAAAP__L82NZw)
---
Friend,
The Biden Special Counsel waited _30 months_ to wrongfully indict, arrest, and gag me with the goal of convicting me as an innocent man right before the 2024 election.
Now, we’ve learned that a prosecutor on that same Special Counsel team told the FBI _not_ to investigate the Clintons right before the 2016 election...
**“Prosecutor on Jack Smith team discouraged FBI from investigating Clinton Foundation in 2016”**
[SOURCE: _Fox News_]
I’ve been saying it all along...
The Washington Swamp is all one big corrupt club designed to protect each other and shut _YOU_ out.
And this is why they hate me with every fiber of their being.
_**For the first time, these corrupt special interests have been forced to come face-to-face with a challenger who cannot be bullied, bribed, or bought!**_
But, on November 5, 2024, they will face a force _far greater_ than me – THE AMERICAN PEOPLE – when droves of voters peacefully show up to the polls to cast a vote to save our country and MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN!

name: Angela Alsobrooks
subject: Let me explain
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alsobrooks for Senate
body:
A lot of work is happening behind the scenes to win this Senate race.
|
---
[ ](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/2092?t=1&akid=815%2E52803%2EH1KlEu)

| | My team and I have set our first 2024 fundraising benchmark, and I’ve got to tell you, Peter: It’s a doozy. We need to raise $50,000 before the end of January, and if you’ll bear with me for just a minute, I’ll explain why we arrived at this number, and why it’s absolutely mission critical. **But if you’re in a hurry and don’t have time to read this whole email (_no hard feelings!_), please know that I wouldn’t be asking if this weren’t crucial to winning this race: [Would you please consider donating $25 to help us start the election year on the right foot?](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/9342?t=12&amount=25&akid=815%2E52803%2EH1KlEu)** | | | [Donate $25](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/9342?t=13&amount=25&akid=815%2E52803%2EH1KlEu)
---
| | [Other Amount](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/9342?t=14&amount=35&akid=815%2E52803%2EH1KlEu)
---
When we come up with fundraising goals, we’re not just pulling numbers out of a hat. There are loads of factors that go into a decision like this.
For example: We know we’re going up against a multi-millionaire opponent who doesn’t need to fundraise, so that means our campaign needs to be centered around grassroots outreach — **it’s our edge, and it’s how we will win.**
Hitting fundraising benchmarks like our $50,000 January goal means we can knock on doors, make phone calls, recruit and train volunteers — _anything and everything possible to get our Maryland-first message in front of voters._
But coming up short of our goals puts us in a tough spot, Peter, because every voter we don’t reach is a missed opportunity in a race that’s going to come down to the wire.
**[That’s why I’m committed to starting 2024 off with a surge of momentum, and it’s why I’m asking you for your support right now: Can I count on you to chip in $25 so we can outmaneuver my opponent’s outrageous spending advantage?](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/9342?t=15&amount=25&akid=815%2E52803%2EH1KlEu)**
_If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately._
| | [Chip in $25](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/9342?t=16&express_lane=true&amount=25&akid=815%2E52803%2EH1KlEu)
---
| | [Chip in $50](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/9342?t=17&express_lane=true&amount=50&akid=815%2E52803%2EH1KlEu)
---
| | [Chip in $100](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/9342?t=18&express_lane=true&amount=100&akid=815%2E52803%2EH1KlEu)
---
| | [Chip in $200](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/9342?t=19&express_lane=true&amount=200&akid=815%2E52803%2EH1KlEu)
---
| | [Chip in $250](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/9342?t=9&express_lane=true&amount=250&akid=815%2E52803%2EH1KlEu)
---
| | [Other Amount](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/9342?t=10&amount=35&akid=815%2E52803%2EH1KlEu)
---
Thank you,
Angela Alsobrooks
[](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/9342?t=11&amount=25&akid=815%2E52803%2EH1KlEu)

| | [ ](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/89?t=2&akid=815%2E52803%2EH1KlEu)
---

Hello,
$5.
That’s the amount I am humbly asking you to chip in to my campaign today to help me replace Lauren Boebert in Congress. Yes, just $5.
$5 because in 2022, I lost to Lauren Boebert by just 546 votes.
$5 because I’m running again, but our race was the closest race in the entire country.
$5 because all the pundits say that this time, we absolutely _can_ win.
And $5 because the Super PAC allies are already attacking me, and I need your help to counter their lies if we’re going to win.
I know $5 might not seem like much, but together with tens of thousands of other grassroots donors like you, we out-raised Lauren Boebert and her corporate PAC supporters. We cannot stop here or let up.
We’ve set a goal to raise another $50,000 before our first fundraising deadline of 2024, but right now, we are still short.

Yes, just $5. $5 because in 2022, I lost to Lauren Boebert by just 546 votes. $5 because I’m running again, but our race was the closest race in the entire country. $5 because all the pundits say that this time, we absolutely can win. And $5 because the Super PAC allies are already attacking me, and I need your help to counter their lies if we’re going to win. name: Lucas Kunce
subject: Josh Hawley's Family Business
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
He’s made it his mission to criminalize abortion nationwide. Please let me explain:
#
Peter,
From overturning Roe to banning abortion drugs, Josh Hawley turned his mission to criminalize abortion nationwide into a family business — and he’s abused his power to do it. **Please let me explain:**
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/42347?refcode=em20240107-4561&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=4561%2E614464%2EuGZ4-V)
**[DEFEAT JOSH HAWLEY](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/42347?refcode=em20240107-4561&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=4561%2E614464%2EuGZ4-V)**
**IN 2017:** Matt Kacsmaryk was nominated to be a federal judge for the north Texas district court.
His confirmation stalled for years. We learned he even lied to hide just how bizarre his obsession with controlling people’s bodies really is:
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/42347?refcode=em20240107-4561&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=4561%2E614464%2EuGZ4-V)
**IN 2018:** While his nomination languished in the Senate, Kacsmaryk made an investment in his future.
So he became a campaign donor to Josh Hawley, a fellow member of the Federalist Society — a group of corporate activist lawyers with funders including Chevron, Google, and the Kochs.
**IN 2019:** Now a U.S. Senator, Josh Hawley decided to make Kacsmaryk, his campaign donor, a federal judge.
Hawley confirmed Kacsmaryk to the northern Texas district court — despite bipartisan opposition over Kacsmaryk’s Big Brother views on contraceptives and personal freedoms.
**IN 2022:** A lawsuit was filed in the northern Texas district court by activist lawyers seeking to ban an abortion pill that millions have used safely. Abortion medication accounts for over half of all abortions.
**Josh Hawley’s wife led the suit. His donor was the judge.**
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/42347?refcode=em20240107-4561&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=4561%2E614464%2EuGZ4-V)
**APRIL 2023:** Hawley’s donor judge ruled in favor of the suit led by Hawley’s wife, calling for a near-immediate ban on the abortion pill mifepristone in all 50 states.
**This was the first time a judge has _ever_ unilaterally tried to take a drug off the market against FDA objections.**
Then, in his official capacity as U.S. Senator, Josh Hawley submitted an amicus brief demanding that the Supreme Court end a temporary injunction blocking the ruling (in his wife's lawsuit) by a judge (his campaign donor) to ban America's most commonly-used abortion medication.
**AND NOW: We’ve learned that the mifepristone case (led by Hawley’s wife) is being reviewed by the Supreme Court.**
But this is hardly the first time that the Hawley family business has made it all the way to the Supreme Court:
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/42347?refcode=em20240107-4561&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=5&akid=4561%2E614464%2EuGZ4-V)
**This is what corruption looks like — and this year, we’re going to make Hawley own it.[So if you’re ready to end these Big Brother attacks on abortion and send a real warrior for working people to represent Missouri in the U.S. Senate, please rush a donation of $10 or whatever you can afford to my grassroots campaign right now.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/42347?refcode=em20240107-4561&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=6&akid=4561%2E614464%2EuGZ4-V)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/42348?refcode=em20240107-4561&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=7&akid=4561%2E614464%2EuGZ4-V) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/42348?refcode=em20240107-4561&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=8&akid=4561%2E614464%2EuGZ4-V) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/42348?refcode=em20240107-4561&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=9&akid=4561%2E614464%2EuGZ4-V) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/42348?refcode=em20240107-4561&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=10&akid=4561%2E614464%2EuGZ4-V) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/42348?refcode=em20240107-4561&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=11&akid=4561%2E614464%2EuGZ4-V) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/42348?refcode=em20240107-4561&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=12&akid=4561%2E614464%2EuGZ4-V) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/42347?refcode=em20240107-4561&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=13&akid=4561%2E614464%2EuGZ4-V)
---
Senators shouldn’t be in the business of using their position to benefit their family’s legal careers and activism — especially if there’s financial incentive to do so. And there shouldn’t even be a _hint_ of campaign donations impacting who, when, and how a judge gets on a court.
When I’m in the U.S. Senate, I’ll vote to restore Roe v. Wade. But I’ll also fight to end corruption like this by:
1. Barring Senators from voting on judicial nominees who’ve given to their campaigns.

2. Barring Senators from lobbying any court to benefit an immediate relative.

**Everyday Missourians deserve a Senator who will stand up and fight for their personal freedoms — not another corrupt politician obsessed with controlling our bodies, families, and lives — and I’m ready to serve.**
**[If you’re with me, please rush a donation of $10 or whatever you can afford to our grassroots campaign to defeat Josh Hawley today. Real people like you are the only folks I ever want to be accountable to in the U.S. Senate, so your support means the world to me.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/42347?refcode=em20240107-4561&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=14&akid=4561%2E614464%2EuGZ4-V)**
**[DEFEAT JOSH HAWLEY](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/42347?refcode=em20240107-4561&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=15&akid=4561%2E614464%2EuGZ4-V)**
Thank you,
— Lucas Kunce

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lk-email-footer?refcode=em20240107-4561-footer&t=16&refcode2=4561_614464_uGZ4-V&akid=4561%2E614464%2EuGZ4-V)**
---

Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you. But, if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [you can do so here](https://act.lucaskunce.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.lucaskunce.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=17&akid=4561%2E614464%2EuGZ4-V). Mail us: PO BOX 1240 Independence, MO 64050.

name: Special Election Update (via DLCC.org)
subject: MI + NH + PA + You
disclaimer_text: Paid for by DLCC PAC
body:
We’re gearing up to face majority-defining special elections in Michigan, New Hampshire, and Pennsylvania. These elections are not just about winning seats; they're about safeguarding our democracy. | | |
---
| |
---|---
**Here at the DLCC, we’re gearing up to face majority-defining special elections in Michigan, New Hampshire, and Pennsylvania.** These elections are not just about winning seats; they're about safeguarding our democracy, and if we want any chance of continuing last year’s winning streak of over _30 special election wins_ , we need your support. 📍**In Pennsylvania,** the House is TIED 101-101. The upcoming special election is _crucial_ to defending Democratic control. Extreme Republicans are itching for payback, so we can’t afford to lose _a single seat._ 📍 **In Michigan** last year, our Democratic trifecta repealed an archaic abortion ban and safeguarded abortion rights. Now, the House is TIED 54-54, and our trifecta is at risk. With _two_ special elections later this year, it’s _imperative_ that we win _both_ specials if we want to protect our majority. 📍 **In New Hampshire,** the Republican majority is as thin as it gets. We’re only four seats away from FLIPPING the House, making right now the perfect opportunity to tip the scales in our favor. And your $7 donation could be the deciding factor in whether our Dems _win_ or _lose._ **These races will set the tone for our upcoming elections this year. With two special elections later this year, it’s imperative that we win both specials if we want to protect our majority. 📍 In New Hampshire, the Republican majority is as thin as it gets. We’re only four seats away from FLIPPING the House, making right now the perfect opportunity to tip the scales in our favor. name: Team Katie Porter
subject: You’ve been assigned to the Sacramento market — can we count on you?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=36074%2E3422442%2E-gMTy-)
Derek, we’ve got a problem, but Katie Porter is never without a plan.
**The problem:** Two new polls show Katie Porter being pushed out of the primary. In California, only the top two vote-getters advance to the election in November. And though early polls show us in a position to win a general election, a celebrity Republican is gaining traction and could knock us out during the March primary.
**The plan:** Our team put together a budget to reach every single California voter possible with our TV and digital ads explaining Katie’s record and agenda. We’ve assigned each of you to sponsor a “media market” to maximize our reach. We want to start running these ads _very soon_.
**The topline budget number looks scary. If we don’t see a big surge in donations in our final 60 days, we can’t execute the entire plan.** And that could mean we lose in the primary round, no matter how well Katie would have done in November. Yes, that means not only is Katie Porter not the next senator from California, but we lose her voice in Washington entirely.
**We can’t afford to lose Katie Porter’s voice in Congress.** This is where you come in, Derek. If everyone reading this email is able to sponsor their assigned area, we can run all of the TV + digital ads in our draft plan. Can you help us in the greater Sacramento media market?
You've been assigned to the greater Sacramento media market. Running a single TV advertisement there costs us an estimated $658,000. So based on our typical donation, we need about 27,705 people to help us run ads in this area. Are you able to sponsor the Sacramento media market to help Katie win? [⇢ Yes, I can help reach voters in the Sacramento market by donating $25 to reach about 71 voters.](https://act.katieporter.com/go/19719?market=Sacramento&voters=71&t=14&akid=36074%2E3422442%2E-gMTy-) [⇢ Yes, I can give $50 to reach 143 voters.](https://act.katieporter.com/go/19718?market=Sacramento&voters=143&t=15&akid=36074%2E3422442%2E-gMTy-) [⇢ Yes, I can give $100 to reach 286 voters.](https://act.katieporter.com/go/19717?market=Sacramento&voters=286&t=16&akid=36074%2E3422442%2E-gMTy-) [⇢ No, but I can give another amount.](https://act.katieporter.com/go/19720?market=Sacramento&t=17&akid=36074%2E3422442%2E-gMTy-) [Contribute Now »](https://act.katieporter.com/go/19720?market=Sacramento&t=18&akid=36074%2E3422442%2E-gMTy-)
---
These ads are necessary because the latest polls show that around 1-in-5 voters have no idea who they’ll vote for. Many of them don’t know much about what Katie stands for, or her track record of fighting for us in Congress. But as soon as they see our ads, we _know_ they’ll want to vote with us.
The whole plan is expensive. California’s a big state to advertise in! But when you break it down into little chunks, it’s clear that there are enough of us who want to see Katie Porter in the Senate to meet our goal.
[**Please chip in $5 or whatever you can to help sponsor our outreach plan in the greater Sacramento media market. We are hoping to get ads on the air**** _very soon_****so your donation right now is especially important.**](https://act.katieporter.com/go/19720?market=Sacramento&amount=5&voters=14&t=19&akid=36074%2E3422442%2E-gMTy-)
Team Porter has _never_ let us down before, and we know we can count on you this time, too.
All the best,
Team Porter

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=EMAP24_1_MED_20230107_V1_F&t=20&refcode2=36074_3422442_-gMTy-&akid=36074%2E3422442%2E-gMTy-)**
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-kp4s-emails/?t=21&akid=36074%2E3422442%2E-gMTy-)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kp4s-em-update-info-footer)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/unsubscribe/kp4s-unsubscribe/?t=22&akid=36074%2E3422442%2E-gMTy-)

To give by check:
Katie Porter for Senate
PO Box 5176
Irvine, CA 92616
Email us: [info@katieporter.com](mailto:info@katieporter.com)
Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
