subject: Help me strike out Adam Schiff...
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY STEVE GARVEY FOR U
body:
| |
---
| | [](http://links.newspatriot.co/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=19c857f1ee9b46f9a0590c85e34b6cbd&_e=5yZs5nUjGKmbtZ-2iYCuyRwaLtT_W7RMBtoTDNKVLrhp47uQCUL0Nn6hdsjmful8uaYI0RTSFoTa8lc42SIcDr_IJKjlh3SfXKAJeuPxsUh9Hf4Pd3UDIwNyA9ITCRqSt8Ryy5C0Lhlne3XcS1L5-DJPsFryi0p7afUhFid_qK8u9jCq9UcuU13KhzmWEYWhSQH7K2qjrsvGIS_bE-VkOuR7ACnhN9GPITiNSv_e5xeyjIEj8JGm00uzyCyxqnyXK8ki0TaZ2bXVJikObVCNrJznrj2Zmk6mhgxw5_GTaqaT5aSQ5c8OK4-ObG6LbSUD3HX6tYOkBKi_S-s2cVsPYBgrm34HoN7bz9H19HyMlHdhuliAUxci6TkswH692UfPPTV8KT_FrlFP0v_DDPSI0g%3D%3D)
---
| | Fellow American, **[**Will you help me strikeout the liberal lineup of Adam Schiff, Katie Porter, and Barbara Lee on March 5th?**](http://links.newspatriot.co/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=19c857f1ee9b46f9a0590c85e34b6cbd&_e=5yZs5nUjGKmbtZ-2iYCuyRwaLtT_W7RMBtoTDNKVLrhp47uQCUL0Nn6hdsjmful8uaYI0RTSFoTa8lc42SIcDr_IJKjlh3SfXKAJeuPxsUh9Hf4Pd3UDIwNyA9ITCRqSt8Ryy5C0Lhlne3XcS1L5-DJPsFryi0p7afUhFid_qK8u9jCq9UcuU13KhzmWEYWhSQH7K2qjrsvGIS_bE-VkOuR7ACnhN9GPITiNSv_e5xcIyfffKC2SILEgF6kMdo-wDZ1wC0v72u0GTOJRX-HKbd6oRXEfV8VJWg_98CUErJL5dLm2Vdt8ZMQvhvmbZdWw_mQUfOvFN5U3JrXAydJhb0923dUTY7khdq5AmaUn4f3yWfyALVrTCQYvLxJJS7V7dVotkah4KVAf986FhiY47A%3D%3D)** That's the day of the California primary. The top two go head-to-head in November. I can think of only one thing worse than a General Election ballot that forces Californians to "choose" between three dyed-in-the-wool leftists like Schiff, Porter, or Lee... ...and that's being forced to endure six years of Schiff, Porter, or Lee in the U.S. Senate. I need your help to go "three up...three down" against this lineup of liberal career politicians. That's a bit of baseball vernacular. No surprise, right? It means you record three outs against the first three batters in an inning. Then, it's your team's turn to go on offense. Well, that's very much the case in this election... ...you and I need to strike out this lineup of liberals so we can get to work saving our country. Liberals straight out of Congress where all three have spent a combined 51 years - most recently acting as rubberstamps for the Biden agenda that has done so much harm to our state and our nation. Which is why I'm reaching out to you today. **[Will you step up and help strike out this"lineup of liberals" through a contribution of $15, $25, $50, or more today?](http://links.newspatriot.co/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=19c857f1ee9b46f9a0590c85e34b6cbd&_e=5yZs5nUjGKmbtZ-2iYCuyRwaLtT_W7RMBtoTDNKVLrhp47uQCUL0Nn6hdsjmful8uaYI0RTSFoTa8lc42SIcDr_IJKjlh3SfXKAJeuPxsUh9Hf4Pd3UDIwNyA9ITCRqSt8Ryy5C0Lhlne3XcS1L5-DJPsFryi0p7afUhFid_qK8u9jCq9UcuU13KhzmWEYWhSQH7K2qjrsvGIS_bE-VkOuR7ACnhN9GPITiNSv_e5xeQyo1DDSY23pGvlK_LzRj0jnQFBImmF6minNvaC5uZnbNdVp35jUF-pc4iQ3u7bmrtTAf1hDUqjZI7ElxFrslx71FIfOELmBeJg02qtmcbIBRMjxNubpYvyvnzPMcsl6NpIgA3S41na1NQqBu1BYO3t0Z6aHVLyLNhN4HvqZgnuA%3D%3D)** Think about the crumbling quality of life in my once-great state of California. Think about the daily reality of:
---
• Fear of walking down the street, taking their kids to school, or running a small business because of rampant crime, homelessness, and drug addiction. • The exploding cost of living (gas, food, shelter) which for the first time in our history is causing more people to leave California. • Failing public schools and plummeting test scores. The numbers don't lie... prolonged school closings not only robbed our kids of learning but of social interaction.

Friends,
Last month, I announced that I wasn’t running for re-election to NC-13 after the North Carolina GOP gerrymandered me out of my seat. And now, I'm committed to fighting back against their anti-democratic actions in any way I can. That includes fighting to protect voting rights and supporting Democrats up and down the ballot.
Watch my remarks about my plans for the future, and remember that I won't give up on fighting for what’s right.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2401-wn-q1-speech?refcode=240107-email [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2401-wn-q1-speech?refcode=240107-email]
Thanks for standing with me thus far, and remember, we’re just getting started.
– Wiley

Friends,
Last month, I announced that I wasn’t running for re-election to NC-13 after the North Carolina GOP gerrymandered me out of my seat. And now, I'm committed to fighting back against their anti-democratic actions in any way I can. That includes fighting to protect voting rights and supporting Democrats up and down the ballot.
Watch my remarks about my plans for the future, and remember that I won't give up on fighting for what’s right.

Thanks for standing with me thus far, and remember, we’re just getting started.
– Wiley

body:
Sharing my 2023 reflections with you...

Sharing my 2023 reflections with you... | | | [](http://links.lgbrandon.co/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=37d3e8620d7f403fbcb1c990ebd3904d&_e=heOw652me6JMjVUSPiDF9qqHHnz4B31OOHZZgh4gjBIYW0U3iUNNZMnRWD8qEmjs6bUEdunBEONePUK1JTcx3nJ51CiQO3cww9j8jvxKO8e3D3U9B6XQJF3wCRckdDG4IK07q_6qQRa5EMQUj-MSmc3gwcuqWlyZGsaN8v02j4CGGV2_s8CC333n-2JIx_SlhOHmKZwcgiHRAbdjKbRO2E7PxJS_xV2dXT0Nw1vJt6Xzp4IeQV4KSm1CNkZZu9T2HeoIIv8m3QsoU28RvDBCQwoiCtqAlAYWIlcC09TGH4SteDf2y4sCuQdaC_K5gkBd0URgsEBvtPBpfHbUuRR9UG2wVKepwCtH5Czh3QE2BQUlnMLqfU2Gn5dFbRr557qfrO9mGt03wxuK1LO6Nd4oz-Z56buN1O6Wowv6Cav2wLPiXv96LoO9SbSFPrx9Patl)
---
| | To: My loyal supporters From: President Donald J. Trump Re: 2023 -- a dark year for America
---
Dear Patriot,

---
With the door officially shut on 2023 and the first vote of the 2024 election set to be cast in just DAYS, I thought it was time I sent you a personal letter on my reflections of this past year - _one of the darkest years in American history_.
---
All I ever wanted was to make this country that we all hold so dear and love so much _GREAT AGAIN!_
---
But to the villainous forces in the Washington Swamp, to Crooked Joe and his accomplices, _that_ is the ultimate crime.
---
**In 2023, the Radical Democrats unlawfully ARRESTED the _leading_ 2024 presidential candidate (_yours truly_) four times, took a MUGSHOT of me, forced me off the campaign trail and into the courtroom for SHAM TRIALS, unlawfully REMOVED my name from the ballot, GAGGED and CENSORED me, are attempting to JAIL me for life as an innocent man, and are even seeking the _" corporate death penalty"_ against me and my family. **
---
It might be hard to believe given what you've witnessed ever since I first rode down the golden escalator, but there was a point in time when I lived a pretty nice life...
---
_... Even the media said nice things about me! _
---
But then, I did something they couldn't possibly comprehend, something that undermined every globalist and radical left-wing instinct in their bones.
---
I chose _**YOU**_**** - the _PEOPLE!_
---
I chose to put _AMERICA_ FIRST.
---
I chose to give the forgotten, hardworking men and women of this country a voice, to fight back against the Washington ruling class that hates our country, to stop the warmongers, and to rout out the Deep State.
---
And if I could go back and do it all over again, _I wouldn 't have it any other way! _
---
**Remember, they 're not really coming after me, Patriot, they're coming after **_**YOU**_**. I 'm just standing in their way - ****_and I ALWAYS will, stand in their way._**
---
Which is why, in the most consequential election year of our lives, Crooked Joe and the Democrats will use every last bit of _**LEGAL**_****_**WARFARE**_ imaginable to try and stop us.
---
**But what these crooks, thugs, and fools fail to understand, just as they failed to understand all the way back in 2015, is that I will** _**NEVER**_**,**_**_EVER_**_****_**SURRENDER**_**our country to their tyranny!**
---
_And I know that patriots like YOU won 't either..._
---
[](http://links.lgbrandon.co/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=37d3e8620d7f403fbcb1c990ebd3904d&_e=heOw652me6JMjVUSPiDF9qqHHnz4B31OOHZZgh4gjBIYW0U3iUNNZMnRWD8qEmjs6bUEdunBEONePUK1JTcx3nJ51CiQO3cww9j8jvxKO8e3D3U9B6XQJF3wCRckdDG4IK07q_6qQRa5EMQUj-MSmc3gwcuqWlyZGsaN8v02j4CGGV2_s8CC333n-2JIx_SlhOHmKZwcgiHRAbdjKbRO2E7PxJS_xV2dXT0Nw1vJt6Xzp4IeQV4KSm1CNkZZu9T2HeoIIv8m3QsoU28RvDBCQwoiCtqAlAYWIlcC09TGH4Rt932Ocf776JMUt53PdzAqZJvUcGRtjvmkaWtcD6Pf1RDEaH-MwPtn97WCbsSQO9SF8ZM3NvDJ9Nlm3_QUEpuNdtR8v8gjPK_vxHg8NpFYJPJ2cHClsgZwB-fSQmireAFKWSaEbaJvF639TfvBYrEr)
---
| [CONTRIBUTE TO JOIN US! 🇺🇸 >>](http://links.lgbrandon.co/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=37d3e8620d7f403fbcb1c990ebd3904d&_e=heOw652me6JMjVUSPiDF9qqHHnz4B31OOHZZgh4gjBIYW0U3iUNNZMnRWD8qEmjs6bUEdunBEONePUK1JTcx3nJ51CiQO3cww9j8jvxKO8e3D3U9B6XQJF3wCRckdDG4IK07q_6qQRa5EMQUj-MSmc3gwcuqWlyZGsaN8v02j4CGGV2_s8CC333n-2JIx_SlhOHmKZwcgiHRAbdjKbRO2E7PxJS_xV2dXT0Nw1vJt6Xzp4IeQV4KSm1CNkZZu9T2HeoIIv8m3QsoU28RvDBCQwoiCtqAlAYWIlcC09TGH4SNZuNR_u4OHRVHBWYTdKQSeWAtK24juiKU_6Q0J_Rcz3G0V6Huzpa97wuoWHvh9ZXbP31ACt5-qePyR41hDSKfwkEZQLIOyCmgjlOBGJeos5_aK_dZEJPfu6tmRWoBHtLm2fCppChnVeb__cOX5DPz)
---
Come November 5, __WE THE PEOPLE__ will PROVE that good and honest Americans had the courage to peacefully cast off the Radical Democrat _regime_ that is destroying our country from within, and replace it with a government that serves and protects __YOU__.
---
**[So please, with 2024 voting officially beginning in just DAYS, make a contribution of any amount to show that YOU too will NEVER SURRENDER- and _together_ , we will WIN BACK the White House and SAVE AMERICA once and for all. ](http://links.lgbrandon.co/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=37d3e8620d7f403fbcb1c990ebd3904d&_e=heOw652me6JMjVUSPiDF9qqHHnz4B31OOHZZgh4gjBIYW0U3iUNNZMnRWD8qEmjs6bUEdunBEONePUK1JTcx3nJ51CiQO3cww9j8jvxKO8e3D3U9B6XQJF3wCRckdDG4IK07q_6qQRa5EMQUj-MSmc3gwcuqWlyZGsaN8v02j4CGGV2_s8CC333n-2JIx_SlhOHmKZwcgiHRAbdjKbRO2E7PxJS_xV2dXT0Nw1vJt6Xzp4IeQV4KSm1CNkZZu9T2HeoIIv8m3QsoU28RvDBCQwoiCtqAlAYWIlcC09TGH4Q5vHUegnAf3KeaTnHftqGt62QNJiTJ-vZ3Xlm_Vok8N6QSYxBY30xeMvd6X6LN-q4On_S4ihW2MJ2gGjHRj6JBN_zBk53zV_56nsdUloXLO0EqNUUmwFa-LnnzK1mkEdhBcqmyyWgKTMp8L2QY8aFi)**
---
Thank you and God bless you,
---

clean_body: Sharing my 2023 reflections with you... Sharing my 2023 reflections with you... | | | | | To: My loyal supporters From: President Donald J. Trump Re: 2023 -- a dark year for America Dear Patriot, With the door officially shut on 2023 and the first vote of the 2024 election set to be cast in just DAYS, I thought it was time I sent you a personal letter on my reflections of this past year - one of the darkest years in American history. All I ever wanted was to make this country that we all hold so dear and love so much GREAT AGAIN! But to the villainous forces in the Washington Swamp, to Crooked Joe and his accomplices, that is the ultimate crime. In 2023, the Radical Democrats unlawfully ARRESTED the leading 2024 presidential candidate (yours truly) four times, took a MUGSHOT of me, forced me off the campaign trail and into the courtroom for SHAM TRIALS, unlawfully REMOVED my name from the ballot, GAGGED and CENSORED me, are attempting to JAIL me for life as an innocent man, and are even seeking the " corporate death penalty" against me and my family. It might be hard to believe given what you've witnessed ever since I first rode down the golden escalator, but there was a point in time when I lived a pretty nice life... ... Even the media said nice things about me! But then, I did something they couldn't possibly comprehend, something that undermined every globalist and radical left-wing instinct in their bones. I chose YOU** - the PEOPLE! I chose to put AMERICA FIRST. I chose to give the forgotten, hardworking men and women of this country a voice, to fight back against the Washington ruling class that hates our country, to stop the warmongers, and to rout out the Deep State. And if I could go back and do it all over again, I wouldn 't have it any other way! Remember, they 're not really coming after me, Patriot, they're coming after YOU. I 'm just standing in their way - **and I ALWAYS will, stand in their way. Which is why, in the most consequential election year of our lives, Crooked Joe and the Democrats will use every last bit of LEGAL**WARFARE imaginable to try and stop us. But what these crooks, thugs, and fools fail to understand, just as they failed to understand all the way back in 2015, is that I will NEVER,EVERSURRENDERour country to their tyranny! And I know that patriots like YOU won 't either... | Come November 5, WE THE PEOPLE will PROVE that good and honest Americans had the courage to peacefully cast off the Radical Democrat regime that is destroying our country from within, and replace it with a government that serves and protects YOU. Thank you and God bless you, Donald J. Trump | | | Contributions to Trump Save America JFC are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. | Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J. Trump for President 2024, Inc. and Save America.

name: Debbie Mucarsel-Powell
subject: Rick Scott only serves himself
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Debbie for Florida
body:
help me defeat this fraudster and win Floridians the real leadership they deserve
| | |
---
Team, these days, I keep finding myself saying this: _Rick Scott is a fraud._
He calls himself a public servant, but he's shown us time and time again that, in reality, _he only serves himself_. He's pushed an extreme agenda that hurts working families**** all while he saw his own net worth **_nearly triple_** as governor of Florida.
He claims to be an advocate for families and seniors, but **he wrote the plan to end Social Security and Medicare** — lifesaving programs that millions of Americans, including my mom, rely on.
**Rick Scott is a liar**. He pushed Donald Trump's Big Lie about the 2020 election, voted to overturn the 2020 election, falsely claimed that mail-in voting wasn't secure, and spread misinformation about Democrats like me.
As if that's not enough, **he actually oversaw one of the largest Medicare fraud schemes in our nation's HISTORY.** He made millions defrauding American taxpayers (a fortune that he later used to buy his way into the Senate).
**One of Rick Scott's latest frauds is trying to convince people that Floridians are all in on his extremist agenda.** That's a lie, through and through. In his last election, my opponent only won by 10,033 votes. The fact is, Floridians are ready for a change.
**I promise to always tell the truth about my story, my record, my beliefs, my state, and what I'll fight for in Washington. That's why my campaign is already polling 1 point ahead — and it's why I know we're going to end Rick Scott's decades-long grift this November. [But I need your help to do it: Will you please chip in $5 or whatever you can spare ahead of my weekly deadline to help me defeat this fraudster and win Floridians the real leadership they deserve?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76671491/448113289/1820369458?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk600-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjM4MjQ1YzEtYjZhZC1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzN2RhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Dv6HiEpjMFn4TU65_tQvAFK--ObKmFMBnSa3fOr_x18=)**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76671492/448113290/1820369458?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk600-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjM4MjQ1YzEtYjZhZC1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzN2RhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Dv6HiEpjMFn4TU65_tQvAFK--ObKmFMBnSa3fOr_x18=)
Thank you so much,

Debbie

She’s dedicated her life to uplifting working families, ending gun violence, and fighting for her community. Now, she’s running to defeat Republican Senator Rick Scott and win a better, brighter future for Florida.

That's why my campaign is already polling 1 point ahead — and it's why I know we're going to end Rick Scott's decades-long grift this November. = = Thank you so much, Debbie | | | | = Debbie Mucarsel-Powell is a Floridian, South American immigrant, mother, and former Congresswoman. She’s dedicated her life to uplifting working families, ending gun violence, and fighting for her community. Now, she’s running to defeat Republican Senator Rick Scott and win a better, brighter future for Florida.
